FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Admin/AdminPanel.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState } from 'react';
import { useAuthStore } from '@/stores/authStore';
import { User, ActionPassword } from '@/types/auth';
import { X, Plus, Trash2, Save, Shield, Key, Users, Activity } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Switch } from '@/components/ui/switch';
import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

export function AdminPanel() {
  const isAdminRoute = useAuthStore((s) => s.isAdminRoute);
  const adminLogin = useAuthStore((s) => s.adminLogin);
  const adminLogout = useAuthStore((s) => s.adminLogout);
  const users = useAuthStore((s) => s.users);
  const createUser = useAuthStore((s) => s.createUser);
  const updateUser = useAuthStore((s) => s.updateUser);
  const deleteUser = useAuthStore((s) => s.deleteUser);
  const setActionPassword = useAuthStore((s) => s.setActionPassword);

  const [adminPassword, setAdminPassword] = useState('');
  const [loginError, setLoginError] = useState('');
  
  const [newUser, setNewUser] = useState({ username: '', password: '', role: 'user' as const });
  const [editingUser, setEditingUser] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [actionPasswords, setActionPasswords] = useState({
    delete: { password: '', required: false },
    format: { password: '', required: false },
    rename: { password: '', required: false },
    dfol: { password: '', required: false },
  });

  if (!isAdminRoute) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-background">
        <div className="w-full max-w-md p-6 bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-lg">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-6">
            <Shield className="w-6 h-6 text-primary" />
            <h1 className="text-xl font-bold">Admin Access</h1>
          </div>
          
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div>
              <Label>Admin Password</Label>
              <Input
                type="password"
                value={adminPassword}
                onChange={(e) => setAdminPassword(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Enter admin password"
              />
            </div>
            
            {loginError && (
              <p className="text-sm text-destructive">{loginError}</p>
            )}
            
            <Button 
              className="w-full" 
              onClick={() => {
                if (adminLogin(adminPassword)) {
                  setLoginError('');
                } else {
                  setLoginError('Invalid password');
                }
              }}
            >
              Login
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const handleCreateUser = async () => {
    try {
      await createUser(newUser.username, newUser.password, newUser.role);
      setNewUser({ username: '', password: '', role: 'user' });
    } catch (error) {
      alert((error as Error).message);
    }
  };

  const handleSaveActionPasswords = () => {
    Object.entries(actionPasswords).forEach(([action, config]) => {
      if (config.password) {
        setActionPassword(action, config.password, config.required);
      }
    });
    alert('Action passwords saved');
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-background p-6">
      <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <Shield className="w-8 h-8 text-primary" />
            <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Admin Panel</h1>
          </div>
          <Button variant="outline" onClick={adminLogout}>
            <X className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
            Logout
          </Button>
        </div>

        <Tabs defaultValue="users">
          <TabsList className="mb-6">
            <TabsTrigger value="users" className="gap-2">
              <Users className="w-4 h-4" />
              Users
            </TabsTrigger>
            <TabsTrigger value="security" className="gap-2">
              <Key className="w-4 h-4" />
              Security
            </TabsTrigger>
            <TabsTrigger value="logs" className="gap-2">
              <Activity className="w-4 h-4" />
              System Logs
            </TabsTrigger>
          </TabsList>

          {/* Users Tab */}
          <TabsContent value="users" className="space-y-6">
            {/* Create User */}
            <div className="p-4 border border-border rounded-lg bg-card">
              <h3 className="font-semibold mb-4">Create New User</h3>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                <div>
                  <Label>Username</Label>
                  <Input
                    value={newUser.username}
                    onChange={(e) => setNewUser({ ...newUser, username: e.target.value })}
                    placeholder="username"
                  />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <Label>Password</Label>
                  <Input
                    type="password"
                    value={newUser.password}
                    onChange={(e) => setNewUser({ ...newUser, password: e.target.value })}
                    placeholder="password"
                  />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <Label>Role</Label>
                  <select
                    value={newUser.role}
                    onChange={(e) => setNewUser({ ...newUser, role: e.target.value as any })}
                    className="w-full h-10 px-3 rounded-md border bg-background"
                  >
                    <option value="user">User</option>
                    <option value="admin">Admin</option>
                  </select>
                </div>
              </div>
              <Button className="mt-4" onClick={handleCreateUser}>
                <Plus className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Create User
              </Button>
            </div>

            {/* User List */}
            <div className="border border-border rounded-lg bg-card">
              <table className="w-full">
                <thead className="bg-muted">
                  <tr>
                    <th className="px-4 py-2 text-left text-sm font-medium">Username</th>
                    <th className="px-4 py-2 text-left text-sm font-medium">Role</th>
                    <th className="px-4 py-2 text-left text-sm font-medium">Status</th>
                    <th className="px-4 py-2 text-left text-sm font-medium">Last Login</th>
                    <th className="px-4 py-2 text-right text-sm font-medium">Actions</th>
                  </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody className="divide-y divide-border">
                  {users.map((user) => (
                    <tr key={user.id} className={cn(!user.isActive && "opacity-50")}>
                      <td className="px-4 py-3">{user.username}</td>
                      <td className="px-4 py-3">
                        <Badge variant={user.role === 'admin' ? 'default' : 'secondary'}>
                          {user.role}
                        </Badge>
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-4 py-3">
                        <Badge variant={user.isActive ? 'outline' : 'destructive'}>
                          {user.isActive ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'}
                        </Badge>
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                        {user.lastLogin?.toLocaleString() || 'Never'}
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right">
                        <Button
                          variant="ghost"
                          size="sm"
                          onClick={() => deleteUser(user.id)}
                        >
                          <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4 text-destructive" />
                        </Button>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  ))}
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          </TabsContent>

          {/* Security Tab */}
          <TabsContent value="security" className="space-y-6">
            <div className="p-4 border border-border rounded-lg bg-card">
              <h3 className="font-semibold mb-4">Action Passwords</h3>
              <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-4">
                Require additional passwords for sensitive operations
              </p>

              <div className="space-y-4">
                {(['delete', 'format', 'rename', 'dfol'] as const).map((action) => (
                  <div key={action} className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border rounded-lg">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <Switch
                        checked={actionPasswords[action].required}
                        onCheckedChange={(checked) => 
                          setActionPasswords({
                            ...actionPasswords,
                            [action]: { ...actionPasswords[action], required: checked }
                          })
                        }
                      />
                      <span className="font-medium capitalize">{action}</span>
                    </div>
                    
                    {actionPasswords[action].required && (
                      <Input
                        type="password"
                        placeholder={`${action} password`}
                        value={actionPasswords[action].password}
                        onChange={(e) => 
                          setActionPasswords({
                            ...actionPasswords,
                            [action]: { ...actionPasswords[action], password: e.target.value }
                          })
                        }
                        className="w-48"
                      />
                    )}
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>

              <Button className="mt-4" onClick={handleSaveActionPasswords}>
                <Save className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Save Security Settings
              </Button>
            </div>
          </TabsContent>

          {/* Logs Tab */}
          <TabsContent value="logs">
            <div className="p-4 border border-border rounded-lg bg-card">
              <h3 className="font-semibold mb-4">System Logs</h3>
              <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                View and export system-wide logs
              </p>
              {/* Log viewer implementation */}
            </div>
          </TabsContent>
        </Tabs>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/DFOL/DFOLMenu.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuSeparator,
  DropdownMenuSub,
  DropdownMenuSubContent,
  DropdownMenuSubTrigger,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
} from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { 
  MoreVertical, 
  FolderDown, 
  FileText, 
  FileCode, 
  Archive,
  Check,
  TreePine,
  Pencil,
  Trash2
} from 'lucide-react';
import { useDFOLStore, useIsDFOLMode } from '@/stores/dfolStore';
import { DFOLItem, DFOLMode } from '@/types/dfol';

interface DFOLMenuProps {
  item: any;
  sourceType: 'storage' | 'drive' | 'github' | 'terminal';
  panelId: string;
  onRename?: () => void;
  onDelete?: () => void;
  onTreeView?: () => void;
}

export function DFOLMenu({ item, sourceType, panelId, onRename, onDelete, onTreeView }: DFOLMenuProps) {
  const isDFOLMode = useIsDFOLMode();
  const enterDFOLMode = useDFOLStore((s) => s.enterDFOLMode);
  const selectItem = useDFOLStore((s) => s.selectItem);
  const selectedItems = useDFOLStore((s) => s.selectedItems);
  
  const isSelected = selectedItems.some(i => i.id === (item.id || item.name));
  const selectedItem = selectedItems.find(i => i.id === (item.id || item.name));

  const handleDFOLSelect = (operations: DFOLMode[]) => {
    if (!isDFOLMode) {
      enterDFOLMode();
    }
    
    const dfolItem: DFOLItem = {
      id: item.id || item.name,
      name: item.name,
      sourceType,
      panelId,
      path: item.path || item.name,
      type: item.kind === 'directory' || item.type === 'directory' ? 'directory' : 'file',
      size: item.size || 0,
      handle: item.handle,
      operations,
    };
    
    selectItem(dfolItem, operations);
  };

  return (
    <DropdownMenu>
      <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
        <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-6 w-6">
          <MoreVertical className="w-4 h-4" />
        </Button>
      </DropdownMenuTrigger>
      
      <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-56">
        {/* Standard Actions */}
        <DropdownMenuItem onClick={onTreeView}>
          <TreePine className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
          View Tree
        </DropdownMenuItem>
        
        <DropdownMenuItem onClick={onRename}>
          <Pencil className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
          Rename
        </DropdownMenuItem>
        
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        
        {/* DFOL Section */}
        <DropdownMenuSub>
          <DropdownMenuSubTrigger className={isSelected ? "bg-primary/10" : ""}>
            <FolderDown className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
            DFOL Dump
            {isSelected && <Check className="w-3 h-3 ml-auto" />}
          </DropdownMenuSubTrigger>
          
          <DropdownMenuSubContent className="w-48">
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleDFOLSelect(['folder'])}>
              <FolderDown className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
              Folder Dump
            </DropdownMenuItem>
            
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleDFOLSelect(['txt'])}>
              <FileText className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
              TXT Dump
            </DropdownMenuItem>
            
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleDFOLSelect(['pdf'])}>
              <FileCode className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
              PDF Dump
            </DropdownMenuItem>
            
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleDFOLSelect(['compress'])}>
              <Archive className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
              Compress
            </DropdownMenuItem>
            
            <DropdownMenuSeparator />
            
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleDFOLSelect(['folder', 'txt', 'compress'])}>
              <Check className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
              All Operations
            </DropdownMenuItem>
          </DropdownMenuSubContent>
        </DropdownMenuSub>
        
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        
        <DropdownMenuItem onClick={onDelete} className="text-destructive">
          <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
          Delete
        </DropdownMenuItem>
      </DropdownMenuContent>
    </DropdownMenu>
  );
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { Zap } from 'lucide-react';

export function DFOLModeIndicator({ isActive = false }: { isActive?: boolean }) {
  if (!isActive) return null;
  return (
    <div className="fixed top-4 right-4 z-50 flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-yellow-500/10 text-yellow-600 border">
      <Zap className="w-3 h-3" />DFOL Mode
    </div>
  );
}

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/DFOL/NotificationPanel.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useDFOLStore, useDFOLNotifications } from '@/stores/dfolStore';
import { X, Check, AlertCircle, Info, Bell } from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { useEffect } from 'react';

export function NotificationPanel() {
  const notifications = useDFOLNotifications();
  const dismissNotification = useDFOLStore((s) => s.dismissNotification);

  if (notifications.length === 0) return null;

  return (
    <div className="fixed top-4 right-4 z-50 flex flex-col gap-2 max-w-sm">
      {notifications.map((notif) => (
        <div
          key={notif.id}
          className={cn(
            "flex items-start gap-3 p-4 rounded-lg shadow-lg border animate-in slide-in-from-right",
            notif.type === 'success' && "bg-green-50 border-green-200 text-green-800",
            notif.type === 'error' && "bg-destructive/10 border-destructive/20 text-destructive",
            notif.type === 'warning' && "bg-yellow-50 border-yellow-200 text-yellow-800",
            notif.type === 'info' && "bg-blue-50 border-blue-200 text-blue-800"
          )}
        >
          <div className="shrink-0 mt-0.5">
            {notif.type === 'success' && <Check className="w-5 h-5" />}
            {notif.type === 'error' && <AlertCircle className="w-5 h-5" />}
            {notif.type === 'warning' && <Bell className="w-5 h-5" />}
            {notif.type === 'info' && <Info className="w-5 h-5" />}
          </div>
          
          <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
            <p className="text-sm font-medium">{notif.message}</p>
            {notif.operationId && (
              <p className="text-xs opacity-75 mt-1">
                Operation: {notif.operationId.slice(0, 8)}...
              </p>
            )}
          </div>
          
          <button
            onClick={() => dismissNotification(notif.id)}
            className="shrink-0 opacity-50 hover:opacity-100"
          >
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/DFOL/ExecutePanel.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useDFOLStore, useDFOLOperations, useDFOLGlobalProgress, useDFOLIsExecuting } from '@/stores/dfolStore';
import { X, Play, Pause, RotateCcw, Check, AlertCircle, FolderDown, FileText, FileCode, Archive } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Progress } from '@/components/ui/progress';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';

const modeIcons: Record<string, React.ReactNode> = {
  folder: <FolderDown className="w-4 h-4" />,
  txt: <FileText className="w-4 h-4" />,
  pdf: <FileCode className="w-4 h-4" />,
  compress: <Archive className="w-4 h-4" />,
};

export function ExecutePanel() {
  const showExecutePanel = useDFOLStore((s) => s.showExecutePanel);
  const hideExecutePanel = useDFOLStore((s) => s.hideExecutePanel);
  const operations = useDFOLOperations();
  const globalProgress = useDFOLGlobalProgress();
  const isExecuting = useDFOLIsExecuting();
  const stats = useDFOLStore((s) => s.getOperationStats());
  
  if (!showExecutePanel) return null;

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50 p-4">
      <div className="w-full max-w-3xl max-h-[85vh] bg-background rounded-lg shadow-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border bg-card">
          <div>
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">
              <Play className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
              DFOL Execution
            </h2>
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
              Output: {useDFOLStore.getState().outputDirectory}
            </p>
          </div>
          
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            {!isExecuting && stats.completed > 0 && (
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={() => useDFOLStore.getState().executeOperations()}>
                <RotateCcw className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Retry Failed
              </Button>
            )}
            <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={hideExecutePanel}>
              <X className="w-4 h-4" />
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Global Progress */}
        <div className="p-4 border-b border-border bg-muted/50">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
            <span className="text-sm font-medium">Overall Progress</span>
            <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">{Math.round(globalProgress)}%</span>
          </div>
          <Progress value={globalProgress} className="h-2" />
          
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mt-3 text-xs">
            <Badge variant="secondary">Total: {stats.total}</Badge>
            <Badge variant="outline" className="text-yellow-600">Pending: {stats.pending}</Badge>
            <Badge variant="outline" className="text-blue-600">Running: {stats.running}</Badge>
            <Badge variant="outline" className="text-green-600">Completed: {stats.completed}</Badge>
            <Badge variant="destructive">Failed: {stats.failed}</Badge>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Operations List */}
        <ScrollArea className="flex-1 p-4">
          <div className="space-y-2">
            {operations.map((op) => (
              <div
                key={op.id}
                className={cn(
                  "flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg border transition-colors",
                  op.status === 'running' && "bg-primary/5 border-primary/20",
                  op.status === 'completed' && "bg-green-50 border-green-200",
                  op.status === 'failed' && "bg-destructive/5 border-destructive/20",
                  op.status === 'pending' && "bg-muted border-border"
                )}
              >
                {/* Status Icon */}
                <div className={cn(
                  "w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shrink-0",
                  op.status === 'completed' && "bg-green-100 text-green-600",
                  op.status === 'failed' && "bg-destructive/10 text-destructive",
                  op.status === 'running' && "bg-primary/10 text-primary",
                  op.status === 'pending' && "bg-muted text-muted-foreground"
                )}>
                  {op.status === 'completed' && <Check className="w-4 h-4" />}
                  {op.status === 'failed' && <AlertCircle className="w-4 h-4" />}
                  {op.status === 'running' && (
                    <div className="w-4 h-4 border-2 border-primary border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin" />
                  )}
                  {op.status === 'pending' && <span className="text-xs">•</span>}
                </div>

                {/* Content */}
                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    {modeIcons[op.mode]}
                    <span className="font-medium text-sm">{op.itemId}</span>
                    <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs capitalize">
                      {op.mode}
                    </Badge>
                  </div>
                  
                  <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground truncate">
                    {op.message}
                  </p>
                  
                  {op.status === 'running' && (
                    <Progress value={op.progress} className="h-1 mt-2" />
                  )}
                  
                  {op.result && (
                    <p className="text-xs text-green-600 mt-1">
                      ✓ {formatBytes(op.result.size)} → {op.result.outputPath}
                    </p>
                  )}
                  
                  {op.error && (
                    <p className="text-xs text-destructive mt-1">
                      ✗ {op.error}
                    </p>
                  )}
                </div>

                {/* Progress % */}
                <div className="text-sm font-medium w-12 text-right">
                  {op.status === 'running' ? `${op.progress}%` : 
                   op.status === 'completed' ? '100%' : '-'}
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </ScrollArea>

        {/* Footer */}
        <div className="p-4 border-t border-border bg-card">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
              {isExecuting ? 'Processing...' : 'Execution complete'}
            </p>
            <Button onClick={hideExecutePanel} disabled={isExecuting}>
              {isExecuting ? 'Running...' : 'Close'}
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function formatBytes(bytes?: number): string {
  if (!bytes) return '-';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/DFOL/ProfilePanel.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useDFOLStore, useDFOLProfiles, useDFOLActiveProfile } from '@/stores/dfolStore';
import { X, Plus, Trash2, Save, Lock, Unlock, Zap, Gauge, Turtle } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import { Switch } from '@/components/ui/switch';
import { Slider } from '@/components/ui/slider';
import { useState } from 'react';
import { DFOLProfile } from '@/types/dfol';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

export function ProfilePanel() {
  const showProfilePanel = useDFOLStore((s) => s.showProfilePanel);
  const hideProfilePanel = useDFOLStore((s) => s.hideProfilePanel);
  const profiles = useDFOLProfiles();
  const activeProfile = useDFOLActiveProfile();
  const setActiveProfile = useDFOLStore((s) => s.setActiveProfile);
  const addCustomProfile = useDFOLStore((s) => s.addCustomProfile);
  const removeCustomProfile = useDFOLStore((s) => s.removeCustomProfile);
  
  const [isCreating, setIsCreating] = useState(false);
  const [newProfile, setNewProfile] = useState<Partial<DFOLProfile>>({
    format: 'zip',
    compressionLevel: 'normal',
    encryptFilenames: false,
  });

  if (!showProfilePanel) return null;

  const handleSaveProfile = () => {
    if (!newProfile.name) return;
    
    const profile: DFOLProfile = {
      id: `custom-${Date.now()}`,
      name: newProfile.name,
      format: newProfile.format as any,
      compressionLevel: newProfile.compressionLevel as any,
      encryptFilenames: newProfile.encryptFilenames || false,
      password: newProfile.password,
      splitSize: newProfile.splitSize,
    };
    
    addCustomProfile(profile);
    setIsCreating(false);
    setNewProfile({ format: 'zip', compressionLevel: 'normal', encryptFilenames: false });
  };

  const getCompressionIcon = (level: string) => {
    switch (level) {
      case 'store': return <Unlock className="w-4 h-4" />;
      case 'fast': return <Zap className="w-4 h-4" />;
      case 'normal': return <Gauge className="w-4 h-4" />;
      case 'maximum': return <Turtle className="w-4 h-4" />;
      default: return <Gauge className="w-4 h-4" />;
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50 p-4">
      <div className="w-full max-w-2xl max-h-[80vh] bg-background rounded-lg shadow-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border">
          <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">Compression Profiles</h2>
          <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={hideProfilePanel}>
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
          </Button>
        </div>

        {/* Content */}
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto p-4 space-y-4">
          {/* Existing Profiles */}
          <div className="grid gap-3">
            {profiles.map(profile => (
              <div
                key={profile.id}
                className={cn(
                  "flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-lg border transition-colors",
                  activeProfile === profile.id 
                    ? "border-primary bg-primary/5" 
                    : "border-border hover:bg-accent"
                )}
                onClick={() => setActiveProfile(profile.id)}
              >
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  <div className={cn(
                    "w-10 h-10 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center",
                    activeProfile === profile.id ? "bg-primary/10" : "bg-muted"
                  )}>
                    {getCompressionIcon(profile.compressionLevel)}
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <p className="font-medium">{profile.name}</p>
                    <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                      {profile.format.toUpperCase()} • {profile.compressionLevel}
                      {profile.encryptFilenames && ' • Encrypted'}
                    </p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                
                {profile.id.startsWith('custom-') && (
                  <Button
                    variant="ghost"
                    size="icon"
                    onClick={(e) => {
                      e.stopPropagation();
                      removeCustomProfile(profile.id);
                    }}
                  >
                    <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4 text-destructive" />
                  </Button>
                )}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>

          {/* Create New Profile */}
          {isCreating ? (
            <div className="border border-border rounded-lg p-4 space-y-4">
              <h3 className="font-medium">New Profile</h3>
              
              <div className="space-y-2">
                <Label>Name</Label>
                <Input
                  value={newProfile.name || ''}
                  onChange={(e) => setNewProfile({ ...newProfile, name: e.target.value })}
                  placeholder="e.g., Ultra Secure"
                />
              </div>

              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <Label>Format</Label>
                  <Select
                    value={newProfile.format}
                    onValueChange={(v) => setNewProfile({ ...newProfile, format: v as any })}
                  >
                    <SelectTrigger>
                      <SelectValue />
                    </SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectContent>
                      <SelectItem value="zip">ZIP</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="7z">7Z</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="tar">TAR</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="tar.gz">TAR.GZ</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="tar.bz2">TAR.BZ2</SelectItem>
                    </SelectContent>
                  </Select>
                </div>

                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <Label>Compression</Label>
                  <Select
                    value={newProfile.compressionLevel}
                    onValueChange={(v) => setNewProfile({ ...newProfile, compressionLevel: v as any })}
                  >
                    <SelectTrigger>
                      <SelectValue />
                    </SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectContent>
                      <SelectItem value="store">Store (No compression)</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="fast">Fast</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="normal">Normal</SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="maximum">Maximum</SelectItem>
                    </SelectContent>
                  </Select>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-2">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                  <Label>Encrypt Filenames</Label>
                  <Switch
                    checked={newProfile.encryptFilenames}
                    onCheckedChange={(v) => setNewProfile({ ...newProfile, encryptFilenames: v })}
                  />
                </div>
              </div>

              {newProfile.encryptFilenames && (
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <Label>Password (optional)</Label>
                  <Input
                    type="password"
                    value={newProfile.password || ''}
                    onChange={(e) => setNewProfile({ ...newProfile, password: e.target.value })}
                    placeholder="Enter password"
                  />
                </div>
              )}

              <div className="flex gap-2">
                <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setIsCreating(false)}>
                  Cancel
                </Button>
                <Button onClick={handleSaveProfile} disabled={!newProfile.name}>
                  <Save className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                  Save Profile
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <Button variant="outline" className="w-full" onClick={() => setIsCreating(true)}>
              <Plus className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
              Create Custom Profile
            </Button>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/DFOL/MultiCompressPanel.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState } from 'react';
import { X, Plus, Trash2, Save, Lock, Copy, Settings } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import { Switch } from '@/components/ui/switch';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';

export interface CompressionProfile {
  id: string;
  filename: string;
  format: 'zip' | '7z' | 'tar' | 'tar.gz' | 'tar.xz' | 'tar.bz2';
  level: 'store' | 'fastest' | 'fast' | 'normal' | 'maximum' | 'ultra';
  password?: string;
  splitSize?: number;
  deleteSource: boolean;
  compressEachFileIndependently: boolean;
}

interface MultiCompressPanelProps {
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  itemName: string;
  onSave: (profiles: CompressionProfile[]) => void;
  initialProfiles?: CompressionProfile[];
}

const DEFAULT_PROFILE: CompressionProfile = {
  id: crypto.randomUUID(),
  filename: 'archive.zip',
  format: 'zip',
  level: 'normal',
  password: '',
  splitSize: undefined,
  deleteSource: false,
  compressEachFileIndependently: false,
};

export function MultiCompressPanel({
  isOpen,
  onClose,
  itemName,
  onSave,
  initialProfiles = [],
}: MultiCompressPanelProps) {
  const [profiles, setProfiles] = useState<CompressionProfile[]>(
    initialProfiles.length ? initialProfiles : [{ ...DEFAULT_PROFILE, filename: `${itemName}.zip` }]
  );

  const addProfile = () => {
    const newProfile: CompressionProfile = {
      ...DEFAULT_PROFILE,
      id: crypto.randomUUID(),
      filename: `${itemName}_${profiles.length + 1}.${DEFAULT_PROFILE.format}`,
    };
    setProfiles([...profiles, newProfile]);
  };

  const removeProfile = (id: string) => {
    if (profiles.length === 1) return;
    setProfiles(profiles.filter(p => p.id !== id));
  };

  const updateProfile = (id: string, updates: Partial<CompressionProfile>) => {
    setProfiles(profiles.map(p => p.id === id ? { ...p, ...updates } : p));
  };

  const duplicateProfile = (profile: CompressionProfile) => {
    const newProfile: CompressionProfile = {
      ...profile,
      id: crypto.randomUUID(),
      filename: profile.filename.replace(/\.(zip|7z|tar|gz|bz2|xz)$/, '_copy.$1'),
    };
    setProfiles([...profiles, newProfile]);
  };

  const handleSave = () => {
    onSave(profiles);
    onClose();
  };

  if (!isOpen) return null;

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50 p-4">
      <div className="w-full max-w-3xl max-h-[85vh] bg-background rounded-lg shadow-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border bg-card">
          <div>
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">
              <Settings className="w-5 h-5" />
              Compression Profiles
            </h2>
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Configure multiple archives for: {itemName}</p>
          </div>
          <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={onClose}>
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
          </Button>
        </div>

        {/* Profiles List */}
        <ScrollArea className="flex-1 p-4">
          <div className="space-y-4">
            {profiles.map((profile, idx) => (
              <div key={profile.id} className="border border-border rounded-lg p-4 bg-card">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
                  <h3 className="font-medium">Profile {idx + 1}</h3>
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                    <Button
                      variant="ghost"
                      size="icon"
                      className="h-7 w-7"
                      onClick={() => duplicateProfile(profile)}
                      title="Duplicate"
                    >
                      <Copy className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                    </Button>
                    <Button
                      variant="ghost"
                      size="icon"
                      className="h-7 w-7 text-destructive"
                      onClick={() => removeProfile(profile.id)}
                      title="Remove"
                    >
                      <Trash2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                    </Button>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                  {/* Filename */}
                  <div className="space-y-1">
                    <Label className="text-xs">Filename</Label>
                    <Input
                      value={profile.filename}
                      onChange={(e) => updateProfile(profile.id, { filename: e.target.value })}
                      placeholder="archive.zip"
                      className="h-8 text-sm"
                    />
                  </div>

                  {/* Format */}
                  <div className="space-y-1">
                    <Label className="text-xs">Format</Label>
                    <Select
                      value={profile.format}
                      onValueChange={(v) => updateProfile(profile.id, { format: v as any })}
                    >
                      <SelectTrigger className="h-8 text-sm">
                        <SelectValue />
                      </SelectTrigger>
                      <SelectContent>
                        <SelectItem value="zip">ZIP</SelectItem>
                        <SelectItem value="7z">7Z</SelectItem>
                        <SelectItem value="tar">TAR</SelectItem>
                        <SelectItem value="tar.gz">TAR.GZ</SelectItem>
                        <SelectItem value="tar.xz">TAR.XZ</SelectItem>
                        <SelectItem value="tar.bz2">TAR.BZ2</SelectItem>
                      </SelectContent>
                    </Select>
                  </div>

                  {/* Compression Level */}
                  <div className="space-y-1">
                    <Label className="text-xs">Compression Level</Label>
                    <Select
                      value={profile.level}
                      onValueChange={(v) => updateProfile(profile.id, { level: v as any })}
                    >
                      <SelectTrigger className="h-8 text-sm">
                        <SelectValue />
                      </SelectTrigger>
                      <SelectContent>
                        <SelectItem value="store">Store (no compression)</SelectItem>
                        <SelectItem value="fastest">Fastest</SelectItem>
                        <SelectItem value="fast">Fast</SelectItem>
                        <SelectItem value="normal">Normal</SelectItem>
                        <SelectItem value="maximum">Maximum</SelectItem>
                        <SelectItem value="ultra">Ultra</SelectItem>
                      </SelectContent>
                    </Select>
                  </div>

                  {/* Split Size */}
                  <div className="space-y-1">
                    <Label className="text-xs">Split Size (MB, optional)</Label>
                    <Input
                      type="number"
                      value={profile.splitSize || ''}
                      onChange={(e) => updateProfile(profile.id, { splitSize: e.target.value ? Number(e.target.value) : undefined })}
                      placeholder="None"
                      className="h-8 text-sm"
                    />
                  </div>

                  {/* Password */}
                  <div className="space-y-1 col-span-2">
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                      <Label className="text-xs">Password (optional)</Label>
                      {profile.password && <Lock className="w-3 h-3 text-muted-foreground" />}
                    </div>
                    <Input
                      type="password"
                      value={profile.password || ''}
                      onChange={(e) => updateProfile(profile.id, { password: e.target.value })}
                      placeholder="Encryption password"
                      className="h-8 text-sm"
                    />
                  </div>

                  {/* Toggles */}
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between col-span-2 pt-2">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <Switch
                        checked={profile.deleteSource}
                        onCheckedChange={(v) => updateProfile(profile.id, { deleteSource: v })}
                      />
                      <span className="text-xs">Delete source after compression</span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <Switch
                        checked={profile.compressEachFileIndependently}
                        onCheckedChange={(v) => updateProfile(profile.id, { compressEachFileIndependently: v })}
                      />
                      <span className="text-xs">Compress each file separately</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </ScrollArea>

        {/* Footer */}
        <div className="p-4 border-t border-border flex items-center justify-between bg-muted/30">
          <Button variant="outline" onClick={addProfile}>
            <Plus className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
            Add Profile
          </Button>
          <div className="flex gap-2">
            <Button variant="outline" onClick={onClose}>Cancel</Button>
            <Button onClick={handleSave}>Save Profiles</Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/DFOL/DFOLHistoryPanel.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { FolderOpen, Copy, Trash2, X, Calendar, HardDrive, FileText, Archive } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

interface DFOLDump {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  path: string;
  timestamp: Date;
  size: number;
  hasTxt: boolean;
  hasPdf: boolean;
  hasArchive: boolean;
}

export function DFOLHistoryPanel({ isOpen, onClose }: { isOpen: boolean; onClose: () => void }) {
  const [dumps, setDumps] = useState<DFOLDump[]>([]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen) {
      loadHistory();
    }
  }, [isOpen]);

  const loadHistory = () => {
    // Read from localStorage or IndexedDB where DFOL output paths are stored
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('dfol_history');
    if (saved) {
      try {
        const parsed = JSON.parse(saved);
        setDumps(parsed.map((d: any) => ({ ...d, timestamp: new Date(d.timestamp) })));
      } catch (e) {
        setDumps([]);
      }
    } else {
      // Scan default DFOL output directory (mock for now)
      // In real implementation, read from /DEST/unifiedengine/dfol/
      setDumps([]);
    }
  };

  const saveHistory = (newDumps: DFOLDump[]) => {
    localStorage.setItem('dfol_history', JSON.stringify(newDumps));
    setDumps(newDumps);
  };

  const openDump = (dump: DFOLDump) => {
    // Open the folder in a new panel or file manager
    console.log('Open dump:', dump.path);
    // You can integrate with panel navigation here
  };

  const copyPath = async (path: string) => {
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(path);
    alert('Path copied to clipboard');
  };

  const deleteDump = (id: string) => {
    if (confirm('Delete this dump record? Files will remain on disk.')) {
      const newDumps = dumps.filter(d => d.id !== id);
      saveHistory(newDumps);
    }
  };

  const formatBytes = (bytes: number) => {
    if (bytes === 0) return '0 B';
    const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
    let size = bytes;
    let i = 0;
    while (size >= 1024 && i < units.length - 1) {
      size /= 1024;
      i++;
    }
    return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[i]}`;
  };

  if (!isOpen) return null;

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50 p-4">
      <div className="w-full max-w-2xl max-h-[80vh] bg-card rounded-lg shadow-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <FolderOpen className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">DFOL History</h2>
            <Badge variant="secondary">{dumps.length} dumps</Badge>
          </div>
          <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={onClose}>
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
          </Button>
        </div>

        {/* List */}
        <ScrollArea className="flex-1 p-4">
          {dumps.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground py-12">
              <FolderOpen className="w-12 h-12 mb-3 opacity-50" />
              <p className="text-sm">No DFOL dumps yet</p>
              <p className="text-xs">Run a DFOL operation to see it here</p>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="space-y-3">
              {dumps.map((dump) => (
                <div
                  key={dump.id}
                  className="p-3 rounded-lg border border-border hover:bg-accent transition-colors group"
                >
                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                    <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <FolderOpen className="w-4 h-4 text-primary shrink-0" />
                        <span className="font-medium truncate">{dump.name}</span>
                        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground shrink-0">
                          {formatBytes(dump.size)}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mt-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                        <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                          <Calendar className="w-3 h-3" />
                          {formatDistanceToNow(dump.timestamp, { addSuffix: true })}
                        </span>
                        <span className="truncate font-mono">{dump.path}</span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-2">
                        {dump.hasTxt && <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px]">TXT</Badge>}
                        {dump.hasPdf && <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px]">PDF</Badge>}
                        {dump.hasArchive && <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px]">Archive</Badge>}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
                      <Button
                        variant="ghost"
                        size="icon"
                        className="h-7 w-7"
                        onClick={() => copyPath(dump.path)}
                        title="Copy path"
                      >
                        <Copy className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                      </Button>
                      <Button
                        variant="ghost"
                        size="icon"
                        className="h-7 w-7"
                        onClick={() => openDump(dump)}
                        title="Open folder"
                      >
                        <FolderOpen className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                      </Button>
                      <Button
                        variant="ghost"
                        size="icon"
                        className="h-7 w-7 text-destructive"
                        onClick={() => deleteDump(dump.id)}
                        title="Remove from history"
                      >
                        <Trash2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                      </Button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </ScrollArea>

        {/* Footer */}
        <div className="p-3 border-t border-border text-xs text-muted-foreground text-center">
          Dump locations are stored in your system. Click to copy path.
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/DragDrop/DragDropProvider.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
"use client"
import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useCallback } from 'react';

interface DragDropContextType {
  isDragging: boolean;
  dragData: any;
  startDrag: (data: any) => void;
  endDrag: () => void;
}

const DragDropContext = createContext<DragDropContextType | null>(null);

export function DragDropProvider({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  const [isDragging, setIsDragging] = useState(false);
  const [dragData, setDragData] = useState<any>(null);

  const startDrag = useCallback((data: any) => {
    setDragData(data);
    setIsDragging(true);
  }, []);

  const endDrag = useCallback(() => {
    setIsDragging(false);
    setDragData(null);
  }, []);

  return (
    <DragDropContext.Provider value={{ isDragging, dragData, startDrag, endDrag }}>
      {children}
    </DragDropContext.Provider>
  );
}

export const useDragDrop = () => {
  const context = useContext(DragDropContext);
  if (!context) throw new Error('useDragDrop must be used within DragDropProvider');
  return context;
};

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

import { useDragDrop } from './DragDropProvider';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

export function DragModeIndicator() {
  const { isDragging } = useDragDrop();
  if (!isDragging) return null;
  return (
    <div className={cn("fixed bottom-4 right-4 z-50 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg bg-primary text-primary-foreground shadow-lg")}>
      Dragging...
    </div>
  );
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/DragDrop/DragDropItem.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { Check, GripVertical } from 'lucide-react';
import { useDragDrop } from './useDragDrop';
import { SourceType } from '@/types/dragDrop';

interface DragDropItemProps {
  children: React.ReactNode;
  item: any;
  id: string;
  sourceType: SourceType;
  panelId: string;
  className?: string;
  onDrop?: (items: any[], operation: 'copy' | 'move') => void;
}

export function DragDropItem({
  children,
  item,
  id,
  sourceType,
  panelId,
  className,
  onDrop,
}: DragDropItemProps) {
  const {
    setRef,
    isSelected,
    isDragging,
    isOver,
    canDrop,
    isPressed,
    isDragMode,
    toggleSelection,
    handlers,
  } = useDragDrop({ item, id, sourceType, panelId, onDrop });

  return (
    <div
      ref={setRef}
      className={cn(
        "relative transition-all",
        isSelected && "ring-2 ring-primary bg-primary/5",
        isDragging && "opacity-50",
        isOver && canDrop && "bg-accent/50 ring-2 ring-accent",
        isPressed && "scale-95",
        className
      )}
      {...handlers}
    >
      {/* Selection checkbox */}
      {isDragMode && (
        <div 
          className="absolute top-2 left-2 z-10"
          onClick={(e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
            toggleSelection();
          }}
        >
          <div className={cn(
            "w-5 h-5 rounded border-2 flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer",
            isSelected 
              ? "bg-primary border-primary text-primary-foreground" 
              : "border-muted-foreground bg-background"
          )}>
            {isSelected && <Check className="w-3 h-3" />}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Drag handle indicator */}
      {isDragMode && isSelected && (
        <div className="absolute top-2 right-2 z-10 p-1 bg-primary/10 rounded cursor-move">
          <GripVertical className="w-4 h-4 text-primary" />
        </div>
      )}

      {children}
    </div>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/DragDrop/DropHandler.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useEffect } from 'react';
import { useDragDropStore, usePendingOperation, useTargetPanel, useSelectedItems, useDragSourcePanel } from '@/stores/dragDropStore';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { fileSystemBackend } from '@/lib/fileSystemBackend';
import { webcontainerApi } from '@/lib/webcontainerApi';
import { useDFOLStore } from '@/stores/dfolStore';

export function DropHandler() {
  const showConfirm = useDragDropStore((s) => s.showConfirmDialog);
  const pendingOperation = usePendingOperation();
  const targetPanel = useTargetPanel();
  const sourcePanel = useDragSourcePanel();
  const selectedItems = useSelectedItems();

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!showConfirm && pendingOperation && targetPanel && sourcePanel) {
      executeOperation();
    }
  }, [showConfirm, pendingOperation, targetPanel, sourcePanel]);

  const executeOperation = async () => {
    const targetPanelState = usePanelStore.getState().getPanel(targetPanel!);
    if (!targetPanelState) return;

    const operation = pendingOperation!;
    const errors: string[] = [];

    for (const item of selectedItems) {
      try {
        switch (targetPanelState.source) {
          case 'storage':
            await handleStorageTarget(item, operation, targetPanelState);
            break;
          case 'terminal':
            await handleTerminalTarget(item, operation, targetPanelState);
            break;
          default:
            throw new Error(`Unsupported target source: ${targetPanelState.source}`);
        }
      } catch (error) {
        errors.push(`${item.item.name}: ${(error as Error).message}`);
      }
    }

    if (errors.length > 0) {
      useDFOLStore.getState().addNotification({
        type: 'error',
        message: `Failed to ${operation} ${errors.length} item(s):\n${errors.join('\n')}`,
        autoDismiss: false,
      });
    } else {
      useDFOLStore.getState().addNotification({
        type: 'success',
        message: `Successfully ${operation === 'copy' ? 'copied' : 'moved'} ${selectedItems.length} item(s) to ${targetPanelState.source}`,
        autoDismiss: true,
      });
    }

    useDragDropStore.getState().exitDragMode();
  };

  const handleStorageTarget = async (item: any, operation: 'copy' | 'move', targetPanel: any) => {
    if (!targetPanel.handle) throw new Error('Target directory not selected');

    if (item.sourceType === 'storage') {
      const sourceHandle = item.item.handle;
      const sourceParentHandle = item.parentHandle;
      if (!sourceParentHandle) throw new Error('Missing source parent handle for storage item');

      if (operation === 'copy') {
        await fileSystemBackend.copyEntry(sourceHandle, targetPanel.handle);
      } else {
        await fileSystemBackend.moveEntry(sourceHandle, sourceParentHandle, targetPanel.handle);
      }
    } else if (item.sourceType === 'terminal') {
      // Terminal → Storage: copy first
      await copyTerminalToStorage(item.item, targetPanel.handle);
      if (operation === 'move') {
        await deleteTerminalItem(item.item);
      }
    } else {
      throw new Error(`Copy from ${item.sourceType} to storage not implemented`);
    }
  };

  const handleTerminalTarget = async (item: any, operation: 'copy' | 'move', targetPanel: any) => {
    const terminal = webcontainerApi.getInstance();
    if (!terminal) throw new Error('WebContainer not initialized');

    const targetPath = targetPanel.path === '/' ? '' : targetPanel.path;

    if (item.sourceType === 'storage') {
      // Storage → Terminal: copy first
      await copyStorageToTerminal(item.item, targetPath);
      if (operation === 'move') {
        const sourceParentHandle = item.parentHandle;
        if (!sourceParentHandle) throw new Error('Missing source parent handle for storage item');
        await fileSystemBackend.deleteEntry(sourceParentHandle, item.item.name, item.item.kind === 'directory');
      }
    } else if (item.sourceType === 'terminal') {
      const sourcePath = item.item.path;
      const destPath = targetPath ? `${targetPath}/${item.item.name}` : `/${item.item.name}`;

      if (operation === 'copy') {
        await copyTerminalToTerminal(sourcePath, destPath);
      } else {
        // Terminal → Terminal move using rename
        await terminal.fs.rename(sourcePath, destPath);
      }
    } else {
      throw new Error(`Copy from ${item.sourceType} to terminal not implemented`);
    }
  };

  // Storage → Terminal
  async function copyStorageToTerminal(sourceItem: any, targetDirPath: string) {
    const terminal = webcontainerApi.getInstance();
    if (!terminal) throw new Error('WebContainer not available');

    const targetFullPath = targetDirPath ? `${targetDirPath}/${sourceItem.name}` : `/${sourceItem.name}`;

    if (sourceItem.kind === 'directory') {
      await terminal.fs.mkdir(targetFullPath, { recursive: true });
      await copyStorageDirectoryToTerminal(sourceItem.handle, targetFullPath);
    } else {
      const file = await sourceItem.handle.getFile();
      const arrayBuffer = await file.arrayBuffer();
      await terminal.fs.writeFile(targetFullPath, new Uint8Array(arrayBuffer));
    }
  }

  async function copyStorageDirectoryToTerminal(sourceDirHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, targetPath: string) {
    const terminal = webcontainerApi.getInstance();
    if (!terminal) throw new Error('WebContainer not available');

    for await (const [name, entry] of sourceDirHandle.entries()) {
      const entryPath = `${targetPath}/${name}`;
      if (entry.kind === 'directory') {
        await terminal.fs.mkdir(entryPath, { recursive: true });
        await copyStorageDirectoryToTerminal(entry, entryPath);
      } else {
        const file = await entry.getFile();
        const arrayBuffer = await file.arrayBuffer();
        await terminal.fs.writeFile(entryPath, new Uint8Array(arrayBuffer));
      }
    }
  }

  // Terminal → Storage
  async function copyTerminalToStorage(sourceItem: any, targetDirHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle) {
    const terminal = webcontainerApi.getInstance();
    if (!terminal) throw new Error('WebContainer not available');

    const sourcePath = sourceItem.path;

    if (sourceItem.type === 'directory') {
      const newDirHandle = await fileSystemBackend.createDirectory(targetDirHandle, sourceItem.name);
      await copyTerminalDirectoryToStorage(sourcePath, newDirHandle);
    } else {
      const content = await terminal.fs.readFile(sourcePath);
      const blob = new Blob([content]);
      await fileSystemBackend.writeFile(targetDirHandle, sourceItem.name, blob);
    }
  }

  async function copyTerminalDirectoryToStorage(sourceDirPath: string, targetDirHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle) {
    const terminal = webcontainerApi.getInstance();
    if (!terminal) throw new Error('WebContainer not available');

    const entries = await terminal.fs.readdir(sourceDirPath, { withFileTypes: true });
    for (const entry of entries) {
      const srcPath = `${sourceDirPath}/${entry.name}`;
      if (entry.isDirectory()) {
        const newSubDir = await fileSystemBackend.createDirectory(targetDirHandle, entry.name);
        await copyTerminalDirectoryToStorage(srcPath, newSubDir);
      } else {
        const content = await terminal.fs.readFile(srcPath);
        const blob = new Blob([content]);
        await fileSystemBackend.writeFile(targetDirHandle, entry.name, blob);
      }
    }
  }

  async function deleteTerminalItem(item: any) {
    const terminal = webcontainerApi.getInstance();
    if (!terminal) throw new Error('WebContainer not available');
    const path = item.path;
    const stat = await terminal.fs.stat(path);
    if (stat.isDirectory()) {
      await terminal.fs.rmdir(path, { recursive: true });
    } else {
      await terminal.fs.unlink(path);
    }
  }

  // Terminal → Terminal
  async function copyTerminalToTerminal(sourcePath: string, destPath: string) {
    const terminal = webcontainerApi.getInstance();
    if (!terminal) throw new Error('WebContainer not available');

    const stat = await terminal.fs.stat(sourcePath);
    if (stat.isDirectory()) {
      await terminal.fs.mkdir(destPath, { recursive: true });
      const entries = await terminal.fs.readdir(sourcePath, { withFileTypes: true });
      for (const entry of entries) {
        await copyTerminalToTerminal(`${sourcePath}/${entry.name}`, `${destPath}/${entry.name}`);
      }
    } else {
      const content = await terminal.fs.readFile(sourcePath);
      await terminal.fs.writeFile(destPath, content);
    }
  }

  return null;
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/DragDrop/useDragDrop.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
// PATH: src/components/DragDrop/useDragDrop.ts

import { useDrag, useDrop } from 'react-dnd';
import { useCallback, useRef, useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useDragDropStore, useIsDragMode, useSelectedItems } from '@/stores/dragDropStore';
import { SelectedItem, SourceType } from '@/types/dragDrop';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';

interface UseDragDropOptions {
  item: any;
  id: string;
  sourceType: SourceType;
  panelId: string;
  onDrop?: (items: SelectedItem[], operation: 'copy' | 'move') => void;
}

export function useDragDrop({ item, id, sourceType, panelId, onDrop }: UseDragDropOptions) {
  const isDragMode = useIsDragMode();
  const selectedItems = useSelectedItems();
  const dragDropStore = useDragDropStore();

  const [isPressed, setIsPressed] = useState(false);
  const longPressTimer = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null);
  const touchStartPos = useRef<{ x: number; y: number } | null>(null);
  const dragStartedRef = useRef(false);

  // ✅ FIXED: correct parent handle
  const getParentHandle = useCallback(() => {
    const panel = usePanelStore.getState().getPanel(panelId);
    if (!panel) return null;

    if (sourceType === 'storage') return panel.handle;
    if (sourceType === 'terminal') return panel.path;

    return null;
  }, [panelId, sourceType]);

  const isItemSelected = selectedItems.some(
    (si) => si.id === id && si.panelId === panelId
  );

  const toggleSelection = useCallback(() => {
    const parentHandle = getParentHandle();
    const selectedItem: SelectedItem = {
      id,
      sourceType,
      item,
      panelId,
      parentHandle,
    };
    dragDropStore.toggleSelection(selectedItem);
  }, [id, sourceType, item, panelId, dragDropStore, getParentHandle]);

  const clearLongPress = useCallback(() => {
    if (longPressTimer.current) {
      clearTimeout(longPressTimer.current);
      longPressTimer.current = null;
    }
  }, []);

  const startDragIfNeeded = useCallback(
    (clientX: number, clientY: number) => {
      if (!dragStartedRef.current && isDragMode && isItemSelected) {
        dragStartedRef.current = true;
        dragDropStore.startDrag(panelId, { x: clientX, y: clientY });
      }
    },
    [isDragMode, isItemSelected, panelId, dragDropStore]
  );

  // ======================
  // TOUCH HANDLERS
  // ======================
  const handleTouchStart = useCallback(
    (e: React.TouchEvent) => {
      const touch = e.touches[0];
      touchStartPos.current = { x: touch.clientX, y: touch.clientY };
      setIsPressed(true);
      dragStartedRef.current = false;

      // ✅ LONG PRESS
      longPressTimer.current = setTimeout(() => {
        dragDropStore.enterDragMode(panelId);
        toggleSelection();
      }, 500);
    },
    [panelId, dragDropStore, toggleSelection]
  );

  const handleTouchMove = useCallback(
    (e: React.TouchEvent) => {
      if (!touchStartPos.current) return;

      const touch = e.touches[0];
      const dx = Math.abs(touch.clientX - touchStartPos.current.x);
      const dy = Math.abs(touch.clientY - touchStartPos.current.y);

      // cancel long press if moved
      if (dx > 10 || dy > 10) {
        clearLongPress();
      }

      startDragIfNeeded(touch.clientX, touch.clientY);

      if (dragDropStore.isDragging) {
        dragDropStore.setDragImagePosition({
          x: touch.clientX,
          y: touch.clientY,
        });
      }
    },
    [clearLongPress, startDragIfNeeded, dragDropStore]
  );

  const handleTouchEnd = useCallback(() => {
    clearLongPress();
    setIsPressed(false);
    touchStartPos.current = null;
    dragStartedRef.current = false;
  }, [clearLongPress]);

  // ======================
  // MOUSE HANDLERS
  // ======================
  const handleMouseDown = useCallback(
    (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
      if (e.button !== 0) return;

      toggleSelection();

      setIsPressed(true);
      dragStartedRef.current = false;

      if (isItemSelected) {
        startDragIfNeeded(e.clientX, e.clientY);
      }
    },
    [toggleSelection, isItemSelected, startDragIfNeeded]
  );

  const handleMouseMove = useCallback(
    (e: MouseEvent) => {
      if (dragDropStore.isDragging) {
        dragDropStore.setDragImagePosition({
          x: e.clientX,
          y: e.clientY,
        });
      }
    },
    [dragDropStore]
  );

  const handleMouseUp = useCallback(() => {
    setIsPressed(false);
    dragStartedRef.current = false;
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (dragDropStore.isDragging) {
      window.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
      window.addEventListener('mouseup', handleMouseUp);
    }

    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
      window.removeEventListener('mouseup', handleMouseUp);
    };
  }, [dragDropStore.isDragging, handleMouseMove, handleMouseUp]);

  // ======================
  // DND
  // ======================
  const [{ isDragging }, drag] = useDrag(
    () => ({
      type: sourceType,
      item: () => {
        const parentHandle = getParentHandle();
        return { id, sourceType, item, panelId, parentHandle };
      },
      collect: (monitor) => ({
        isDragging: !!monitor.isDragging(),
      }),
      canDrag: isDragMode && isItemSelected,
    }),
    [isDragMode, isItemSelected, id, sourceType, item, panelId, getParentHandle]
  );

  const [{ isOver, canDrop }, drop] = useDrop(
    () => ({
      accept: ['storage', 'drive', 'github', 'terminal'],
      drop: (droppedItem: any, monitor) => {
        if (!monitor.didDrop()) {
          dragDropStore.setTargetPanel(panelId);

          if (onDrop) {
            const operation = dragDropStore.pendingOperation;
            if (operation) {
              onDrop(selectedItems, operation);
            }
          }
        }
      },
      collect: (monitor) => ({
        isOver: !!monitor.isOver(),
        canDrop: !!monitor.canDrop(),
      }),
      canDrop: (droppedItem: any) => {
        return droppedItem.panelId !== panelId;
      },
    }),
    [panelId, dragDropStore, onDrop, selectedItems]
  );

  const setRefs = useCallback(
    (node: HTMLElement | null) => {
      drag(node);
      drop(node);
    },
    [drag, drop]
  );

  return {
    setRef: setRefs,
    isSelected: isItemSelected,
    isDragging: isDragging || dragDropStore.isDragging,
    isOver,
    canDrop,
    isPressed,
    isDragMode,
    toggleSelection,
    handlers: {
      onTouchStart: handleTouchStart,
      onTouchMove: handleTouchMove,
      onTouchEnd: handleTouchEnd,
      onMouseDown: handleMouseDown,
    },
  };
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/DragDrop/useDragDrop.ts.bak
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useDrag, useDrop } from 'react-dnd';
import { useCallback, useRef, useState } from 'react';
import { useDragDropStore, useIsDragMode, useSelectedItems } from '@/stores/dragDropStore';
import { SelectedItem, SourceType } from '@/types/dragDrop';

interface UseDragDropOptions {
  item: any;
  id: string;
  sourceType: SourceType;
  panelId: string;
  onDrop?: (items: SelectedItem[], operation: 'copy' | 'move') => void;
}

export function useDragDrop({ item, id, sourceType, panelId, onDrop }: UseDragDropOptions) {
  const isDragMode = useIsDragMode();
  const selectedItems = useSelectedItems();
  const dragDropStore = useDragDropStore();
  
  const [isSelected, setIsSelected] = useState(false);
  const [isPressed, setIsPressed] = useState(false);
  const longPressTimer = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null);
  const touchStartPos = useRef<{ x: number; y: number } | null>(null);

  // Check if this item is selected
  const isItemSelected = selectedItems.some(
    (si) => si.id === id && si.panelId === panelId
  );

  // Toggle selection
  const toggleSelection = useCallback(() => {
    const selectedItem: SelectedItem = {
      id,
      sourceType,
      item,
      panelId,
    };
    dragDropStore.toggleSelection(selectedItem);
  }, [id, sourceType, item, panelId, dragDropStore]);

  // Long press / touch handlers
  const handleTouchStart = useCallback((e: React.TouchEvent) => {
    const touch = e.touches[0];
    touchStartPos.current = { x: touch.clientX, y: touch.clientY };
    setIsPressed(true);
    
    // Start long press timer
    longPressTimer.current = setTimeout(() => {
      if (!isDragMode) {
        dragDropStore.enterDragMode(panelId);
        toggleSelection();
      }
    }, 500); // 500ms long press
  }, [isDragMode, panelId, dragDropStore, toggleSelection]);

  const handleTouchMove = useCallback((e: React.TouchEvent) => {
    if (!touchStartPos.current) return;
    
    const touch = e.touches[0];
    const deltaX = Math.abs(touch.clientX - touchStartPos.current.x);
    const deltaY = Math.abs(touch.clientY - touchStartPos.current.y);
    
    // Cancel long press if moved too much
    if (deltaX > 10 || deltaY > 10) {
      if (longPressTimer.current) {
        clearTimeout(longPressTimer.current);
        longPressTimer.current = null;
      }
      setIsPressed(false);
    }
    
    // Update drag position if in drag mode
    if (isDragMode && dragDropStore.isDragging) {
      dragDropStore.setDragImagePosition({ x: touch.clientX, y: touch.clientY });
    }
  }, [isDragMode, dragDropStore]);

  const handleTouchEnd = useCallback((e: React.TouchEvent) => {
    if (longPressTimer.current) {
      clearTimeout(longPressTimer.current);
      longPressTimer.current = null;
    }
    setIsPressed(false);
    touchStartPos.current = null;
    
    // If in drag mode and not dragging yet, start drag
    if (isDragMode && !dragDropStore.isDragging && isItemSelected) {
      const touch = e.changedTouches[0];
      dragDropStore.startDrag(panelId, { x: touch.clientX, y: touch.clientY });
    }
  }, [isDragMode, dragDropStore, isItemSelected, panelId]);

  // Mouse handlers for desktop
  const handleMouseDown = useCallback((e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    if (e.button !== 0) return; // Only left click
    
    if (isDragMode) {
      e.preventDefault();
      toggleSelection();
      
      if (!dragDropStore.isDragging && isItemSelected) {
        dragDropStore.startDrag(panelId, { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY });
      }
    }
  }, [isDragMode, dragDropStore, isItemSelected, panelId, toggleSelection]);

  // React DnD setup
  const [{ isDragging }, drag] = useDrag(() => ({
    type: sourceType,
    item: { id, sourceType, item, panelId },
    collect: (monitor) => ({
      isDragging: !!monitor.isDragging(),
    }),
    canDrag: isDragMode && isItemSelected,
  }), [isDragMode, isItemSelected, id, sourceType, item, panelId]);

  const [{ isOver, canDrop }, drop] = useDrop(() => ({
    accept: ['storage', 'drive', 'github', 'terminal'],
    drop: (droppedItem: any, monitor) => {
      if (!monitor.didDrop()) {
        // Show confirm dialog
        dragDropStore.setTargetPanel(panelId);
        // The operation type will be set by the drag overlay buttons
      }
    },
    collect: (monitor) => ({
      isOver: !!monitor.isOver(),
      canDrop: !!monitor.canDrop(),
    }),
    canDrop: (droppedItem: any) => {
      // Don't drop on same panel
      return droppedItem.panelId !== panelId;
    },
  }), [panelId, dragDropStore]);

  // Combine refs
  const setRefs = useCallback((node: HTMLElement | null) => {
    drag(node);
    drop(node);
  }, [drag, drop]);

  return {
    setRef: setRefs,
    isSelected: isItemSelected,
    isDragging: isDragging || dragDropStore.isDragging,
    isOver,
    canDrop,
    isPressed,
    isDragMode,
    toggleSelection,
    handlers: {
      onTouchStart: handleTouchStart,
      onTouchMove: handleTouchMove,
      onTouchEnd: handleTouchEnd,
      onMouseDown: handleMouseDown,
    },
  };
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/FileManager/CreateFolderDialog.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState } from 'react';
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogContent,
  DialogDescription,
  DialogFooter,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogTitle,
} from "@/components/ui/dialog";
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { fileSystemBackend } from '@/lib/fileSystemBackend';

interface CreateFolderDialogProps {
  open: boolean;
  onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void;
  panelId: string;
}

export function CreateFolderDialog({ open, onOpenChange, panelId }: CreateFolderDialogProps) {
  const [folderName, setFolderName] = useState('');
  const [isCreating, setIsCreating] = useState(false);
  const panel = usePanelStore((s) => s.getPanel(panelId));

  const handleCreate = async () => {
    if (!folderName.trim() || !panel?.handle) return;
    
    setIsCreating(true);
    try {
      await fileSystemBackend.createDirectory(panel.handle, folderName.trim());
      // Refresh will happen via parent component
      onOpenChange(false);
      setFolderName('');
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to create folder:', err);
    } finally {
      setIsCreating(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <Dialog open={open} onOpenChange={onOpenChange}>
      <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-md">
        <DialogHeader>
          <DialogTitle>Create New Folder</DialogTitle>
          <DialogDescription>
            Enter a name for the new folder.
          </DialogDescription>
        </DialogHeader>
        
        <div className="py-4">
          <Input
            placeholder="Folder name"
            value={folderName}
            onChange={(e) => setFolderName(e.target.value)}
            onKeyDown={(e) => {
              if (e.key === 'Enter') handleCreate();
            }}
            autoFocus
          />
        </div>

        <DialogFooter>
          <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => onOpenChange(false)}>
            Cancel
          </Button>
          <Button 
            onClick={handleCreate} 
            disabled={!folderName.trim() || isCreating}
          >
            {isCreating ? 'Creating...' : 'Create'}
          </Button>
        </DialogFooter>
      </DialogContent>
    </Dialog>
  );
}
