FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/FileManager/FileGrid.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { FileSystemEntry, FileSystemDirectoryEntry } from '@/types/filesystem';
import { File, FolderOpen, Pencil, Home } from 'lucide-react';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';
import { DragDropItem } from '../DragDrop/DragDropItem';
import { InlineRenameInput } from '../Rename/InlineRenameInput';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { useState } from 'react';

interface FileGridProps {
  entries: FileSystemEntry[];
  onNavigate: (entry: FileSystemDirectoryEntry) => void;
  panelId: string;
}

export function FileGrid({ entries, onNavigate, panelId }: FileGridProps) {
  const [renamingId, setRenamingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const setPanelSource = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelSource);
  const setPanelPath = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelPath);
  const setPanelHandle = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelHandle);
  const panel = usePanelStore((s) => s.getPanel(panelId));

  const handleClick = (entry: FileSystemEntry) => {
    if (renamingId) return;
    if (entry.kind === 'directory') {
      onNavigate(entry as FileSystemDirectoryEntry);
    }
  };

  const startRename = (entry: FileSystemEntry, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    e.stopPropagation();
    setRenamingId(entry.name);
  };

  const handleRenameComplete = () => {
    setRenamingId(null);
  };

  const handleDoubleClickHome = () => {
    // Double-click on any folder icon goes to top-level root for the current source
    if (panel) {
      if (panel.source === 'storage') {
        setPanelHandle(panelId, null);
        setPanelPath(panelId, '/');
      } else if (panel.source === 'drive') {
        setPanelPath(panelId, '/');
        // Also clear active account? No, stay in account list view
      } else if (panel.source === 'github') {
        setPanelPath(panelId, '/');
      } else if (panel.source === 'terminal') {
        // For terminal, root is '/'
        setPanelPath(panelId, '/');
      }
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-3 p-3">
      {entries.map((entry) => {
        const isRenaming = renamingId === entry.name;
        
        return (
          <DragDropItem
            key={entry.name}
            item={entry}
            id={entry.name}
            sourceType="storage"
            panelId={panelId}
            className="group flex flex-col items-center p-4 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent transition-all text-left relative"
          >
            {isRenaming ? (
              <div className="w-full">
                <InlineRenameInput
                  item={{
                    id: entry.name,
                    name: entry.name,
                    path: entry.handle?.name || entry.name,
                    sourceType: 'storage',
                    panelId,
                    handle: entry.handle,
                    isDirectory: entry.kind === 'directory',
                  }}
                  onComplete={handleRenameComplete}
                />
              </div>
            ) : (
              <>
                {/* Rename button */}
                <button
                  onClick={(e) => startRename(entry, e)}
                  className="absolute top-2 right-2 p-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:bg-accent rounded transition-opacity"
                >
                  <Pencil className="w-3 h-3 text-muted-foreground" />
                </button>

                {/* Double-click home indicator */}
                <div className="absolute top-2 left-2 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100">
                  <Home className="w-3 h-3 text-muted-foreground" />
                </div>

                <div 
                  className="mb-2 text-primary group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform"
                  onClick={() => handleClick(entry)}
                  onDoubleClick={handleDoubleClickHome}
                >
                  {entry.kind === 'directory' ? (
                    <FolderOpen className="w-10 h-10" />
                  ) : (
                    <File className="w-10 h-10" />
                  )}
                </div>
                
                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground truncate w-full text-center" title={entry.name}>
                  {entry.name}
                </p>
                <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">
                  {entry.kind === 'file' ? formatFileSize(entry.size) : 'Folder'}
                </p>
                <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                  {formatDistanceToNow(entry.lastModified, { addSuffix: true })}
                </p>
              </>
            )}
          </DragDropItem>
        );
      })}
    </div>
  );
}

function formatFileSize(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '-';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB', 'TB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/FileManager/Toolbar.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { 
  Grid3X3, 
  List, 
  ArrowLeft, 
  RefreshCw,
  ChevronDown,
  ArrowUpDown,
  Settings2
} from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Toggle } from '@/components/ui/toggle';
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
  DropdownMenuSeparator,
  DropdownMenuSub,
  DropdownMenuSubTrigger,
  DropdownMenuSubContent,
} from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
import { ViewMode, SortBy } from '@/types/filesystem';
import { PlusButton } from './PlusButton';
import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';
import { PanelDialog } from '@/components/ui/PanelDialog';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';

interface ToolbarProps {
  viewMode: ViewMode;
  onViewModeChange: (mode: ViewMode) => void;
  sortBy: SortBy;
  onSortChange: (sort: SortBy) => void;
  onNavigateBack: () => void;
  onRefresh: () => void;
  canGoBack: boolean;
  isLoading: boolean;
  currentPath: string;
  panelId: string;
  sourceType: 'storage' | 'drive' | 'github' | 'terminal';
  panelHandle?: any;
  accountId?: string;
  onRefreshComplete?: () => void;
  sortingScope?: 'current' | 'full';
  onSortingScopeChange?: (scope: 'current' | 'full') => void;
}

const sortLabels: Record<SortBy, string> = {
  'name-asc': 'Name (A-Z)',
  'name-desc': 'Name (Z-A)',
  'date': 'Date Modified',
  'size': 'Size',
};

export function Toolbar({ 
  viewMode, 
  onViewModeChange, 
  sortBy, 
  onSortChange,
  onNavigateBack,
  onRefresh,
  canGoBack,
  isLoading,
  currentPath,
  panelId,
  sourceType,
  panelHandle,
  accountId,
  onRefreshComplete,
  sortingScope = 'current',
  onSortingScopeChange,
}: ToolbarProps) {
  const [showAutoRefreshDialog, setShowAutoRefreshDialog] = useState(false);
  const [autoRefreshInterval, setAutoRefreshInterval] = useState<number | null>(null);
  const [autoRefreshSeconds, setAutoRefreshSeconds] = useState(30);
  const longPressTimer = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null);

  // Clear auto-refresh on unmount
  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      if (autoRefreshInterval) clearInterval(autoRefreshInterval);
    };
  }, [autoRefreshInterval]);

  const handleRefreshLongPress = () => {
    setShowAutoRefreshDialog(true);
  };

  const startAutoRefresh = () => {
    if (autoRefreshInterval) clearInterval(autoRefreshInterval);
    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      onRefresh();
      onRefreshComplete?.();
    }, autoRefreshSeconds * 1000);
    setAutoRefreshInterval(interval);
    setShowAutoRefreshDialog(false);
  };

  const stopAutoRefresh = () => {
    if (autoRefreshInterval) {
      clearInterval(autoRefreshInterval);
      setAutoRefreshInterval(null);
    }
  };

  const handleRefreshClick = () => {
    onRefresh();
    onRefreshComplete?.();
  };

  const handleMouseDown = () => {
    longPressTimer.current = setTimeout(() => {
      handleRefreshLongPress();
    }, 500);
  };

  const handleMouseUp = () => {
    if (longPressTimer.current) {
      clearTimeout(longPressTimer.current);
      longPressTimer.current = null;
    }
  };

  const handleSortChangeWithScope = (sort: SortBy) => {
    onSortChange(sort);
    // If scope is 'full', we need to save the sorting preference globally for this panel
    if (sortingScope === 'full') {
      localStorage.setItem(`sort_${panelId}`, sort);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-b border-border bg-card">
      {/* Left: Navigation */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 min-w-0">
        <Button
          variant="outline"
          size="icon"
          onClick={onNavigateBack}
          disabled={!canGoBack}
          className="h-8 w-8 shrink-0"
        >
          <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4" />
        </Button>
        
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 ml-2 min-w-0">
          <span className="text-xs font-medium text-foreground truncate">
            {currentPath === '/' ? 'Root' : currentPath}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Right: Actions */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 shrink-0">
        {/* Context-aware Plus Button */}
        <PlusButton
          panelId={panelId}
          sourceType={sourceType}
          currentPath={currentPath}
          isRoot={currentPath === '/'}
          handle={panelHandle}
          accountId={accountId}
          onSuccess={() => {
            onRefresh();
            onRefreshComplete?.();
          }}
        />

        {/* Refresh button with long-press for auto-refresh */}
        <Button
          variant="ghost"
          size="icon"
          onClick={handleRefreshClick}
          onMouseDown={handleMouseDown}
          onMouseUp={handleMouseUp}
          onTouchStart={handleMouseDown}
          onTouchEnd={handleMouseUp}
          disabled={isLoading}
          className="h-8 w-8 relative"
          title={autoRefreshInterval ? `Auto-refresh every ${autoRefreshSeconds}s (click to refresh now, long press to stop)` : 'Refresh (long press for auto-refresh)'}
        >
          <RefreshCw className={`h-4 w-4 ${isLoading ? 'animate-spin' : ''}`} />
          {autoRefreshInterval && (
            <span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-2 h-2 bg-green-500 rounded-full" />
          )}
        </Button>

        {/* Sorting dropdown with scope selector */}
        <DropdownMenu>
          <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
            <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-8 w-8">
              <ArrowUpDown className="h-4 w-4" />
            </Button>
          </DropdownMenuTrigger>
          <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleSortChangeWithScope('name-asc')}>
              Name (A-Z)
            </DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleSortChangeWithScope('name-desc')}>
              Name (Z-A)
            </DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleSortChangeWithScope('date')}>
              Date Modified
            </DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleSortChangeWithScope('size')}>
              Size
            </DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuSeparator />
            <DropdownMenuSub>
              <DropdownMenuSubTrigger>
                <Settings2 className="w-3 h-3 mr-2" />
                Sorting Scope
              </DropdownMenuSubTrigger>
              <DropdownMenuSubContent>
                <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortingScopeChange?.('current')}>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between w-full">
                    <span>Current folder only</span>
                    {sortingScope === 'current' && <span className="text-primary ml-2">✓</span>}
                  </div>
                </DropdownMenuItem>
                <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortingScopeChange?.('full')}>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between w-full">
                    <span>Full panel (persistent)</span>
                    {sortingScope === 'full' && <span className="text-primary ml-2">✓</span>}
                  </div>
                </DropdownMenuItem>
              </DropdownMenuSubContent>
            </DropdownMenuSub>
          </DropdownMenuContent>
        </DropdownMenu>

        {/* View mode toggle */}
        <div className="flex items-center border rounded-md ml-1">
          <Toggle
            pressed={viewMode === 'grid'}
            onPressedChange={() => onViewModeChange('grid')}
            className="h-8 w-8 rounded-none rounded-l-md data-[state=on]:bg-primary data-[state=on]:text-primary-foreground"
            aria-label="Grid view"
          >
            <Grid3X3 className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Toggle>
          <Toggle
            pressed={viewMode === 'list'}
            onPressedChange={() => onViewModeChange('list')}
            className="h-8 w-8 rounded-none rounded-r-md data-[state=on]:bg-primary data-[state=on]:text-primary-foreground"
            aria-label="List view"
          >
            <List className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Toggle>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Auto-refresh dialog */}
      <PanelDialog
        isOpen={showAutoRefreshDialog}
        onClose={() => setShowAutoRefreshDialog(false)}
        panelId={panelId}
        title="Auto Refresh"
      >
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <p className="text-sm">Set automatic refresh interval</p>
          <div>
            <Label>Interval (seconds)</Label>
            <Input
              type="number"
              value={autoRefreshSeconds}
              onChange={(e) => setAutoRefreshSeconds(Math.max(5, Number(e.target.value)))}
              min={5}
              max={3600}
              className="mt-1"
            />
          </div>
          <div className="flex gap-2">
            {autoRefreshInterval ? (
              <Button variant="destructive" onClick={stopAutoRefresh} className="flex-1">
                Stop Auto-Refresh
              </Button>
            ) : (
              <Button onClick={startAutoRefresh} className="flex-1">
                Start Auto-Refresh
              </Button>
            )}
            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setShowAutoRefreshDialog(false)}>
              Cancel
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </PanelDialog>
    </div>
  );
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Toolbar } from './Toolbar';
import { FileGrid } from './FileGrid';
import { FileList } from './FileList';
import { CreateFolderDialog } from './CreateFolderDialog';
import { MountPointsView } from './MountPointsView';
import { useFileSystemStore, useEntries, useViewMode, useSortBy, useCurrentHandle } from '@/stores/fileSystemStore';
import { ViewMode, SortBy } from '@/types/filesystem';

export function FileManager() {
  const [createDialogOpen, setCreateDialogOpen] = useState(false);
  
  const entries = useEntries();
  const viewMode = useViewMode();
  const sortBy = useSortBy();
  const currentHandle = useCurrentHandle();
  const setViewMode = useFileSystemStore((s) => s.setViewMode);
  const setSortBy = useFileSystemStore((s) => s.setSortBy);
  const initMountPoints = useFileSystemStore((s) => s.initMountPoints);

  useEffect(() => {
    initMountPoints();
  }, [initMountPoints]);

  const handleViewModeChange = (mode: ViewMode) => {
    setViewMode(mode);
  };

  const handleSortChange = (sort: SortBy) => {
    setSortBy(sort);
  };

  // If no directory is selected, show mount points
  if (!currentHandle) {
    return (
      <div className="h-full flex flex-col bg-background">
        <MountPointsView />
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col bg-background">
      <Toolbar
        viewMode={viewMode}
        onViewModeChange={handleViewModeChange}
        sortBy={sortBy}
        onSortChange={handleSortChange}
        onCreateFolder={() => setCreateDialogOpen(true)}
      />
      
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto">
        {entries.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground">
            <p className="text-lg font-medium">Empty folder</p>
            <p className="text-sm">Create a new folder to get started</p>
          </div>
        ) : viewMode === 'grid' ? (
          <FileGrid entries={entries} />
        ) : (
          <FileList entries={entries} />
        )}
      </div>

      <CreateFolderDialog 
        open={createDialogOpen} 
        onOpenChange={setCreateDialogOpen} 
      />
    </div>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/FileManager/PlusButton.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState } from 'react';
import { Plus, FolderPlus, FilePlus, UserPlus } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { PanelDialog } from '@/components/ui/PanelDialog';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { fileSystemBackend } from '@/lib/fileSystemBackend';
import { webcontainerApi } from '@/lib/webcontainerApi';
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useGitHubStore } from '@/stores/githubStore';

interface PlusButtonProps {
  panelId: string;
  sourceType: 'storage' | 'drive' | 'github' | 'terminal';
  currentPath: string;
  isRoot: boolean; // true if at root level (account list for drive/github, mounts for storage)
  handle?: any; // For storage
  accountId?: string; // For drive/github (active account)
  onSuccess?: () => void;
}

interface ActionOption {
  type: 'folder' | 'file' | 'addAccount';
  label: string;
  icon: React.ElementType;
  allowed: boolean;
}

export function PlusButton({ panelId, sourceType, currentPath, isRoot, handle, accountId, onSuccess }: PlusButtonProps) {
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
  const [actionType, setActionType] = useState<'folder' | 'file' | 'addAccount' | null>(null);
  const [name, setName] = useState('');
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState('');

  const getOptions = (): ActionOption[] => {
    const options: ActionOption[] = [];

    // Root level: Drive or GitHub can add account
    if (isRoot && (sourceType === 'drive' || sourceType === 'github')) {
      options.push({ type: 'addAccount', label: 'Add Account', icon: UserPlus, allowed: true });
    }

    // Non-root: creation options based on source and permissions
    if (!isRoot) {
      // Storage: always allow if handle exists
      if (sourceType === 'storage' && handle) {
        options.push({ type: 'folder', label: 'Create Folder', icon: FolderPlus, allowed: true });
        options.push({ type: 'file', label: 'Create File', icon: FilePlus, allowed: true });
      }
      // Drive: inside folder, allow folder creation
      if (sourceType === 'drive' && accountId && !isRoot) {
        options.push({ type: 'folder', label: 'Create Folder', icon: FolderPlus, allowed: true });
      }
      // GitHub: inside repo, allow folder and file creation
      if (sourceType === 'github' && accountId && !isRoot) {
        options.push({ type: 'folder', label: 'Create Folder', icon: FolderPlus, allowed: true });
        options.push({ type: 'file', label: 'Create File', icon: FilePlus, allowed: true });
      }
      // Terminal: allow folder and file (WebContainer allows write)
      if (sourceType === 'terminal') {
        options.push({ type: 'folder', label: 'Create Folder', icon: FolderPlus, allowed: true });
        options.push({ type: 'file', label: 'Create File', icon: FilePlus, allowed: true });
      }
    }

    return options;
  };

  const options = getOptions();
  const allowedOptions = options.filter(opt => opt.allowed);
  if (allowedOptions.length === 0) return null;

  const handleActionClick = (type: 'folder' | 'file' | 'addAccount') => {
    if (type === 'addAccount') {
      executeAddAccount();
    } else {
      setActionType(type);
      setIsOpen(true);
    }
  };

  const executeAddAccount = async () => {
    if (sourceType === 'drive') {
      // Trigger Google OAuth login (will add account via store)
      const { login } = useGoogleDriveAuth();
      await login();
      onSuccess?.();
    } else if (sourceType === 'github') {
      // Open inline form for username/token
      const username = prompt('GitHub username:');
      const token = prompt('Personal Access Token (needs repo and read:user scopes):');
      if (username && token) {
        try {
          await useGitHubStore.getState().addAccount(username, token);
          onSuccess?.();
        } catch (err) {
          alert('Failed to add account: ' + (err as Error).message);
        }
      }
    }
  };

  const handleCreate = async () => {
    if (!name.trim()) {
      setError('Name is required');
      return;
    }
    setIsLoading(true);
    setError('');
    try {
      if (sourceType === 'storage' && handle) {
        if (actionType === 'folder') {
          await fileSystemBackend.createDirectory(handle, name.trim());
        } else {
          const emptyBlob = new Blob([''], { type: 'text/plain' });
          await fileSystemBackend.writeFile(handle, name.trim(), emptyBlob);
        }
      } else if (sourceType === 'drive' && accountId) {
        const account = useDriveStore.getState().accounts.find(a => a.id === accountId);
        if (account) {
          const parentId = currentPath === '/' ? 'root' : currentPath.split('/').pop();
          await createDriveFolder(account.accessToken, parentId || 'root', name.trim());
        }
      } else if (sourceType === 'github' && accountId) {
        const account = useGitHubStore.getState().accounts.find(a => a.id === accountId);
        if (account) {
          await createGitHubItem(account.token, accountId, currentPath, name.trim(), actionType === 'folder');
        }
      } else if (sourceType === 'terminal') {
        const terminal = webcontainerApi.getInstance();
        if (terminal) {
          const fullPath = currentPath === '/' ? `/${name.trim()}` : `${currentPath}/${name.trim()}`;
          if (actionType === 'folder') {
            await terminal.fs.mkdir(fullPath);
          } else {
            await terminal.fs.writeFile(fullPath, '');
          }
        }
      }
      setIsOpen(false);
      setName('');
      setActionType(null);
      onSuccess?.();
    } catch (err) {
      setError((err as Error).message);
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  // Show single button if only one option, otherwise dropdown
  const showMenu = allowedOptions.length > 1;

  if (!showMenu) {
    const opt = allowedOptions[0];
    return (
      <>
        <Button
          variant="ghost"
          size="icon"
          className="h-8 w-8"
          onClick={() => handleActionClick(opt.type)}
          title={opt.label}
        >
          <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
        </Button>
        <CreationDialog
          isOpen={isOpen}
          onClose={() => setIsOpen(false)}
          type={actionType}
          name={name}
          setName={setName}
          isLoading={isLoading}
          error={error}
          onCreate={handleCreate}
        />
      </>
    );
  }

  return (
    <>
      <div className="relative group">
        <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-8 w-8">
          <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
        </Button>
        <div className="absolute right-0 bottom-full mb-1 hidden group-hover:block bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-lg z-20 min-w-[140px]">
          {allowedOptions.map(opt => (
            <button
              key={opt.type}
              onClick={() => handleActionClick(opt.type)}
              className="w-full px-3 py-2 text-left text-sm hover:bg-accent flex items-center gap-2"
            >
              <opt.icon className="w-4 h-4" />
              {opt.label}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
      <CreationDialog
        isOpen={isOpen}
        onClose={() => setIsOpen(false)}
        type={actionType}
        name={name}
        setName={setName}
        isLoading={isLoading}
        error={error}
        onCreate={handleCreate}
      />
    </>
  );
}

// Helper dialog component
function CreationDialog({ isOpen, onClose, type, name, setName, isLoading, error, onCreate }: any) {
  if (!isOpen || !type) return null;
  const title = type === 'folder' ? 'Create Folder' : 'Create File';
  const placeholder = type === 'folder' ? 'Folder name' : 'File name (with extension)';
  return (
    <PanelDialog isOpen={isOpen} onClose={onClose} panelId="current" title={title}>
      <div className="space-y-3">
        <div>
          <Label>{placeholder}</Label>
          <Input
            value={name}
            onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)}
            placeholder={type === 'folder' ? 'MyFolder' : 'file.txt'}
            autoFocus
            onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && onCreate()}
          />
        </div>
        {error && <p className="text-sm text-destructive">{error}</p>}
        <div className="flex gap-2 justify-end">
          <Button variant="outline" onClick={onClose} disabled={isLoading}>Cancel</Button>
          <Button onClick={onCreate} disabled={isLoading}>
            {isLoading ? 'Creating...' : 'Create'}
          </Button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </PanelDialog>
  );
}

// Helper for Drive folder creation
async function createDriveFolder(accessToken: string, parentId: string, name: string) {
  const metadata = {
    name,
    mimeType: 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder',
    parents: [parentId],
  };
  const res = await fetch('https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files', {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: {
      Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}`,
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    },
    body: JSON.stringify(metadata),
  });
  if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to create Drive folder');
}

// Helper for GitHub item creation
async function createGitHubItem(token: string, owner: string, path: string, name: string, isFolder: boolean) {
  const octokit = new (await import('@octokit/rest')).Octokit({ auth: token });
  // Extract repo from path (format: /github/username/repo/path...)
  const parts = path.split('/').filter(Boolean);
  const repo = parts[1]; // after /github/username/
  const repoPath = parts.slice(2).join('/');
  const fullPath = repoPath ? `${repoPath}/${name}` : name;
  if (isFolder) {
    await octokit.repos.createOrUpdateFileContents({
      owner,
      repo,
      path: `${fullPath}/.gitkeep`,
      message: `Create folder ${name}`,
      content: Buffer.from('').toString('base64'),
    });
  } else {
    await octokit.repos.createOrUpdateFileContents({
      owner,
      repo,
      path: fullPath,
      message: `Create file ${name}`,
      content: Buffer.from('').toString('base64'),
    });
  }
}

import { useGoogleDriveAuth } from '@/components/GoogleDrive/GoogleDriveProvider';

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/FileManager/FileGrid.tsx.bak
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { FileSystemEntry, FileSystemDirectoryEntry } from '@/types/filesystem';
import { File, FolderOpen, Pencil } from 'lucide-react';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';
import { DragDropItem } from '../DragDrop/DragDropItem';
import { InlineRenameInput } from '../Rename/InlineRenameInput';
import { useRenameStore } from '@/stores/renameStore';
import { useState } from 'react';

interface FileGridProps {
  entries: FileSystemEntry[];
  onNavigate: (entry: FileSystemDirectoryEntry) => void;
  panelId: string;
}

export function FileGrid({ entries, onNavigate, panelId }: FileGridProps) {
  const [renamingId, setRenamingId] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const handleClick = (entry: FileSystemEntry) => {
    if (renamingId) return;
    
    if (entry.kind === 'directory') {
      onNavigate(entry as FileSystemDirectoryEntry);
    }
  };

  const startRename = (entry: FileSystemEntry, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    e.stopPropagation();
    setRenamingId(entry.name);
  };

  const handleRenameComplete = () => {
    setRenamingId(null);
  };

  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-3 p-3">
      {entries.map((entry) => {
        const isRenaming = renamingId === entry.name;
        
        return (
          <DragDropItem
            key={entry.name}
            item={entry}
            id={entry.name}
            sourceType="storage"
            panelId={panelId}
            className="group flex flex-col items-center p-4 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent transition-all text-left relative"
          >
            {isRenaming ? (
              <div className="w-full">
                <InlineRenameInput
                  item={{
                    id: entry.name,
                    name: entry.name,
                    path: entry.handle?.name || entry.name,
                    sourceType: 'storage',
                    panelId,
                    handle: entry.handle,
                  }}
                  onComplete={handleRenameComplete}
                />
              </div>
            ) : (
              <>
                {/* Rename button */}
                <button
                  onClick={(e) => startRename(entry, e)}
                  className="absolute top-2 right-2 p-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:bg-accent rounded transition-opacity"
                >
                  <Pencil className="w-3 h-3 text-muted-foreground" />
                </button>

                <div 
                  className="mb-2 text-primary group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform"
                  onClick={() => handleClick(entry)}
                >
                  {entry.kind === 'directory' ? (
                    <FolderOpen className="w-10 h-10" />
                  ) : (
                    <File className="w-10 h-10" />
                  )}
                </div>
                
                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground truncate w-full text-center" title={entry.name}>
                  {entry.name}
                </p>
                <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">
                  {entry.kind === 'file' ? formatFileSize(entry.size) : 'Folder'}
                </p>
                <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                  {formatDistanceToNow(entry.lastModified, { addSuffix: true })}
                </p>
              </>
            )}
          </DragDropItem>
        );
      })}
    </div>
  );
}

function formatFileSize(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '-';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB', 'TB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}

import { useState } from 'react';
import { Github, Plus, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { useGitHubStore, useGitHubAccounts } from '@/stores/githubStore';

export function AccountSelector() {
  const accounts = useGitHubAccounts();
  const addAccount = useGitHubStore((s) => s.addAccount);
  const setActiveAccount = useGitHubStore((s) => s.setActiveAccount);
  const removeAccount = useGitHubStore((s) => s.removeAccount);
  const [showAddForm, setShowAddForm] = useState(false);
  const [username, setUsername] = useState('');
  const [token, setToken] = useState('');
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState('');

  const handleAddAccount = async () => {
    if (!username.trim() || !token.trim()) {
      setError('Username and token are required');
      return;
    }
    setIsLoading(true);
    setError('');
    try {
      await addAccount(username.trim(), token.trim());
      setShowAddForm(false);
      setUsername('');
      setToken('');
    } catch (err) {
      setError((err as Error).message);
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 bg-background">
      <div className="w-full max-w-md">
        <div className="text-center mb-6">
          <Github className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto text-primary mb-2" />
          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold">GitHub Accounts</h2>
          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Connect your GitHub account to browse repositories</p>
        </div>

        {accounts.length > 0 && (
          <div className="space-y-2 mb-4">
            {accounts.map((account) => (
              <div
                key={account.id}
                className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-lg border border-border hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer"
                onClick={() => setActiveAccount(account.id)}
              >
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  {account.avatarUrl ? (
                    <img src={account.avatarUrl} alt={account.id} className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full" />
                  ) : (
                    <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-primary/10 flex items-center justify-center">
                      <Github className="w-4 h-4" />
                    </div>
                  )}
                  <div>
                    <p className="font-medium">{account.id}</p>
                    <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground capitalize">{account.permissions}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <Button
                  variant="ghost"
                  size="icon"
                  className="h-7 w-7"
                  onClick={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    removeAccount(account.id);
                  }}
                >
                  <X className="w-3 h-3" />
                </Button>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}

        {showAddForm ? (
          <div className="border border-border rounded-lg p-4 space-y-3">
            <div>
              <Label>GitHub Username</Label>
              <Input
                value={username}
                onChange={(e) => setUsername(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="username"
              />
            </div>
            <div>
              <Label>Personal Access Token</Label>
              <Input
                type="password"
                value={token}
                onChange={(e) => setToken(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="ghp_..."
              />
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">
                Needs <code className="text-xs">repo</code> and <code className="text-xs">read:user</code> scopes
              </p>
            </div>
            {error && <p className="text-sm text-destructive">{error}</p>}
            <div className="flex gap-2">
              <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setShowAddForm(false)}>Cancel</Button>
              <Button onClick={handleAddAccount} disabled={isLoading}>
                {isLoading ? 'Connecting...' : 'Connect'}
              </Button>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <Button variant="outline" className="w-full" onClick={() => setShowAddForm(true)}>
            <Plus className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
            Add GitHub Account
          </Button>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

import { GitHubContent } from '@/types/github';
import { Folder, File, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';
import { DFOLMenu } from '../DFOL/DFOLMenu';
import { TreeIconButton } from '../Tree/TreeIconButton';

interface ContentListProps {
  contents: GitHubContent[];
  onFileClick?: (file: GitHubContent) => void;
  onFolderClick?: (folder: GitHubContent) => void;
}

export function ContentList({ contents, onFileClick, onFolderClick }: ContentListProps) {
  const handleClick = (item: GitHubContent) => {
    if (item.type === 'dir') {
      onFolderClick?.(item);
    } else {
      onFileClick?.(item);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="divide-y divide-border">
      {contents.map((item) => (
        <div
          key={item.path}
          className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2 hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer group"
          onClick={() => handleClick(item)}
        >
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 flex-1 min-w-0">
            {item.type === 'dir' ? (
              <Folder className="w-5 h-5 text-primary shrink-0" />
            ) : (
              <File className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground shrink-0" />
            )}
            <span className="text-sm font-medium truncate">{item.name}</span>
            {item.type === 'file' && (
              <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground shrink-0">
                {formatBytes(item.size)}
              </span>
            )}
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
            <TreeIconButton
              item={item}
              sourceType="github"
              panelId="github-panel"
              className="h-7 w-7 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity"
            />
            <DFOLMenu
              item={item}
              sourceType="github"
              panelId="github-panel"
              onRename={() => {}}
              onDelete={() => {}}
              onTreeView={() => {}}
            />
            <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity" />
          </div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '-';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}

import { useGitHubStore, useGitHubFileContent, useGitHubFileName } from '@/stores/githubStore';
import { X, FileText } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';

export function FileViewer() {
  const fileContent = useGitHubFileContent();
  const fileName = useGitHubFileName();
  const closeFile = useGitHubStore((s) => s.closeFile);

  if (!fileContent || !fileName) return null;

  const isText = fileName.match(/\.(txt|js|ts|jsx|tsx|json|md|css|html|xml|sh|py|rb|go|java|c|cpp|h|hpp|yml|yaml)$/i);

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col border-l border-border bg-card">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-b border-border">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <FileText className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
          <span className="text-sm font-medium truncate">{fileName}</span>
        </div>
        <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-7 w-7" onClick={closeFile}>
          <X className="w-4 h-4" />
        </Button>
      </div>

      <ScrollArea className="flex-1 p-4">
        {isText ? (
          <pre className="text-sm font-mono whitespace-pre-wrap break-words">
            {fileContent}
          </pre>
        ) : (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground">
            <FileText className="w-12 h-12 mb-2 opacity-50" />
            <p className="text-sm">Preview not available for binary files</p>
          </div>
        )}
      </ScrollArea>
    </div>
  );
}

import { useEffect } from 'react';
import { AccountSelector } from './AccountSelector';
import { GitHubToolbar } from './GitHubToolbar';
import { RepoList } from './RepoList';
import { ContentList } from './ContentList';
import { FileViewer } from './FileViewer';
import { useGitHubStore, useGitHubRepositories, useGitHubContents, useGitHubViewMode, useGitHubSortBy, useGitHubActiveAccount, useGitHubCurrentRepo, useGitHubFileContent, useGitHubError } from '@/stores/githubStore';

function GitHubPanelContent() {
  const repos = useGitHubRepositories();
  const contents = useGitHubContents();
  const viewMode = useGitHubViewMode();
  const sortBy = useGitHubSortBy();
  const activeAccount = useGitHubActiveAccount();
  const currentRepo = useGitHubCurrentRepo();
  const fileContent = useGitHubFileContent();
  const error = useGitHubError();
  
  const {
    setViewMode,
    setSortBy,
    navigateBack,
    refreshCurrent,
    navigateToRoot,
    setActiveAccount,
    loadAccounts,
  } = useGitHubStore();

  // Load accounts on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    loadAccounts();
  }, [loadAccounts]);

  const handleBackToAccounts = () => {
    setActiveAccount(null);
  };

  // Show account selector if no active account
  if (!activeAccount) {
    return <AccountSelector />;
  }

  const currentView = currentRepo ? 'contents' : 'repos';

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col bg-background">
      <GitHubToolbar
        viewMode={viewMode}
        onViewModeChange={setViewMode}
        sortBy={sortBy}
        onSortChange={setSortBy}
        onNavigateBack={navigateBack}
        onRefresh={refreshCurrent}
        onLogout={handleBackToAccounts}
        currentView={currentView}
      />

      {error && (
        <div className="p-3 bg-destructive/10 text-destructive text-sm text-center">
          {error}
          <button 
            onClick={refreshCurrent}
            className="ml-2 underline hover:no-underline"
          >
            Retry
          </button>
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto flex">
        <div className={`flex-1 ${fileContent ? 'hidden md:block md:w-1/2' : 'w-full'}`}>
          {currentView === 'repos' ? (
            repos.length === 0 ? (
              <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground">
                <p className="text-sm">No repositories found</p>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <RepoList repos={repos} />
            )
          ) : (
            contents.length === 0 ? (
              <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground">
                <p className="text-sm">Empty folder</p>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <ContentList contents={contents} />
            )
          )}
        </div>

        {/* File Viewer - shows when file is selected */}
        {fileContent && (
          <div className="w-full md:w-1/2 h-full">
            <FileViewer />
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export function GitHubPanel() {
  return <GitHubPanelContent />;
}

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/GitHub/GitHubToolbar.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { Grid3X3, List, ArrowLeft, RefreshCw, ArrowUpDown, LogOut } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Toggle } from '@/components/ui/toggle';
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
} from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
import { GitHubViewMode, GitHubSortBy } from '@/types/github';

interface GitHubToolbarProps {
  viewMode: GitHubViewMode;
  onViewModeChange: (mode: GitHubViewMode) => void;
  sortBy: GitHubSortBy;
  onSortChange: (sort: GitHubSortBy) => void;
  onNavigateBack: () => void;
  onRefresh: () => void;
  onLogout: () => void;
  currentView: 'repos' | 'contents';
}

export function GitHubToolbar({
  viewMode,
  onViewModeChange,
  sortBy,
  onSortChange,
  onNavigateBack,
  onRefresh,
  onLogout,
  currentView,
}: GitHubToolbarProps) {
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-b border-border bg-card">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        {currentView === 'contents' && (
          <Button variant="outline" size="icon" onClick={onNavigateBack} className="h-8 w-8">
            <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Button>
        )}
        <Button variant="outline" size="icon" onClick={onRefresh} className="h-8 w-8">
          <RefreshCw className="h-4 w-4" />
        </Button>
      </div>

      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <DropdownMenu>
          <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
            <Button variant="outline" size="icon" className="h-8 w-8">
              <ArrowUpDown className="h-4 w-4" />
            </Button>
          </DropdownMenuTrigger>
          <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('name-asc')}>Name (A-Z)</DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('name-desc')}>Name (Z-A)</DropdownMenuItem>
            {currentView === 'repos' && (
              <>
                <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('updated')}>Recently Updated</DropdownMenuItem>
                <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('stars')}>Stars</DropdownMenuItem>
              </>
            )}
            {currentView === 'contents' && (
              <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('size')}>Size</DropdownMenuItem>
            )}
          </DropdownMenuContent>
        </DropdownMenu>

        <div className="flex items-center border rounded-md">
          <Toggle
            pressed={viewMode === 'grid'}
            onPressedChange={() => onViewModeChange('grid')}
            className="h-8 w-8 rounded-none rounded-l-md data-[state=on]:bg-primary data-[state=on]:text-primary-foreground"
          >
            <Grid3X3 className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Toggle>
          <Toggle
            pressed={viewMode === 'list'}
            onPressedChange={() => onViewModeChange('list')}
            className="h-8 w-8 rounded-none rounded-r-md data-[state=on]:bg-primary data-[state=on]:text-primary-foreground"
          >
            <List className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Toggle>
        </div>

        <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={onLogout} className="h-8 w-8" title="Switch Account">
          <LogOut className="h-4 w-4" />
        </Button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

import { GitHubRepository } from '@/types/github';
import { Star, Clock, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';

interface RepoListProps {
  repos: GitHubRepository[];
  onRepoClick?: (repo: GitHubRepository) => void;
}

export function RepoList({ repos, onRepoClick }: RepoListProps) {
  return (
    <div className="divide-y divide-border">
      {repos.map((repo) => (
        <div
          key={repo.id}
          className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer group"
          onClick={() => onRepoClick?.(repo)}
        >
          <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <span className="font-medium text-sm truncate">{repo.name}</span>
              {repo.private && (
                <span className="text-xs bg-muted px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">Private</span>
              )}
            </div>
            {repo.description && (
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-0.5 line-clamp-1">{repo.description}</p>
            )}
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mt-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
              {repo.language && (
                <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                  <span className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-blue-500" />
                  {repo.language}
                </span>
              )}
              <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                <Star className="w-3 h-3" />
                {repo.stargazers_count}
              </span>
              <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                <Clock className="w-3 h-3" />
                {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(repo.updated_at), { addSuffix: true })}
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity" />
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/GitHub/UsernameList.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState } from 'react';
import { Github, Plus, X, ChevronRight, Key } from 'lucide-react';
import { useGitHubStore, useGitHubAccounts } from '@/stores/githubStore';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';

interface UsernameListProps {
  onUsernameSelect: (username: string) => void;
}

export function UsernameList({ onUsernameSelect }: UsernameListProps) {
  const accounts = useGitHubAccounts();
  const addAccount = useGitHubStore((s) => s.addAccount);
  const removeAccount = useGitHubStore((s) => s.removeAccount);
  const [showAddForm, setShowAddForm] = useState(false);
  const [username, setUsername] = useState('');
  const [token, setToken] = useState('');
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState('');

  const handleAddAccount = async () => {
    if (!username.trim() || !token.trim()) { setError('Username and token required'); return; }
    setIsLoading(true);
    setError('');
    try {
      await addAccount(username.trim(), token.trim());
      setShowAddForm(false);
      setUsername('');
      setToken('');
    } catch (err) { setError((err as Error).message); }
    finally { setIsLoading(false); }
  };

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col bg-background">
      <div className="p-4 border-b border-border">
        <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">GitHub Accounts</h2>
        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">{accounts.length} account{accounts.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''} connected</p>
      </div>
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto p-4">
        {accounts.length === 0 && !showAddForm ? (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-center">
            <Github className="w-12 h-12 text-muted-foreground mb-3" />
            <p className="text-muted-foreground">No GitHub accounts connected</p>
            <button onClick={() => setShowAddForm(true)} className="mt-4 px-4 py-2 bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-lg text-sm">Add Account</button>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="space-y-2">
            {accounts.map((account) => (
              <div key={account.id} onClick={() => onUsernameSelect(account.id)} className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-xl border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer transition-all group">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  {account.avatarUrl ? <img src={account.avatarUrl} alt="" className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full" /> : <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-primary/10 flex items-center justify-center"><Github className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" /></div>}
                  <div><p className="font-medium">{account.id}</p><p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground capitalize">{account.permissions}</p></div>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                  <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity" />
                  <button onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); if (confirm(`Remove account ${account.id}?`)) removeAccount(account.id); }} className="p-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:bg-destructive/10 rounded"><X className="w-4 h-4 text-destructive" /></button>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
            {showAddForm && (
              <div className="p-4 rounded-xl border border-border bg-card space-y-3">
                <div><label className="text-sm font-medium">GitHub Username</label><Input value={username} onChange={(e) => setUsername(e.target.value)} placeholder="username" className="mt-1" /></div>
                <div><label className="text-sm font-medium">Personal Access Token</label><Input type="password" value={token} onChange={(e) => setToken(e.target.value)} placeholder="ghp_..." className="mt-1" /><p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">Needs <code>repo</code> and <code>read:user</code> scopes</p></div>
                {error && <p className="text-sm text-destructive">{error}</p>}
                <div className="flex gap-2"><Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setShowAddForm(false)}>Cancel</Button><Button onClick={handleAddAccount} disabled={isLoading}>{isLoading ? 'Connecting...' : 'Connect'}</Button></div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
      {accounts.length > 0 && !showAddForm && (
        <div className="p-4 border-t border-border"><button onClick={() => setShowAddForm(true)} className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-2 rounded-lg border border-dashed border-border hover:bg-accent transition-colors"><Plus className="w-4 h-4" /><span className="text-sm">Add Account</span></button></div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

import { useState } from 'react';
import { Mail, Plus, X, ChevronRight, RefreshCw } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { useDriveStore, useDriveAccounts } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useGoogleDriveAuth } from './GoogleDriveProvider';
import { RootThreeDotsMenu } from '@/components/Menu/RootThreeDotsMenu';

interface AccountSelectorProps {
  onAccountSelect?: (accountId: string) => void;
}

export function AccountSelector({ onAccountSelect }: AccountSelectorProps) {
  const accounts = useDriveAccounts();
  const removeAccount = useDriveStore((s) => s.removeAccount);
  const setActiveAccount = useDriveStore((s) => s.setActiveAccount);
  const { login, isLoading } = useGoogleDriveAuth();
  const [showAddMenu, setShowAddMenu] = useState(false);

  const getDisplayName = (email: string) => email.split('@')[0];

  const handleAccountClick = (accountId: string) => {
    setActiveAccount(accountId);
    onAccountSelect?.(accountId);
  };

  const handleAddAccount = async () => {
    setShowAddMenu(false);
    await login();
  };

  const handleFormat = async (accountId: string) => {
    console.log('Format account:', accountId);
  };

  const handleDelete = async (accountId: string) => {
    if (confirm(`Remove account ${getDisplayName(accountId)}?`)) {
      removeAccount(accountId);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col bg-background">
      <div className="p-4 border-b border-border">
        <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">Google Drive Accounts</h2>
        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
          {accounts.length} account{accounts.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''} connected
        </p>
      </div>

      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto p-4">
        {accounts.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-center">
            <Mail className="w-12 h-12 text-muted-foreground mb-3" />
            <p className="text-muted-foreground">No accounts connected</p>
            <button
              onClick={handleAddAccount}
              disabled={isLoading}
              className="mt-4 px-4 py-2 bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-lg text-sm"
            >
              {isLoading ? 'Connecting...' : 'Add Account'}
            </button>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="space-y-2">
            {accounts.map((account) => (
              <div
                key={account.id}
                onClick={() => handleAccountClick(account.id)}
                className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-xl border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer transition-all group"
              >
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  {account.picture ? (
                    <img src={account.picture} alt="" className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full" />
                  ) : (
                    <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-primary/10 flex items-center justify-center">
                      <Mail className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
                    </div>
                  )}
                  <div>
                    <p className="font-medium">{getDisplayName(account.id)}</p>
                    <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{account.id}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                  <RootThreeDotsMenu
                    itemType="drive-account"
                    itemId={account.id}
                    itemName={getDisplayName(account.id)}
                    originalIdentity={account.id}
                    onFormat={() => handleFormat(account.id)}
                    onDelete={() => handleDelete(account.id)}
                  />
                  <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity" />
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {accounts.length > 0 && (
        <div className="p-4 border-t border-border">
          <button
            onClick={() => setShowAddMenu(!showAddMenu)}
            className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-2 rounded-lg border border-dashed border-border hover:bg-accent transition-colors"
          >
            <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
            <span className="text-sm">Add Account</span>
          </button>

            <div className="mt-2 p-2 bg-card border border-border rounded-lg">

                onClick={handleAddAccount}
                disabled={isLoading}
                className="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-accent rounded"
              >
                {isLoading ? 'Connecting...' : '+ New Google Account'}
              </button>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/GoogleDrive/DriveFileGrid.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { DriveFile } from '@/types/drive';
import { FolderOpen, File } from 'lucide-react';

interface DriveFileGridProps {
  files: DriveFile[];
  onFolderClick: (file: DriveFile) => void;
  onFileClick: (file: DriveFile) => void;
}

export function DriveFileGrid({ files, onFolderClick, onFileClick }: DriveFileGridProps) {
  const isFolder = (file: DriveFile) => file.mimeType === 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder';

  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-4 p-4">
      {files.map((file) => (
        <div
          key={file.id}
          className="flex flex-col items-center p-4 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer transition-colors"
          onClick={() => (isFolder(file) ? onFolderClick(file) : onFileClick(file))}
        >
          {isFolder(file) ? (
            <FolderOpen className="w-12 h-12 text-primary mb-2" />
          ) : (
            <File className="w-12 h-12 text-muted-foreground mb-2" />
          )}
          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-center truncate w-full" title={file.name}>
            {file.name}
          </span>
          <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">
            {isFolder(file) ? 'Folder' : formatBytes(parseInt(file.size || '0'))}
          </span>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '-';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/GoogleDrive/DriveFileList.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { DriveFile } from '@/types/drive';
import { Folder, File, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';

interface DriveFileListProps {
  files: DriveFile[];
  onFolderClick: (file: DriveFile) => void;
  onFileClick: (file: DriveFile) => void;
}

export function DriveFileList({ files, onFolderClick, onFileClick }: DriveFileListProps) {
  const isFolder = (file: DriveFile) => file.mimeType === 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder';

  return (
    <div className="divide-y divide-border">
      {files.map((file) => (
        <div
          key={file.id}
          className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2 hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer group"
          onClick={() => (isFolder(file) ? onFolderClick(file) : onFileClick(file))}
        >
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 flex-1 min-w-0">
            {isFolder(file) ? (
              <Folder className="w-5 h-5 text-primary shrink-0" />
            ) : (
              <File className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground shrink-0" />
            )}
            <span className="text-sm font-medium truncate">{file.name}</span>
            {!isFolder(file) && (
              <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground shrink-0">
                {formatBytes(parseInt(file.size || '0'))}
              </span>
            )}
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4 text-xs text-muted-foreground shrink-0">
            <span>{formatDistanceToNow(new Date(file.modifiedTime), { addSuffix: true })}</span>
            <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity" />
          </div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '-';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/GoogleDrive/DrivePanel.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useEffect } from 'react';
import { AccountSelector } from './AccountSelector';
import { DriveToolbar } from './DriveToolbar';
import { DriveFileGrid } from './DriveFileGrid';
import { DriveFileList } from './DriveFileList';
import { useDriveStore, useDriveFiles, useDriveViewMode, useDriveSortBy, useDriveActiveAccount, useDriveError } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { DriveFile } from '@/types/drive';
import { GoogleDriveProvider } from './GoogleDriveProvider';

function DrivePanelContent() {
  const files = useDriveFiles();
  const viewMode = useDriveViewMode();
  const sortBy = useDriveSortBy();
  const activeAccount = useDriveActiveAccount();
  const error = useDriveError();
  
  const {
    setViewMode,
    setSortBy,
    navigateToFolder,
    navigateBack,
    refreshCurrent,
    navigateToRoot,
    setActiveAccount,
  } = useDriveStore();

  const currentFolderName = useDriveStore((s) => s.getCurrentFolderName());

  // Refresh when account changes
  useEffect(() => {
    if (activeAccount) {
      navigateToRoot();
    }
  }, [activeAccount?.id]);

  const handleFolderClick = (file: DriveFile) => {
    navigateToFolder(file);
  };

  const handleFileClick = (file: DriveFile) => {
    if (file.webViewLink) {
      window.open(file.webViewLink, '_blank');
    }
  };

  const handleBackToAccounts = () => {
    setActiveAccount(null);
  };

  // Show account selector if no active account
  if (!activeAccount) {
    return <AccountSelector />;
  }

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col bg-background">
      <DriveToolbar
        viewMode={viewMode}
        onViewModeChange={setViewMode}
        sortBy={sortBy}
        onSortChange={setSortBy}
        onNavigateBack={navigateBack}
        onRefresh={refreshCurrent}
        onLogout={handleBackToAccounts}
        currentFolderName={currentFolderName}
      />

      {error && (
        <div className="p-3 bg-destructive/10 text-destructive text-sm text-center">
          {error}
          <button 
            onClick={refreshCurrent}
            className="ml-2 underline hover:no-underline"
          >
            Retry
          </button>
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto">
        {files.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground">
            <p className="text-sm">Empty folder</p>
          </div>
        ) : viewMode === 'grid' ? (
          <DriveFileGrid 
            files={files} 
            onFolderClick={handleFolderClick}
            onFileClick={handleFileClick}
          />
        ) : (
          <DriveFileList 
            files={files} 
            onFolderClick={handleFolderClick}
            onFileClick={handleFileClick}
          />
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Add Account Button - Bottom Center */}
      <div className="p-3 border-t border-border flex justify-center">
        <button
          onClick={handleBackToAccounts}
          className="text-xs text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors"
        >
          Switch Account
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export function DrivePanel() {
  return (
    <GoogleDriveProvider>
      <DrivePanelContent />
    </GoogleDriveProvider>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/GoogleDrive/DriveToolbar.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { RefreshCw, Upload, FolderPlus } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';

interface DriveToolbarProps {
  onRefresh?: () => void;
  onUpload?: () => void;
  onNewFolder?: () => void;
}

export function DriveToolbar({ onRefresh, onUpload, onNewFolder }: DriveToolbarProps) {
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 p-4 border-b">
      <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={onRefresh}><RefreshCw className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />Refresh</Button>
      <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={onUpload}><Upload className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />Upload</Button>
      <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={onNewFolder}><FolderPlus className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />New Folder</Button>
    </div>
  );
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/GoogleDrive/GoogleDriveProvider.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { GoogleOAuthProvider, useGoogleLogin } from '@react-oauth/google';
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { driveApi } from '@/lib/googleDriveApi';

const CLIENT_ID = import.meta.env.VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID || '';

interface GoogleDriveProviderProps {
  children: React.ReactNode;
}

export function GoogleDriveProvider({ children }: GoogleDriveProviderProps) {
  return (
    <GoogleOAuthProvider clientId={CLIENT_ID}>
      {children}
    </GoogleOAuthProvider>
  );
}

// Hook for Google Login
export function useGoogleDriveAuth() {
  const addAccount = useDriveStore((s) => s.addAccount);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);

  const login = useGoogleLogin({
    onSuccess: async (tokenResponse) => {
      setIsLoading(true);
      try {
        // Fetch user info
        const userInfoResponse = await fetch(
          'https://www.googleapis.com/oauth2/v3/userinfo',
          {
            headers: {
              Authorization: `Bearer ${tokenResponse.access_token}`,
            },
          }
        );
        
        if (!userInfoResponse.ok) {
          throw new Error('Failed to fetch user info');
        }

        const userInfo = await userInfoResponse.json();

        const account = {
          id: userInfo.email,
          name: userInfo.name,
          picture: userInfo.picture,
          accessToken: tokenResponse.access_token,
          expiresAt: Date.now() + (tokenResponse.expires_in || 3600) * 1000,
        };

        addAccount(account);
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Login error:', err);
      } finally {
        setIsLoading(false);
      }
    },
    onError: (error) => {
      console.error('Login Failed:', error);
    },
    scope: 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive.readonly https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive.file',
  });

  return { login, isLoading };
}

import { X, Settings, Download, Trash2, Filter, Terminal, Bug, Info, AlertTriangle, AlertCircle } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Switch } from '@/components/ui/switch';
import { useLogStore, useLogFilteredLogs, useLogIsLiveLogOpen } from '@/stores/logStore';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { saveAs } from 'file-saver';

const levelIcons = {
  debug: <Bug className="w-3 h-3" />,
  info: <Info className="w-3 h-3" />,
  warn: <AlertTriangle className="w-3 h-3" />,
  error: <AlertCircle className="w-3 h-3" />,
};

const levelColors = {
  debug: 'text-muted-foreground',
  info: 'text-blue-500',
  warn: 'text-yellow-500',
  error: 'text-destructive',
};

const categoryColors = {
  auth: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800',
  file: 'bg-green-100 text-green-800',
  system: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800',
  network: 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-800',
  ui: 'bg-pink-100 text-pink-800',
};

export function LiveLogPanel() {
  const isOpen = useLogIsLiveLogOpen();
  const logs = useLogFilteredLogs();
  const toggleLiveLog = useLogStore((s) => s.toggleLiveLog);
  const setLogLevel = useLogStore((s) => s.setLogLevel);
  const clearLogs = useLogStore((s) => s.clearLogs);
  const exportLogs = useLogStore((s) => s.exportLogs);
  const logLevel = useLogStore((s) => s.logLevel);
  const logCategories = useLogStore((s) => s.logCategories);
  const toggleCategory = useLogStore((s) => s.toggleCategory);

  if (!isOpen) return null;

  const handleExport = async () => {
    const blob = await exportLogs();
    saveAs(blob, `logs-${new Date().toISOString()}.json`);
  };

  return (
    <div className="fixed bottom-4 left-4 right-4 h-80 bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-2xl z-50 flex flex-col">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-b border-border bg-muted/50">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Terminal className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
          <h3 className="font-semibold">Live Log</h3>
          <Badge variant="outline">{logs.length} entries</Badge>
        </div>
        
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          {/* Level filter */}
          <select
            value={logLevel}
            onChange={(e) => setLogLevel(e.target.value as any)}
            className="text-xs border rounded px-2 py-1 bg-background"
          >
            <option value="debug">Debug</option>
            <option value="info">Info</option>
            <option value="warn">Warn</option>
            <option value="error">Error</option>
          </select>

          {/* Category toggles */}
          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
            {(['auth', 'file', 'system', 'network', 'ui'] as const).map(cat => (
              <button
                key={cat}
                onClick={() => toggleCategory(cat)}
                className={cn(
                  "px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded capitalize",
                  logCategories.includes(cat) ? categoryColors[cat] : "bg-muted text-muted-foreground"
                )}
              >
                {cat}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>

          <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-8 w-8" onClick={handleExport}>
            <Download className="w-4 h-4" />
          </Button>
          
          <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-8 w-8" onClick={clearLogs}>
            <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
          </Button>
          
          <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-8 w-8" onClick={toggleLiveLog}>
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
          </Button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Log entries */}
      <ScrollArea className="flex-1 p-2 font-mono text-xs">
        <div className="space-y-1">
          {logs.length === 0 ? (
            <p className="text-muted-foreground text-center py-8">No logs to display</p>
          ) : (
            logs.map((log) => (
              <div
                key={log.id}
                className="flex items-start gap-2 p-1.5 rounded hover:bg-accent/50"
              >
                <span className={cn("shrink-0", levelColors[log.level])}>
                  {levelIcons[log.level]}
                </span>
                
                <span className="text-muted-foreground shrink-0">
                  {new Date(log.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString()}
                </span>
                
                <Badge 
                  variant="secondary" 
                  className={cn("shrink-0 text-[10px] px-1", categoryColors[log.category])}
                >
                  {log.category}
                </Badge>
                
                <span className="text-muted-foreground shrink-0">
                  [{log.userId.slice(0, 8)}]
                </span>
                
                <span className={cn("font-medium", levelColors[log.level])}>
                  {log.action}
                </span>
                
                {Object.keys(log.details).length > 0 && (
                  <span className="text-muted-foreground truncate">
                    {JSON.stringify(log.details)}
                  </span>
                )}
                
                {log.duration && (
                  <span className="text-muted-foreground ml-auto">
                    {log.duration}ms
                  </span>
                )}
              </div>
            ))
          )}
        </div>
      </ScrollArea>
    </div>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Log/LogActionWrapper.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useLogStore } from '@/stores/logStore';
import { useCallback } from 'react';

export function useLoggedAction() {
  const logAction = useLogStore((s) => s.logAction);

  const wrapAction = useCallback(<T extends (...args: any[]) => any>(
    actionName: string,
    fn: T,
    category?: Parameters<typeof logAction>[2]
  ): T => {
    return (async (...args: any[]) => {
      const startTime = performance.now();
      
      logAction(`${actionName}_start`, { args }, category);
      
      try {
        const result = await fn(...args);
        const duration = Math.round(performance.now() - startTime);
        
        logAction(`${actionName}_complete`, { 
          args, 
          result: typeof result === 'object' ? 'success' : result,
          duration 
        }, category);
        
        return result;
      } catch (error) {
        const duration = Math.round(performance.now() - startTime);
        
        logAction(`${actionName}_error`, { 
          args, 
          error: (error as Error).message,
          duration 
        }, category || 'system');
        
        throw error;
      }
    }) as T;
  }, [logAction]);

  return { wrapAction, logAction };
}

// Hook for component-level logging
export function useComponentLogger(componentName: string) {
  const logAction = useLogStore((s) => s.logAction);

  const logEvent = useCallback((event: string, details?: Record<string, any>) => {
    logAction(`${componentName}_${event}`, details || {}, 'ui');
  }, [logAction, componentName]);

  const logMount = useCallback(() => {
    logEvent('mount');
  }, [logEvent]);

  const logUnmount = useCallback(() => {
    logEvent('unmount');
  }, [logEvent]);

  const logClick = useCallback((element: string, details?: Record<string, any>) => {
    logEvent(`click_${element}`, details);
  }, [logEvent]);

  return { logEvent, logMount, logUnmount, logClick };
}

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Notification/NotificationBell.tsx
