━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { X, Copy, Share2, FileText, Folder, ChevronRight, ChevronDown, Search, ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, Check } from 'lucide-react';
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';
import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { jsPDF } from 'jspdf';
import autoTable from "jspdf-autotable";

interface TreeNode {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  type: 'file' | 'directory' | 'root';
  path: string;
  size: number;
  lastModified: Date;
  children?: TreeNode[];
  properties?: Record<string, any>;
}

interface TreeViewModalProps {
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  rootNode: TreeNode | null;
  title?: string;
}

export function TreeViewModal({ isOpen, onClose, rootNode, title = 'Structure Viewer' }: TreeViewModalProps) {
  const [expandedNodes, setExpandedNodes] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [selectedNode, setSelectedNode] = useState<TreeNode | null>(null);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'tree' | 'properties'>('tree');
  const [filteredNodes, setFilteredNodes] = useState<TreeNode[]>([]);
  const [searchIndex, setSearchIndex] = useState(0);
  const [copiedField, setCopiedField] = useState<string | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (rootNode && isOpen) {
      setExpandedNodes(new Set([rootNode.id]));
      setSelectedNode(rootNode);
      setSearchQuery('');
      setSearchIndex(0);
    }
  }, [rootNode, isOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (searchQuery.trim() && rootNode) {
      const results: TreeNode[] = [];

        if (node.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())) results.push(node);
        node.children?.forEach(search);
      };
      search(rootNode);
      setFilteredNodes(results);
      setSearchIndex(0);
      if (results.length > 0) expandToNode(results[0]);
    } else {
      setFilteredNodes([]);
    }
  }, [searchQuery, rootNode]);

  const expandToNode = (node: TreeNode) => {
    const newExpanded = new Set(expandedNodes);
    // Expand all parents
    let current = node;
    while (current.parent) {
      newExpanded.add(current.parent.id);
      current = current.parent;
    }
    newExpanded.add(node.id);
    setExpandedNodes(newExpanded);
    setSelectedNode(node);
  };

  const toggleNode = (nodeId: string) => {
    setExpandedNodes(prev => {
      const next = new Set(prev);
      if (next.has(nodeId)) next.delete(nodeId);
      else next.add(nodeId);
      return next;
    });
  };

  const copyToClipboard = async (text: string, fieldName: string) => {
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
    setCopiedField(fieldName);
    setTimeout(() => setCopiedField(null), 1500);
  };

  const copyProperties = async () => {
    if (!selectedNode) return;
    const props = selectedNode.properties || {};
    const text = `Path: ${selectedNode.path}\nSize: ${formatBytes(selectedNode.size)}\nType: ${selectedNode.type}\nModified: ${selectedNode.lastModified.toLocaleString()}\n${props.mountPath ? `Mount Path: ${props.mountPath}` : ''}\n${props.fileSystemType ? `File System: ${props.fileSystemType}` : ''}\n${props.permissions ? `Permissions: ${props.permissions}` : ''}\n${props.usedSpace !== undefined ? `Used Space: ${formatBytes(props.usedSpace)}` : ''}\n${props.freeSpace !== undefined ? `Free Space: ${formatBytes(props.freeSpace)}` : ''}\n${props.label ? `Label: ${props.label}` : ''}`.trim();
    await copyToClipboard(text, 'all-props');
  };

  const copyTreeStructure = () => {
    if (!selectedNode) return;
    let output = '';
    const buildTree = (node: TreeNode, prefix: string, isLast: boolean) => {
      const connector = isLast ? '└── ' : '├── ';
      output += prefix + connector + node.name + (node.type === 'directory' ? '/' : '') + '\n';
      if (node.children) {
        const newPrefix = prefix + (isLast ? '    ' : '│   ');
        node.children.forEach((child, idx) => buildTree(child, newPrefix, idx === node.children!.length - 1));
      }
    };
    buildTree(selectedNode, '', true);
    copyToClipboard(output, 'tree');
  };

  const copyBoth = async () => {
    if (!selectedNode) return;
    const props = selectedNode.properties || {};
    let propsText = `PROPERTIES\nPath: ${selectedNode.path}\nSize: ${formatBytes(selectedNode.size)}\nType: ${selectedNode.type}\nModified: ${selectedNode.lastModified.toLocaleString()}\n`;
    if (props.mountPath) propsText += `Mount Path: ${props.mountPath}\n`;
    if (props.fileSystemType) propsText += `File System: ${props.fileSystemType}\n`;
    if (props.usedSpace !== undefined) propsText += `Used Space: ${formatBytes(props.usedSpace)}\n`;
    if (props.freeSpace !== undefined) propsText += `Free Space: ${formatBytes(props.freeSpace)}\n`;
    if (props.label) propsText += `Label: ${props.label}\n`;
    propsText += `\nTREE STRUCTURE\n`;
    let treeText = '';
    const buildTree = (node: TreeNode, prefix: string, isLast: boolean) => {
      const connector = isLast ? '└── ' : '├── ';
      treeText += prefix + connector + node.name + (node.type === 'directory' ? '/' : '') + '\n';
      if (node.children) {
        const newPrefix = prefix + (isLast ? '    ' : '│   ');
        node.children.forEach((child, idx) => buildTree(child, newPrefix, idx === node.children!.length - 1));
      }
    };
    buildTree(selectedNode, '', true);
    await copyToClipboard(propsText + treeText, 'both');
  };

  const exportToTxt = () => {
    if (!selectedNode) return;
    let output = `TREE STRUCTURE REPORT\nGenerated: ${new Date().toLocaleString()}\nRoot: ${selectedNode.name}\nPath: ${selectedNode.path}\n\n`;
    const buildTree = (node: TreeNode, prefix: string, isLast: boolean) => {
      const connector = isLast ? '└── ' : '├── ';
      output += prefix + connector + node.name + (node.type === 'directory' ? '/' : '') + '\n';
      if (node.children) {
        const newPrefix = prefix + (isLast ? '    ' : '│   ');
        node.children.forEach((child, idx) => buildTree(child, newPrefix, idx === node.children!.length - 1));
      }
    };
    buildTree(selectedNode, '', true);
    const blob = new Blob([output], { type: 'text/plain' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = `tree_${selectedNode.name}_${Date.now()}.txt`;
    a.click();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  };

  const exportToPdf = async () => {
    if (!selectedNode) return;
    const doc = new jsPDF();
    doc.setFontSize(20);
    doc.text('Tree Structure Report', 14, 20);
    doc.setFontSize(10);
    doc.text(`Generated: ${new Date().toLocaleString()}`, 14, 30);
    doc.text(`Root: ${selectedNode.name}`, 14, 36);
    doc.text(`Path: ${selectedNode.path}`, 14, 42);
    const tableData: string[][] = [];
    const buildTableData = (node: TreeNode, depth: number) => {
      const indent = '  '.repeat(depth);
      tableData.push([indent + node.name, node.type, formatBytes(node.size), node.lastModified.toLocaleDateString()]);
      node.children?.forEach(child => buildTableData(child, depth + 1));
    };
    buildTableData(selectedNode, 0);
    (doc as any).autoTable({
      startY: 50,
      head: [['Name', 'Type', 'Size', 'Modified']],
      body: tableData,
      styles: { fontSize: 8, cellPadding: 2 },
      headStyles: { fillColor: [66, 139, 202] },
    });
    const finalY = (doc as any).lastAutoTable?.finalY || 50;
    doc.setFontSize(12);
    doc.text('Properties', 14, finalY + 10);
    const props = selectedNode.properties || {};
    const propRows = Object.entries(props).map(([key, val]) => [key, String(val)]);
    if (propRows.length) {
      (doc as any).autoTable({
        startY: finalY + 15,
        body: propRows,
        styles: { fontSize: 8 },
        headStyles: { fillColor: [100, 100, 100] },
      });
    }
    doc.save(`tree_${selectedNode.name}_${Date.now()}.pdf`);
  };

  const navigateSearch = (direction: 'next' | 'prev') => {
    if (filteredNodes.length === 0) return;
    let newIndex = searchIndex;
    if (direction === 'next') newIndex = (searchIndex + 1) % filteredNodes.length;
    else newIndex = (searchIndex - 1 + filteredNodes.length) % filteredNodes.length;
    setSearchIndex(newIndex);
    expandToNode(filteredNodes[newIndex]);
  };

  const renderTreeNode = (node: TreeNode, depth: number = 0) => {
    const isExpanded = expandedNodes.has(node.id);
    const isSelected = selectedNode?.id === node.id;
    const hasChildren = node.children && node.children.length > 0;
    return (
      <div key={node.id}>
        <div
          className={cn("flex items-center gap-1 py-1 px-2 rounded cursor-pointer hover:bg-accent", isSelected && "bg-primary/10")}
          style={{ paddingLeft: `${depth * 16 + 8}px` }}
          onClick={() => setSelectedNode(node)}
        >
          {hasChildren ? (
            <button onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); toggleNode(node.id); }} className="p-0.5">
              {isExpanded ? <ChevronDown className="w-3 h-3" /> : <ChevronRight className="w-3 h-3" />}
            </button>
          ) : <span className="w-4" />}
          {node.type === 'directory' || node.type === 'root' ? (
            <Folder className="w-4 h-4 text-primary" />
          ) : (
            <FileText className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
          )}
          <span className="text-sm truncate">{node.name}</span>
          {node.type === 'file' && <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground ml-auto">{formatBytes(node.size)}</span>}
        </div>
        {isExpanded && hasChildren && (
          <div>{node.children!.map(child => renderTreeNode(child, depth + 1))}</div>
        )}
      </div>
    );
  };

  if (!isOpen || !rootNode) return null;

  return (
    <Dialog open={isOpen} onOpenChange={onClose}>
      <DialogContent className="max-w-4xl h-[80vh] flex flex-col">
        <DialogHeader>
          <DialogTitle className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <span>{title}</span>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={exportToTxt}><FileText className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> TXT</Button>
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={exportToPdf}><FileText className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> PDF</Button>
            </div>
          </DialogTitle>
        </DialogHeader>

        {/* Search Bar */}
        <div className="relative mb-2">
          <Search className="absolute left-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
          <Input
            placeholder="Search files/folders..."
            value={searchQuery}
            onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
            className="pl-8 pr-24"
          />
          {searchQuery && filteredNodes.length > 0 && (
            <div className="absolute right-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 flex items-center gap-1">
              <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{searchIndex + 1}/{filteredNodes.length}</span>
              <button onClick={() => navigateSearch('prev')} className="p-0.5 hover:bg-accent rounded"><ArrowLeft className="w-3 h-3" /></button>
              <button onClick={() => navigateSearch('next')} className="p-0.5 hover:bg-accent rounded"><ArrowRight className="w-3 h-3" /></button>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        <Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={(v) => setActiveTab(v as any)} className="flex-1 flex flex-col">
          <TabsList className="w-full"><TabsTrigger value="tree" className="flex-1">Tree Structure</TabsTrigger><TabsTrigger value="properties" className="flex-1">Properties</TabsTrigger></TabsList>
          <TabsContent value="tree" className="flex-1 overflow-hidden mt-2">
            <ScrollArea className="h-full">
              {searchQuery ? (
                <div className="space-y-1">
                  {filteredNodes.map((node, idx) => (
                    <div
                      key={node.id}
                      className={cn("flex items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded cursor-pointer hover:bg-accent", selectedNode?.id === node.id && "bg-primary/10", idx === searchIndex && "ring-2 ring-primary")}
                      onClick={() => { setSelectedNode(node); setSearchIndex(idx); expandToNode(node); }}
                    >
                      {node.type === 'directory' || node.type === 'root' ? <Folder className="w-4 h-4" /> : <FileText className="w-4 h-4" />}
                      <span className="text-sm">{node.name}</span>
                      <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground ml-auto">{node.path}</span>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              ) : renderTreeNode(rootNode)}
            </ScrollArea>
          </TabsContent>
          <TabsContent value="properties" className="flex-1 overflow-auto mt-2">
            {selectedNode ? (
              <div className="space-y-4">
                {/* Properties grid with one-tap copy */}
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 text-sm">
                  <PropertyRow label="Name" value={selectedNode.name} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.name, 'name')} copied={copiedField === 'name'} />
                  <PropertyRow label="Path" value={selectedNode.path} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.path, 'path')} copied={copiedField === 'path'} />
                  <PropertyRow label="Type" value={selectedNode.type} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.type, 'type')} copied={copiedField === 'type'} />
                  <PropertyRow label="Size" value={formatBytes(selectedNode.size)} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(formatBytes(selectedNode.size), 'size')} copied={copiedField === 'size'} />
                  <PropertyRow label="Modified" value={selectedNode.lastModified.toLocaleString()} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.lastModified.toLocaleString(), 'modified')} copied={copiedField === 'modified'} />
                  {selectedNode.properties?.mountPath && (
                    <PropertyRow label="Mount Path" value={selectedNode.properties.mountPath} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.properties.mountPath, 'mountPath')} copied={copiedField === 'mountPath'} />
                  )}
                  {selectedNode.properties?.fileSystemType && (
                    <PropertyRow label="File System" value={selectedNode.properties.fileSystemType} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.properties.fileSystemType, 'fsType')} copied={copiedField === 'fsType'} />
                  )}
                  {selectedNode.properties?.permissions && (
                    <PropertyRow label="Permissions" value={selectedNode.properties.permissions} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.properties.permissions, 'perms')} copied={copiedField === 'perms'} />
                  )}
                  {selectedNode.properties?.usedSpace !== undefined && (
                    <PropertyRow label="Used Space" value={formatBytes(selectedNode.properties.usedSpace)} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(formatBytes(selectedNode.properties.usedSpace), 'used')} copied={copiedField === 'used'} />
                  )}
                  {selectedNode.properties?.freeSpace !== undefined && (
                    <PropertyRow label="Free Space" value={formatBytes(selectedNode.properties.freeSpace)} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(formatBytes(selectedNode.properties.freeSpace), 'free')} copied={copiedField === 'free'} />
                  )}
                  {selectedNode.properties?.label && (
                    <PropertyRow label="Label" value={selectedNode.properties.label} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.properties.label, 'label')} copied={copiedField === 'label'} />
                  )}
                </div>
                {/* Action buttons */}
                <div className="flex gap-2 pt-3 border-t border-border flex-wrap">
                  <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={copyProperties}><Copy className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> Copy Properties</Button>
                  <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={copyTreeStructure}><Copy className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> Copy Tree</Button>
                  <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={copyBoth}><Copy className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> Copy Both</Button>
                  <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={exportToTxt}><Share2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> Export TXT</Button>
                  <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={exportToPdf}><Share2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> Export PDF</Button>
                </div>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="text-center text-muted-foreground py-8">Select a node to view properties</div>
            )}
          </TabsContent>
        </Tabs>
      </DialogContent>
    </Dialog>
  );
}

// Helper component for property row with copy button
function PropertyRow({ label, value, onCopy, copied }: { label: string; value: string; onCopy: () => void; copied: boolean }) {
  return (
    <>
      <div className="text-muted-foreground">{label}:</div>
      <div className="font-mono text-xs break-all flex items-center gap-1 group">
        <span className="truncate">{value}</span>
        <button onClick={onCopy} className="opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 p-0.5 hover:bg-accent rounded shrink-0">
          {copied ? <Check className="w-3 h-3 text-green-500" /> : <Copy className="w-3 h-3" />}
        </button>
      </div>
    </>
  );
}

function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '0 B';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB', 'TB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) { size /= 1024; unitIndex++; }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}

import * as React from "react"
import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"
import { Slot } from "radix-ui"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

const badgeVariants = cva(
  "group/badge inline-flex h-5 w-fit shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1 overflow-hidden rounded-4xl border border-transparent px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium whitespace-nowrap transition-all focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-[3px] focus-visible:ring-ring/50 has-data-[icon=inline-end]:pr-1.5 has-data-[icon=inline-start]:pl-1.5 aria-invalid:border-destructive aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 dark:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40 [&>svg]:pointer-events-none [&>svg]:size-3!",
  {
    variants: {
      variant: {
        default: "bg-primary text-primary-foreground [a]:hover:bg-primary/80",
        secondary:
          "bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground [a]:hover:bg-secondary/80",
        destructive:
          "bg-destructive/10 text-destructive focus-visible:ring-destructive/20 dark:bg-destructive/20 dark:focus-visible:ring-destructive/40 [a]:hover:bg-destructive/20",
        outline:
          "border-border text-foreground [a]:hover:bg-muted [a]:hover:text-muted-foreground",
        ghost:
          "hover:bg-muted hover:text-muted-foreground dark:hover:bg-muted/50",
        link: "text-primary underline-offset-4 hover:underline",
      },
    },
    defaultVariants: {
      variant: "default",
    },
  }
)

function Badge({
  className,
  variant = "default",
  asChild = false,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<"span"> &
  VariantProps<typeof badgeVariants> & { asChild?: boolean }) {
  const Comp = asChild ? Slot.Root : "span"

  return (
    <Comp
      data-slot="badge"
      data-variant={variant}
      className={cn(badgeVariants({ variant }), className)}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

export { Badge, badgeVariants }

import * as React from "react"
import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"
import { Slot } from "radix-ui"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

const buttonVariants = cva(
  "group/button inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-transparent bg-clip-padding text-sm font-medium whitespace-nowrap transition-all outline-none select-none focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-3 focus-visible:ring-ring/50 active:not-aria-[haspopup]:translate-y-px disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 aria-invalid:border-destructive aria-invalid:ring-3 aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 dark:aria-invalid:border-destructive/50 dark:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40 [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:shrink-0 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4",
  {
    variants: {
      variant: {
        default: "bg-primary text-primary-foreground [a]:hover:bg-primary/80",
        outline:
          "border-border bg-background hover:bg-muted hover:text-foreground aria-expanded:bg-muted aria-expanded:text-foreground dark:border-input dark:bg-input/30 dark:hover:bg-input/50",
        secondary:
          "bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 aria-expanded:bg-secondary aria-expanded:text-secondary-foreground",
        ghost:
          "hover:bg-muted hover:text-foreground aria-expanded:bg-muted aria-expanded:text-foreground dark:hover:bg-muted/50",
        destructive:
          "bg-destructive/10 text-destructive hover:bg-destructive/20 focus-visible:border-destructive/40 focus-visible:ring-destructive/20 dark:bg-destructive/20 dark:hover:bg-destructive/30 dark:focus-visible:ring-destructive/40",
        link: "text-primary underline-offset-4 hover:underline",
      },
      size: {
        default:
          "h-8 gap-1.5 px-2.5 has-data-[icon=inline-end]:pr-2 has-data-[icon=inline-start]:pl-2",
        xs: "h-6 gap-1 rounded-[min(var(--radius-md),10px)] px-2 text-xs in-data-[slot=button-group]:rounded-lg has-data-[icon=inline-end]:pr-1.5 has-data-[icon=inline-start]:pl-1.5 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-3",
        sm: "h-7 gap-1 rounded-[min(var(--radius-md),12px)] px-2.5 text-[0.8rem] in-data-[slot=button-group]:rounded-lg has-data-[icon=inline-end]:pr-1.5 has-data-[icon=inline-start]:pl-1.5 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-3.5",
        lg: "h-9 gap-1.5 px-2.5 has-data-[icon=inline-end]:pr-2 has-data-[icon=inline-start]:pl-2",
        icon: "size-8",
        "icon-xs":
          "size-6 rounded-[min(var(--radius-md),10px)] in-data-[slot=button-group]:rounded-lg [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-3",
        "icon-sm":
          "size-7 rounded-[min(var(--radius-md),12px)] in-data-[slot=button-group]:rounded-lg",
        "icon-lg": "size-9",
      },
    },
    defaultVariants: {
      variant: "default",
      size: "default",
    },
  }
)

function Button({
  className,
  variant = "default",
  size = "default",
  asChild = false,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<"button"> &
  VariantProps<typeof buttonVariants> & {
    asChild?: boolean
  }) {
  const Comp = asChild ? Slot.Root : "button"

  return (
    <Comp
      data-slot="button"
      data-variant={variant}
      data-size={size}
      className={cn(buttonVariants({ variant, size, className }))}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

export { Button, buttonVariants }

import * as React from "react"
import { Checkbox as CheckboxPrimitive } from "radix-ui"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
import { CheckIcon } from "lucide-react"

function Checkbox({
  className,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof CheckboxPrimitive.Root>) {
  return (
    <CheckboxPrimitive.Root
      data-slot="checkbox"
      className={cn(
        "peer relative flex size-4 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-[4px] border border-input transition-colors outline-none group-has-disabled/field:opacity-50 after:absolute after:-inset-x-3 after:-inset-y-2 focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-3 focus-visible:ring-ring/50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 aria-invalid:border-destructive aria-invalid:ring-3 aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 aria-invalid:aria-checked:border-primary dark:bg-input/30 dark:aria-invalid:border-destructive/50 dark:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40 data-checked:border-primary data-checked:bg-primary data-checked:text-primary-foreground dark:data-checked:bg-primary",
        className
      )}
      {...props}
    >
      <CheckboxPrimitive.Indicator
        data-slot="checkbox-indicator"
        className="grid place-content-center text-current transition-none [&>svg]:size-3.5"
      >
        <CheckIcon
        />
      </CheckboxPrimitive.Indicator>
    </CheckboxPrimitive.Root>
  )
}

export { Checkbox }

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/ui/dialog.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import * as React from "react"
import { Dialog as DialogPrimitive } from "radix-ui"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
import { XIcon } from "lucide-react"

function Dialog({
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof DialogPrimitive.Root>) {
  return <DialogPrimitive.Root data-slot="dialog" {...props} />
}

function DialogTrigger({
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof DialogPrimitive.Trigger>) {
  return <DialogPrimitive.Trigger data-slot="dialog-trigger" {...props} />
}

function DialogPortal({
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof DialogPrimitive.Portal>) {
  return <DialogPrimitive.Portal data-slot="dialog-portal" {...props} />
}

function DialogClose({
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof DialogPrimitive.Close>) {
  return <DialogPrimitive.Close data-slot="dialog-close" {...props} />
}

function DialogOverlay({
  className,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof DialogPrimitive.Overlay>) {
  return (
    <DialogPrimitive.Overlay
      data-slot="dialog-overlay"
      className={cn(
        "fixed inset-0 isolate z-50 bg-black/10 duration-100 supports-backdrop-filter:backdrop-blur-xs data-open:animate-in data-open:fade-in-0 data-closed:animate-out data-closed:fade-out-0",
        className
      )}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

function DialogContent({
  className,
  children,
  showCloseButton = true,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof DialogPrimitive.Content> & {
  showCloseButton?: boolean
}) {
  return (
    <DialogPortal>
      <DialogOverlay />
      <DialogPrimitive.Content
        data-slot="dialog-content"
        className={cn(
          "fixed top-1/2 left-1/2 z-50 grid w-full max-w-[calc(100%-2rem)] -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 gap-4 rounded-xl bg-popover p-4 text-sm text-popover-foreground ring-1 ring-foreground/10 duration-100 outline-none sm:max-w-sm data-open:animate-in data-open:fade-in-0 data-open:zoom-in-95 data-closed:animate-out data-closed:fade-out-0 data-closed:zoom-out-95",
          className
        )}
        {...props}
      >
        {children}
        {showCloseButton && (
          <DialogPrimitive.Close data-slot="dialog-close" asChild>
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              className="absolute top-2 right-2"
              size="icon-sm"
            >
              <XIcon
              />
              <span className="sr-only">Close</span>
            </Button>
          </DialogPrimitive.Close>
        )}
      </DialogPrimitive.Content>
    </DialogPortal>
  )
}

function DialogHeader({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"div">) {
  return (
    <div
      data-slot="dialog-header"
      className={cn("flex flex-col gap-2", className)}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

function DialogFooter({
  className,
  showCloseButton = false,
  children,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<"div"> & {
  showCloseButton?: boolean
}) {
  return (
    <div
      data-slot="dialog-footer"
      className={cn(
        "-mx-4 -mb-4 flex flex-col-reverse gap-2 rounded-b-xl border-t bg-muted/50 p-4 sm:flex-row sm:justify-end",
        className
      )}
      {...props}
    >
      {children}
      {showCloseButton && (
        <DialogPrimitive.Close asChild>
          <Button variant="outline">Close</Button>
        </DialogPrimitive.Close>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}

function DialogTitle({
  className,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof DialogPrimitive.Title>) {
  return (
    <DialogPrimitive.Title
      data-slot="dialog-title"
      className={cn(
        "font-heading text-base leading-none font-medium",
        className
      )}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

function DialogDescription({
  className,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof DialogPrimitive.Description>) {
  return (
    <DialogPrimitive.Description
      data-slot="dialog-description"
      className={cn(
        "text-sm text-muted-foreground *:[a]:underline *:[a]:underline-offset-3 *:[a]:hover:text-foreground",
        className
      )}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

export {
  Dialog,
  DialogClose,
  DialogContent,
  DialogDescription,
  DialogFooter,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogOverlay,
  DialogPortal,
  DialogTitle,
  DialogTrigger,
}

function DropdownMenu({
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof DropdownMenuPrimitive.Root>) {
  return <DropdownMenuPrimitive.Root data-slot="dropdown-menu" {...props} />
}

  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof DropdownMenuPrimitive.Portal>) {

    <DropdownMenuPrimitive.Portal data-slot="dropdown-menu-portal" {...props} />

        {...props}

}: React.ComponentProps<typeof ProgressPrimitive.Root>) {

      data-slot="progress"

import * as React from "react"
import { Select as SelectPrimitive } from "radix-ui"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
import { ChevronDownIcon, CheckIcon, ChevronUpIcon } from "lucide-react"

function Select({
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof SelectPrimitive.Root>) {
  return <SelectPrimitive.Root data-slot="select" {...props} />
}

function SelectGroup({
  className,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof SelectPrimitive.Group>) {
  return (
    <SelectPrimitive.Group
      data-slot="select-group"
      className={cn("scroll-my-1 p-1", className)}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

function SelectValue({
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof SelectPrimitive.Value>) {
  return <SelectPrimitive.Value data-slot="select-value" {...props} />
}

function SelectTrigger({
  className,
  size = "default",
  children,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof SelectPrimitive.Trigger> & {
  size?: "sm" | "default"
}) {
  return (
    <SelectPrimitive.Trigger
      data-slot="select-trigger"
      data-size={size}
      className={cn(
        "flex w-fit items-center justify-between gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-input bg-transparent py-2 pr-2 pl-2.5 text-sm whitespace-nowrap transition-colors outline-none select-none focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-3 focus-visible:ring-ring/50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 aria-invalid:border-destructive aria-invalid:ring-3 aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 data-placeholder:text-muted-foreground data-[size=default]:h-8 data-[size=sm]:h-7 data-[size=sm]:rounded-[min(var(--radius-md),10px)] *:data-[slot=select-value]:line-clamp-1 *:data-[slot=select-value]:flex *:data-[slot=select-value]:items-center *:data-[slot=select-value]:gap-1.5 dark:bg-input/30 dark:hover:bg-input/50 dark:aria-invalid:border-destructive/50 dark:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40 [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:shrink-0 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4",
        className
      )}
      {...props}
    >
      {children}
      <SelectPrimitive.Icon asChild>
        <ChevronDownIcon className="pointer-events-none size-4 text-muted-foreground" />
      </SelectPrimitive.Icon>
    </SelectPrimitive.Trigger>
  )
}

function SelectContent({
  className,
  children,
  position = "item-aligned",
  align = "center",
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof SelectPrimitive.Content>) {
  return (
    <SelectPrimitive.Portal>
      <SelectPrimitive.Content
        data-slot="select-content"
        data-align-trigger={position === "item-aligned"}
        className={cn("relative z-50 max-h-(--radix-select-content-available-height) min-w-36 origin-(--radix-select-content-transform-origin) overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto rounded-lg bg-popover text-popover-foreground shadow-md ring-1 ring-foreground/10 duration-100 data-[align-trigger=true]:animate-none data-[side=bottom]:slide-in-from-top-2 data-[side=left]:slide-in-from-right-2 data-[side=right]:slide-in-from-left-2 data-[side=top]:slide-in-from-bottom-2 data-open:animate-in data-open:fade-in-0 data-open:zoom-in-95 data-closed:animate-out data-closed:fade-out-0 data-closed:zoom-out-95", position ==="popper"&&"data-[side=bottom]:translate-y-1 data-[side=left]:-translate-x-1 data-[side=right]:translate-x-1 data-[side=top]:-translate-y-1", className )}
        position={position}
        align={align}
        {...props}
      >
        <SelectScrollUpButton />
        <SelectPrimitive.Viewport
          data-position={position}
          className={cn(
            "data-[position=popper]:h-(--radix-select-trigger-height) data-[position=popper]:w-full data-[position=popper]:min-w-(--radix-select-trigger-width)",
            position === "popper" && ""
          )}
        >
          {children}
        </SelectPrimitive.Viewport>
        <SelectScrollDownButton />
      </SelectPrimitive.Content>
    </SelectPrimitive.Portal>
  )
}

function SelectLabel({
  className,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof SelectPrimitive.Label>) {
  return (

      data-slot="select-label"

      )}
      {...props}

        <SelectPrimitive.ItemIndicator>
          <CheckIcon className="pointer-events-none" />
        </SelectPrimitive.ItemIndicator>
      </span>
      <SelectPrimitive.ItemText>{children}</SelectPrimitive.ItemText>

  )

function SelectSeparator({

  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof SelectPrimitive.Separator>) {

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/ui/slider.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import * as React from "react"
import { Slider as SliderPrimitive } from "radix-ui"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

function Slider({
  className,
  defaultValue,
  value,
  min = 0,
  max = 100,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof SliderPrimitive.Root>) {
  const _values = React.useMemo(
    () =>
      Array.isArray(value)
        ? value
        : Array.isArray(defaultValue)
          ? defaultValue
          : [min, max],
    [value, defaultValue, min, max]
  )

  return (
    <SliderPrimitive.Root
      data-slot="slider"
      defaultValue={defaultValue}
      value={value}
      min={min}
      max={max}
      className={cn(
        "relative flex w-full touch-none items-center select-none data-disabled:opacity-50 data-vertical:h-full data-vertical:min-h-40 data-vertical:w-auto data-vertical:flex-col",
        className
      )}
      {...props}
    >
      <SliderPrimitive.Track
        data-slot="slider-track"
        className="relative grow overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-muted data-horizontal:h-1 data-horizontal:w-full data-vertical:h-full data-vertical:w-1"
      >
        <SliderPrimitive.Range
          data-slot="slider-range"
          className="absolute bg-primary select-none data-horizontal:h-full data-vertical:w-full"
        />
      </SliderPrimitive.Track>
      {Array.from({ length: _values.length }, (_, index) => (
        <SliderPrimitive.Thumb
          data-slot="slider-thumb"
          key={index}
          className="relative block size-3 shrink-0 rounded-full border border-ring bg-white ring-ring/50 transition-[color,box-shadow] select-none after:absolute after:-inset-2 hover:ring-3 focus-visible:ring-3 focus-visible:outline-hidden active:ring-3 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50"
        />
      ))}
    </SliderPrimitive.Root>
  )
}

export { Slider }

import * as React from "react"
import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"
import { Tabs as TabsPrimitive } from "radix-ui"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

function Tabs({
  className,
  orientation = "horizontal",
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof TabsPrimitive.Root>) {
  return (
    <TabsPrimitive.Root
      data-slot="tabs"
      data-orientation={orientation}
      className={cn(
        "group/tabs flex gap-2 data-horizontal:flex-col",
        className
      )}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

const tabsListVariants = cva(
  "group/tabs-list inline-flex w-fit items-center justify-center rounded-lg p-[3px] text-muted-foreground group-data-horizontal/tabs:h-8 group-data-vertical/tabs:h-fit group-data-vertical/tabs:flex-col data-[variant=line]:rounded-none",
  {
    variants: {
      variant: {
        default: "bg-muted",
        line: "gap-1 bg-transparent",
      },
    },
    defaultVariants: {
      variant: "default",
    },
  }
)

function TabsList({
  className,
  variant = "default",
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof TabsPrimitive.List> &
  VariantProps<typeof tabsListVariants>) {
  return (
    <TabsPrimitive.List
      data-slot="tabs-list"
      data-variant={variant}
      className={cn(tabsListVariants({ variant }), className)}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

function TabsTrigger({
  className,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof TabsPrimitive.Trigger>) {
  return (
    <TabsPrimitive.Trigger
      data-slot="tabs-trigger"
      className={cn(
        "relative inline-flex h-[calc(100%-1px)] flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-md border border-transparent px-1.5 py-0.5 text-sm font-medium whitespace-nowrap text-foreground/60 transition-all group-data-vertical/tabs:w-full group-data-vertical/tabs:justify-start hover:text-foreground focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-[3px] focus-visible:ring-ring/50 focus-visible:outline-1 focus-visible:outline-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 has-data-[icon=inline-end]:pr-1 has-data-[icon=inline-start]:pl-1 dark:text-muted-foreground dark:hover:text-foreground group-data-[variant=default]/tabs-list:data-active:shadow-sm group-data-[variant=line]/tabs-list:data-active:shadow-none [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:shrink-0 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4",
        "group-data-[variant=line]/tabs-list:bg-transparent group-data-[variant=line]/tabs-list:data-active:bg-transparent dark:group-data-[variant=line]/tabs-list:data-active:border-transparent dark:group-data-[variant=line]/tabs-list:data-active:bg-transparent",
        "data-active:bg-background data-active:text-foreground dark:data-active:border-input dark:data-active:bg-input/30 dark:data-active:text-foreground",
        "after:absolute after:bg-foreground after:opacity-0 after:transition-opacity group-data-horizontal/tabs:after:inset-x-0 group-data-horizontal/tabs:after:bottom-[-5px] group-data-horizontal/tabs:after:h-0.5 group-data-vertical/tabs:after:inset-y-0 group-data-vertical/tabs:after:-right-1 group-data-vertical/tabs:after:w-0.5 group-data-[variant=line]/tabs-list:data-active:after:opacity-100",
        className
      )}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

function TabsContent({
  className,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof TabsPrimitive.Content>) {
  return (
    <TabsPrimitive.Content
      data-slot="tabs-content"
      className={cn("flex-1 text-sm outline-none", className)}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"
import { Toggle as TogglePrimitive } from "radix-ui"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

const toggleVariants = cva(
  "group/toggle inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-1 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium whitespace-nowrap transition-all outline-none hover:bg-muted hover:text-foreground focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-[3px] focus-visible:ring-ring/50 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 aria-invalid:border-destructive aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 aria-pressed:bg-muted data-[state=on]:bg-muted dark:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40 [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:shrink-0 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4",
  {
    variants: {
      variant: {
        default: "bg-transparent",
        outline: "border border-input bg-transparent hover:bg-muted",
      },
      size: {
        default:
          "h-8 min-w-8 px-2.5 has-data-[icon=inline-end]:pr-2 has-data-[icon=inline-start]:pl-2",
        sm: "h-7 min-w-7 rounded-[min(var(--radius-md),12px)] px-2.5 text-[0.8rem] has-data-[icon=inline-end]:pr-1.5 has-data-[icon=inline-start]:pl-1.5 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-3.5",
        lg: "h-9 min-w-9 px-2.5 has-data-[icon=inline-end]:pr-2 has-data-[icon=inline-start]:pl-2",
      },
    },
    defaultVariants: {
      variant: "default",
      size: "default",
    },
  }
)

function Toggle({
  className,
  variant = "default",
  size = "default",
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof TogglePrimitive.Root> &
  VariantProps<typeof toggleVariants>) {
  return (
    <TogglePrimitive.Root
      data-slot="toggle"
      className={cn(toggleVariants({ variant, size, className }))}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

export { Toggle, toggleVariants }

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/ui/PanelDialog.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { X } from 'lucide-react';
import { createPortal } from 'react-dom';

interface PanelDialogProps {
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  panelId: string;
  title: string;
  children: React.ReactNode;
  width?: string;
}

export function PanelDialog({ isOpen, onClose, panelId, title, children, width = '90%' }: PanelDialogProps) {
  const dialogRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen && dialogRef.current) {
      const panelElement = document.querySelector(`[data-panel-id="${panelId}"]`);
      if (panelElement) {
        const rect = panelElement.getBoundingClientRect();
        dialogRef.current.style.top = `${rect.top + rect.height / 2}px`;
        dialogRef.current.style.left = `${rect.left + rect.width / 2}px`;
        dialogRef.current.style.transform = 'translate(-50%, -50%)';
      }
    }
  }, [isOpen, panelId]);

  if (!isOpen) return null;

  return createPortal(
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 pointer-events-none">
      <div
        ref={dialogRef}
        className="absolute pointer-events-auto bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-2xl overflow-hidden"
        style={{ width, maxWidth: 'min(90%, 400px)' }}
      >
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-b border-border bg-muted/50">
          <h3 className="font-medium text-sm">{title}</h3>
          <button onClick={onClose} className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded">
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
        </div>
        <div className="p-4">{children}</div>
      </div>
    </div>,
    document.body
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

  className,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof RadioGroupPrimitive.Item>) {

    <RadioGroupPrimitive.Item
      data-slot="radio-group-item"
      className={cn(

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/ui/radio-group.tsx.bak
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import * as React from "react";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";

interface RadioGroupProps extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> {
  value?: string;
  onValueChange?: (value: string) => void;
  disabled?: boolean;
  name?: string;
}

const RadioGroupContext = React.createContext<{
  value?: string;
  onValueChange?: (value: string) => void;
  disabled?: boolean;
  name?: string;
}>({});

export const RadioGroup = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, RadioGroupProps>(
  ({ className, value, onValueChange, disabled, name, children, ...props }, ref) => {
    return (
      <RadioGroupContext.Provider value={{ value, onValueChange, disabled, name }}>
        <div ref={ref} className={cn("flex flex-wrap gap-4", className)} role="radiogroup" {...props}>
          {children}
        </div>
      </RadioGroupContext.Provider>
    );
  }
);
RadioGroup.displayName = "RadioGroup";

interface RadioGroupItemProps extends React.InputHTMLAttributes<HTMLInputElement> {
  value: string;
  id?: string;
}

export const RadioGroupItem = React.forwardRef<HTMLInputElement, RadioGroupItemProps>(
  ({ className, value, id, disabled: itemDisabled, ...props }, ref) => {
    const context = React.useContext(RadioGroupContext);
    const isChecked = context.value === value;
    const isDisabled = itemDisabled ?? context.disabled;

    const handleChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
      if (!isDisabled && e.target.checked) {
        context.onValueChange?.(value);
      }
    };

    const inputId = id || `radio-${value}`;

    return (
      <input
        ref={ref}
        type="radio"
        id={inputId}
        name={context.name}
        value={value}
        checked={isChecked}
        onChange={handleChange}
        disabled={isDisabled}
        className={cn(
          "h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded-full border border-primary text-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50",
          className
        )}
        {...props}
      />
    );
  }
);
RadioGroupItem.displayName = "RadioGroupItem";
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

import { HardDrive, FolderGit, Github, Terminal, LayoutGrid } from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

interface NavItem {
  id: string;
  label: string;
  icon: React.ElementType;
  color: string;
}

const navItems: NavItem[] = [
  { id: 'storage', label: 'Storage', icon: HardDrive, color: 'text-blue-500' },
  { id: 'drive', label: 'Drive', icon: FolderGit, color: 'text-green-500' },
  { id: 'github', label: 'GitHub', icon: Github, color: 'text-purple-500' },
  { id: 'terminal', label: 'Terminal', icon: Terminal, color: 'text-orange-500' },
];

export function LeftPanel() {
  return (
    <div className="w-full md:w-[200px] bg-card border-r border-border flex flex-col shrink-0">
      <div className="p-3 border-b border-border">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <LayoutGrid className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
          <h1 className="font-semibold text-foreground">MultiPanel</h1>
        </div>
      </div>
      
      <nav className="flex-1 p-2 space-y-1">
        {navItems.map((item) => {
          const Icon = item.icon;
          return (
            <div
              key={item.id}
              className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm text-muted-foreground"
            >
              <Icon className={cn('w-4 h-4', item.color)} />
              <span>{item.label}</span>
            </div>
          );
        })}
      </nav>
      
      <div className="p-3 border-t border-border">
        <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground text-center">
          Each panel has independent state
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/PanelContainer.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { usePanelStore, usePanels, useActivePanelId } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { ResizablePanel } from './Panel/ResizablePanel';
import { GlobalSearchBar } from './Search/GlobalSearchBar';
import { FilterPanel } from './Search/FilterPanel';
import { SearchResultsOverlay } from './Search/SearchResultsOverlay';
import { Plus } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { MAX_PANELS } from '@/types/panel';

export function PanelContainer() {
  const panels = usePanels();
  const activePanelId = useActivePanelId();
  const { addPanel, removePanel, setActivePanel } = usePanelStore();

  const canAddPanel = panels.length < MAX_PANELS;

  return (
    <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col h-full overflow-hidden bg-background">
      {/* Top bar with search */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-4 px-4 py-2 border-b border-border bg-card">
        <GlobalSearchBar />
        
        <Button
          variant="outline"
          size="sm"
          onClick={addPanel}
          disabled={!canAddPanel}
          className="shrink-0 gap-2"
        >
          <Plus className="h-4 w-4" />
          Add Panel
        </Button>
      </div>

      {/* Filter Panel */}
      <FilterPanel />

      {/* Search Results */}
      <SearchResultsOverlay />

      {/* Panels */}
      <div className="flex-1 flex overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden">
        {panels.map((panel, index) => (
          <ResizablePanel
            key={panel.id}
            panel={panel}
            isActive={panel.id === activePanelId}
            isLast={index === panels.length - 1}
            onActivate={() => setActivePanel(panel.id)}
            onClose={() => removePanel(panel.id)}
          />
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/RightPanel.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useAppStore } from '@/stores/appStore';
import { FileManager } from './FileManager';
import { 
  HardDrive, 
  FolderGit, 
  Github, 
  Terminal,
  FileText,
  Database
} from 'lucide-react';

const placeholderContent: Record<string, { title: string; icon: React.ElementType; component?: React.ReactNode }> = {
  storage: {
    title: 'File Manager',
    icon: Database,
    component: <FileManager />,
  },
  drive: {
    title: 'Drive Files',
    icon: FolderGit,
  },
  github: {
    title: 'GitHub Repositories',
    icon: Github,
  },
  terminal: {
    title: 'Terminal Sessions',
    icon: Terminal,
  },
};

function PlaceholderContent({ source }: { source: string }) {
  const content = placeholderContent[source];
  const Icon = content.icon;

  return (
    <div className="flex-1 bg-background p-6 overflow-auto">
      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6">
          <div className="p-3 rounded-xl bg-primary/10 text-primary">
            <Icon className="w-8 h-8" />
          </div>
          <div>
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">{content.title}</h2>
            <p className="text-muted-foreground">Placeholder for {source} content</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="p-8 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card">
          <p className="text-muted-foreground text-center">
            This feature is not yet implemented.
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export function RightPanel() {
  const activeSource = useAppStore((state) => state.activeSource);
  const content = placeholderContent[activeSource];

  // If storage is selected, show FileManager
  if (activeSource === 'storage' && content.component) {
    return (
      <div className="flex-1 h-screen overflow-hidden">
        {content.component}
      </div>
    );
  }

  return <PlaceholderContent source={activeSource} />;
}

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Storage/RootView.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { HardDrive, SdCard, Usb, Network, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { fileSystemBackend } from '@/lib/fileSystemBackend';

interface MountPoint {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  icon: React.ElementType;
  path: string;
  type: 'internal' | 'sdcard' | 'usb' | 'pc';
}

const DEFAULT_MOUNTS: MountPoint[] = [
  { id: 'internal', name: 'Internal Storage', icon: HardDrive, path: '/storage/emulated/0', type: 'internal' },
  { id: 'sdcard', name: 'SD Card', icon: SdCard, path: '/storage/emulated/1', type: 'sdcard' },
  { id: 'usb', name: 'USB OTG', icon: Usb, path: '/storage/usb', type: 'usb' },
  { id: 'pc', name: 'PC / Others', icon: Network, path: '/storage/pc', type: 'pc' },
];

interface RootViewProps {
  panelId: string;
  onMountSelect: (handle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string) => void;
}

export function RootView({ panelId, onMountSelect }: RootViewProps) {
  const [mounts, setMounts] = useState<MountPoint[]>(DEFAULT_MOUNTS);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const handleMountClick = async (mount: MountPoint) => {
    setLoading(mount.id);
    try {
      // For Android, we need to request directory access
      const handle = await fileSystemBackend.pickDirectory();
      if (handle) {
        onMountSelect(handle, mount.name);
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to access mount:', err);
    } finally {
      setLoading(null);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col bg-background">
      <div className="p-4 border-b border-border">
        <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">Storage Sources</h2>
        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Select a storage location to browse</p>
      </div>
      
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto p-4">
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
          {mounts.map((mount) => {
            const Icon = mount.icon;
            const isLoading = loading === mount.id;
            
            return (
              <button
                key={mount.id}
                onClick={() => handleMountClick(mount)}
                disabled={isLoading}
                className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 rounded-xl border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent transition-all group"
              >
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-primary/10 text-primary">
                    <Icon className="w-6 h-6" />
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-left">
                    <p className="font-medium">{mount.name}</p>
                    <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                      {isLoading ? 'Accessing...' : 'Tap to browse'}
                    </p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <ChevronRight className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity" />
              </button>
            );
          })}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Format/FormatDialog.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { AlertTriangle, Clock, Key, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { useAuthStore } from '@/stores/authStore';

interface FormatDialogProps {
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  itemName: string;
  itemType: 'account' | 'storage' | 'github' | 'drive' | 'terminal';
  itemId: string;
  onFormat: () => Promise<void>;
}

export function FormatDialog({ isOpen, onClose, itemName, itemType, itemId, onFormat }: FormatDialogProps) {
  const [step, setStep] = useState<'confirm' | 'timer' | 'password' | 'executing'>('confirm');
  const [timer, setTimer] = useState(30);
  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const verifyActionPassword = useAuthStore((s) => s.verifyActionPassword);

  // Load timer from settings (default 30)
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen) {
      const settings = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('settings') || '{}');
      const formatTimer = settings.formatTimer || 30;
      setTimer(formatTimer);
      setStep('confirm');
      setPassword('');
      setError('');
    }
  }, [isOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    let interval: NodeJS.Timeout;
    if (step === 'timer' && timer > 0) {
      interval = setInterval(() => setTimer(prev => prev - 1), 1000);
    } else if (step === 'timer' && timer === 0) {
      setStep('password');
    }
    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, [step, timer]);

  const handleConfirm = () => setStep('timer');
  const handlePasswordSubmit = async () => {
    if (!verifyActionPassword('format', password)) {
      setError('Invalid password');
      return;
    }
    setStep('executing');
    try {
      await onFormat();
      onClose();
    } catch (err) {
      setError((err as Error).message);
      setStep('password');
    }
  };

  if (!isOpen) return null;

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50">
      <div className="w-full max-w-md bg-card rounded-lg shadow-2xl overflow-hidden">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border bg-destructive/10">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-destructive" />
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-destructive">Format {itemType}</h2>
          </div>
          <button onClick={onClose} className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded">
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
        </div>

        <div className="p-4">
          {step === 'confirm' && (
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <p className="text-sm">
                You are about to <span className="font-bold text-destructive">PERMANENTLY DELETE</span> all data in:
              </p>
              <div className="p-3 bg-muted rounded-lg">
                <p className="font-mono text-sm break-all">{itemName}</p>
                <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">Type: {itemType}</p>
              </div>
              <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">This action is <span className="font-bold">IRREVERSIBLE</span>.</p>
              <div className="flex gap-2 pt-2">
                <Button variant="outline" onClick={onClose}>Cancel</Button>
                <Button variant="destructive" onClick={handleConfirm}>Continue</Button>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {step === 'timer' && (
            <div className="space-y-4 text-center">
              <Clock className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto text-muted-foreground" />
              <p className="text-sm">Wait {timer} seconds to confirm format</p>
              <div className="w-full bg-muted rounded-full h-2">
                <div
                  className="bg-destructive h-2 rounded-full transition-all duration-1000"
                  style={{ width: `${((30 - timer) / 30) * 100}%` }}
                />
              </div>
              <Button variant="outline" onClick={onClose}>Cancel</Button>
            </div>
          )}

          {step === 'password' && (
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <Key className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground" />
                <p className="text-sm">Enter format password to continue</p>
              </div>
              <Input
                type="password"
                value={password}
                onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Format password"
                autoFocus
                onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handlePasswordSubmit()}
              />
              {error && <p className="text-sm text-destructive">{error}</p>}
              <div className="flex gap-2">
                <Button variant="outline" onClick={onClose}>Cancel</Button>
                <Button variant="destructive" onClick={handlePasswordSubmit} disabled={!password}>
                  Confirm Format
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {step === 'executing' && (
            <div className="space-y-4 text-center">
              <div className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto border-4 border-primary border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin" />
              <p className="text-sm">Formatting {itemName}...</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">This may take a few moments</p>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Authority/IdentityMask.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Eye, EyeOff, Lock } from 'lucide-react';
import { useAuthStore } from '@/stores/authStore';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';

interface IdentityMaskProps { originalId: string; type: 'drive' | 'github' | 'storage'; onMaskChange?: (masked: string) => void; }

export function IdentityMask({ originalId, type, onMaskChange }: IdentityMaskProps) {
  const [isMasked, setIsMasked] = useState(false);
  const [customName, setCustomName] = useState('');
  const [showPasswordDialog, setShowPasswordDialog] = useState(false);
  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const verifyActionPassword = useAuthStore((s) => s.verifyActionPassword);

  useEffect(() => {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem(`mask_${type}_${originalId}`);
    if (saved) { const { masked, name } = JSON.parse(saved); setIsMasked(masked); setCustomName(name); if (masked && name) onMaskChange?.(name); }
  }, [originalId, type]);

  const saveMask = (masked: boolean, name: string) => {
    localStorage.setItem(`mask_${type}_${originalId}`, JSON.stringify({ masked, name }));
    setIsMasked(masked); setCustomName(name);
    if (masked && name) onMaskChange?.(name); else if (!masked) onMaskChange?.(originalId);
  };

  const handleToggle = () => setShowPasswordDialog(true);
  const handlePasswordConfirm = () => {
    if (!verifyActionPassword('identity', password)) { setError('Invalid password'); return; }
    if (isMasked) saveMask(false, '');
    else { const name = prompt('Enter custom display name:', originalId.split('@')[0]); if (name && name.trim()) saveMask(true, name.trim()); }
    setShowPasswordDialog(false); setPassword(''); setError('');
  };

  const displayName = isMasked && customName ? customName : originalId.split('@')[0];
  return (
    <>
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2"><span className="text-sm">{displayName}</span><button onClick={handleToggle} className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded transition-colors" title={isMasked ? 'Show real identity' : 'Hide identity'}>{isMasked ? <EyeOff className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" /> : <Eye className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />}</button></div>
      {showPasswordDialog && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50">
          <div className="w-80 bg-card rounded-lg shadow-xl p-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3"><Lock className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" /><h3 className="font-semibold">Identity Protection</h3></div>
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-3">{isMasked ? 'Enter password to reveal real identity' : 'Enter password to set custom display name'}</p>
            <Input type="password" value={password} onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)} placeholder="Identity password" autoFocus onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handlePasswordConfirm()} />
            {error && <p className="text-sm text-destructive mt-2">{error}</p>}
            <div className="flex gap-2 mt-4"><Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setShowPasswordDialog(false)}>Cancel</Button><Button onClick={handlePasswordConfirm}>Confirm</Button></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Link/LinkButton.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Link, Copy, Check, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
import { PanelDialog } from '@/components/ui/PanelDialog';

interface LinkOption {
  type: string;
  label: string;
  url: string;
}

interface LinkButtonProps {
  item: {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    path: string;
    sourceType: 'drive' | 'github';
    accountId?: string;
    repo?: string;
    fileSha?: string;
    mimeType?: string;
  };
  panelId: string;
  onCopy?: (url: string) => void;
}

export function LinkButton({ item, panelId, onCopy }: LinkButtonProps) {
  const [showMenu, setShowMenu] = useState(false);
  const [copiedType, setCopiedType] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [defaultLinkType, setDefaultLinkType] = useState<string>('view');
  const longPressTimer = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem(`default_link_${item.sourceType}_${item.id}`);
    if (saved) setDefaultLinkType(saved);
  }, [item.sourceType, item.id]);

  const generateLinks = (): LinkOption[] => {
    if (item.sourceType === 'drive') {
      const fileId = item.id;
      return [
        { type: 'view', label: 'View Link', url: `https://drive.google.com/file/d/${fileId}/view` },
        { type: 'download', label: 'Download Link', url: `https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=${fileId}` },
        { type: 'share', label: 'Share Link (with permissions)', url: `https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/${fileId}` },
      ];
    }
    if (item.sourceType === 'github') {
      // Extract repo and path from item.path (format: /github/username/repo/rest/of/path)
      const parts = item.path.split('/').filter(Boolean);
      const username = parts[1];
      const repo = parts[2];
      const filePath = parts.slice(3).join('/');
      const repoFull = `${username}/${repo}`;
      return [
        { type: 'view', label: 'File URL', url: `https://github.com/${repoFull}/blob/main/${filePath}` },
        { type: 'raw', label: 'Raw File Link', url: `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/${repoFull}/main/${filePath}` },
        { type: 'repo', label: 'Repository Link', url: `https://github.com/${repoFull}` },
      ];
    }
    return [];
  };

  const links = generateLinks();
  const defaultLink = links.find(l => l.type === defaultLinkType) || links[0];
  if (!defaultLink) return null;

  const handleSingleTap = async () => {
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(defaultLink.url);
    setCopiedType(defaultLink.type);
    setTimeout(() => setCopiedType(null), 2000);
    onCopy?.(defaultLink.url);
  };

  const handleTouchStart = () => {
    longPressTimer.current = setTimeout(() => {
      setShowMenu(true);
    }, 500);
  };

  const handleTouchEnd = () => {
    if (longPressTimer.current) {
      clearTimeout(longPressTimer.current);
      longPressTimer.current = null;
    }
  };

  const handleMouseDown = (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    if (e.button === 0) {
      longPressTimer.current = setTimeout(() => {
        setShowMenu(true);
      }, 500);
    }
  };

  const handleMouseUp = () => {
    if (longPressTimer.current) {
      clearTimeout(longPressTimer.current);
      longPressTimer.current = null;
    }
  };

  const selectLink = async (option: LinkOption) => {
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(option.url);
    setCopiedType(option.type);
    setTimeout(() => setCopiedType(null), 2000);
    setShowMenu(false);
    onCopy?.(option.url);
  };

  const setAsDefault = (type: string) => {
    setDefaultLinkType(type);
    localStorage.setItem(`default_link_${item.sourceType}_${item.id}`, type);
  };

  return (
    <>
      <button
        onClick={handleSingleTap}
        onTouchStart={handleTouchStart}
        onTouchEnd={handleTouchEnd}
        onMouseDown={handleMouseDown}
        onMouseUp={handleMouseUp}
        className="p-1.5 rounded hover:bg-accent transition-colors group relative"
        title={copiedType ? `Copied ${copiedType} link!` : `Tap to copy ${defaultLink.label}, long press for options`}
      >
        {copiedType ? (
          <Check className="w-4 h-4 text-green-500" />
        ) : (
          <Link className="w-4 h-4 text-primary" />
        )}
      </button>

      <PanelDialog
        isOpen={showMenu}
        onClose={() => setShowMenu(false)}
        panelId={panelId}
        title="Select Link Type"
      >
        <div className="space-y-1">
          {links.map(link => (
            <div
              key={link.type}
              className="flex items-center justify-between p-2 rounded hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer"
              onClick={() => selectLink(link)}
            >
              <span className="text-sm">{link.label}</span>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                {defaultLinkType === link.type && (
                  <span className="text-xs text-primary font-medium">Default</span>
                )}
                <button
                  onClick={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    setAsDefault(link.type);
                  }}
                  className="text-xs text-muted-foreground hover:text-primary"
                >
                  Set default
                </button>
                <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </PanelDialog>
    </>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Delete/DeleteDialog.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { AlertTriangle, Clock, Key, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { useAuthStore } from '@/stores/authStore';

interface DeleteDialogProps {
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  itemName: string;
  itemPath: string;
  onDelete: () => Promise<void>;
}

export function DeleteDialog({ isOpen, onClose, itemName, itemPath, onDelete }: DeleteDialogProps) {
  const [step, setStep] = useState<'confirm' | 'timer' | 'password' | 'executing'>('confirm');
  const [timer, setTimer] = useState(10);
  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const [requirePassword, setRequirePassword] = useState(false);
  const verifyActionPassword = useAuthStore((s) => s.verifyActionPassword);

  // Load settings from localStorage
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen) {
      const settings = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('settings') || '{}');
      const deleteTimer = settings.deleteTimer || 10;
      setTimer(deleteTimer);
      setRequirePassword(settings.requireDeletePassword || false);
      setStep('confirm');
      setPassword('');
      setError('');
    }
  }, [isOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    let interval: NodeJS.Timeout;
    if (step === 'timer' && timer > 0) {
      interval = setInterval(() => setTimer(prev => prev - 1), 1000);
    } else if (step === 'timer' && timer === 0) {
      if (requirePassword) {
        setStep('password');
      } else {
        executeDelete();
      }
    }
    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, [step, timer, requirePassword]);

  const executeDelete = async () => {
    setStep('executing');
    try {
      await onDelete();
      onClose();
    } catch (err) {
      setError((err as Error).message);
      setStep('confirm');
    }
  };

  const handleConfirm = () => setStep('timer');
  const handlePasswordSubmit = async () => {
    if (!verifyActionPassword('delete', password)) {
      setError('Invalid password');
      return;
    }
    await executeDelete();
  };

  if (!isOpen) return null;

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50">
      <div className="w-full max-w-md bg-card rounded-lg shadow-2xl overflow-hidden">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border bg-destructive/10">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-destructive" />
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-destructive">Delete</h2>
          </div>
          <button onClick={onClose} className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded">
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
        </div>

        <div className="p-4">
          {step === 'confirm' && (
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <p className="text-sm">
                Are you sure you want to delete <span className="font-bold">{itemName}</span>?
              </p>
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground break-all">{itemPath}</p>
              <div className="flex gap-2 pt-2">
                <Button variant="outline" onClick={onClose}>Cancel</Button>
                <Button variant="destructive" onClick={handleConfirm}>Delete</Button>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {step === 'timer' && (
            <div className="space-y-4 text-center">
              <Clock className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto text-muted-foreground" />
              <p className="text-sm">Wait {timer} seconds to confirm deletion</p>
              <div className="w-full bg-muted rounded-full h-2">
                <div
                  className="bg-destructive h-2 rounded-full transition-all duration-1000"
                  style={{ width: `${((10 - timer) / 10) * 100}%` }}
                />
              </div>
              <Button variant="outline" onClick={onClose}>Cancel</Button>
            </div>
          )}

          {step === 'password' && (
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <p className="text-sm">Enter delete password to continue</p>
              <Input
                type="password"
                value={password}
                onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Delete password"
                autoFocus
                onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handlePasswordSubmit()}
              />
              {error && <p className="text-sm text-destructive">{error}</p>}
              <div className="flex gap-2">
                <Button variant="outline" onClick={onClose}>Cancel</Button>
                <Button variant="destructive" onClick={handlePasswordSubmit} disabled={!password}>
                  Confirm Delete
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {step === 'executing' && (
            <div className="space-y-4 text-center">
              <div className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto border-4 border-primary border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin" />
              <p className="text-sm">Deleting {itemName}...</p>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Settings/SettingsPanel.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Settings, ChevronRight, Clock, Globe, Shield } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Switch } from '@/components/ui/switch';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';

interface SettingsPanelProps { isOpen: boolean; onClose: () => void; }
type SourceChangeBehavior = 'root' | 'last' | 'ask';

export function SettingsPanel({ isOpen, onClose }: SettingsPanelProps) {
  const [sourceBehavior, setSourceBehavior] = useState<SourceChangeBehavior>('ask');
  const [timeFormat, setTimeFormat] = useState<'12h'|'24h'>('24h');
  const [dateFormat, setDateFormat] = useState<'MM/DD/YYYY'|'DD/MM/YYYY'|'YYYY-MM-DD'>('YYYY-MM-DD');
  const [darkMode, setDarkMode] = useState(false);
  const [deleteTimer, setDeleteTimer] = useState(10);
  const [formatTimer, setFormatTimer] = useState(30);
  const [requireDeletePassword, setRequireDeletePassword] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('settings');
    if (saved) { const s = JSON.parse(saved); setSourceBehavior(s.sourceBehavior || 'ask'); setTimeFormat(s.timeFormat || '24h'); setDateFormat(s.dateFormat || 'YYYY-MM-DD'); setDarkMode(s.darkMode || false); setDeleteTimer(s.deleteTimer || 10); setFormatTimer(s.formatTimer || 30); setRequireDeletePassword(s.requireDeletePassword || false); }
  }, []);

  const saveSettings = () => {
    const settings = { sourceBehavior, timeFormat, dateFormat, darkMode, deleteTimer, formatTimer, requireDeletePassword };
    localStorage.setItem('settings', JSON.stringify(settings));
    if (darkMode) document.documentElement.classList.add('dark'); else document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark');
    window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('settingsChanged', { detail: settings }));
    onClose();
  };

  if (!isOpen) return null;
  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50">
      <div className="w-full max-w-md bg-card rounded-lg shadow-2xl overflow-hidden">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border"><div className="flex items-center gap-2"><Settings className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" /><h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">Settings</h2></div><button onClick={onClose} className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded"><ChevronRight className="w-5 h-5" /></button></div>
        <div className="p-4 space-y-4 max-h-[70vh] overflow-auto">
          <div><label className="text-sm font-medium">Source Change Behavior</label><Select value={sourceBehavior} onValueChange={(v) => setSourceBehavior(v as any)}><SelectTrigger className="mt-1"><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger><SelectContent><SelectItem value="root">Always start from root</SelectItem><SelectItem value="last">Continue from last used path</SelectItem><SelectItem value="ask">Ask every time</SelectItem></SelectContent></Select><p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">When switching sources in a panel</p></div>
          <div><label className="text-sm font-medium">Time Format</label><Select value={timeFormat} onValueChange={(v) => setTimeFormat(v as any)}><SelectTrigger className="mt-1"><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger><SelectContent><SelectItem value="12h">12-hour (hh:mm AM/PM)</SelectItem><SelectItem value="24h">24-hour (HH:mm)</SelectItem></SelectContent></Select></div>
          <div><label className="text-sm font-medium">Date Format</label><Select value={dateFormat} onValueChange={(v) => setDateFormat(v as any)}><SelectTrigger className="mt-1"><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger><SelectContent><SelectItem value="MM/DD/YYYY">MM/DD/YYYY</SelectItem><SelectItem value="DD/MM/YYYY">DD/MM/YYYY</SelectItem><SelectItem value="YYYY-MM-DD">YYYY-MM-DD</SelectItem></SelectContent></Select></div>
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between"><div><label className="text-sm font-medium">Dark Mode</label><p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Dark theme for the interface</p></div><Switch checked={darkMode} onCheckedChange={setDarkMode} /></div>
          <div><label className="text-sm font-medium">Delete Timer (seconds)</label><input type="number" value={deleteTimer} onChange={(e) => setDeleteTimer(Number(e.target.value))} className="w-full mt-1 px-3 py-2 border rounded-md bg-background" min={0} max={60} /></div>
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between"><div><label className="text-sm font-medium">Require Delete Password</label><p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Ask for password before delete</p></div><Switch checked={requireDeletePassword} onCheckedChange={setRequireDeletePassword} /></div>
          <div><label className="text-sm font-medium">Format Timer (seconds)</label><input type="number" value={formatTimer} onChange={(e) => setFormatTimer(Number(e.target.value))} className="w-full mt-1 px-3 py-2 border rounded-md bg-background" min={0} max={120} /></div>
        </div>
        <div className="p-4 border-t border-border flex gap-2"><Button variant="outline" onClick={onClose} className="flex-1">Cancel</Button><Button onClick={saveSettings} className="flex-1">Save</Button></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
