FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/lib/promptUploadEngine.ts.bak
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useGitHubStore } from '@/stores/githubStore';
import { githubApi } from './githubApi';

export interface UploadResult { folderPath: string; shareLink: string; rawLink?: string; }

export async function uploadToDrive(sessionName: string, promptText: string, linksText: string, files: { name: string; content: Blob }[], accountId: string, onProgress?: (p: number) => void): Promise<UploadResult> {
  const account = useDriveStore.getState().accounts.find(a => a.id === accountId);
  if (!account) throw new Error('Account not found');
  async function findOrCreateFolder(parentId: string, name: string): Promise<string> {
    const query = `name='${name}' and mimeType='application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and '${parentId}' in parents and trashed=false`;
    const res = await fetch(`https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&fields=files(id)`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${account.accessToken}` } });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.files && data.files.length) return data.files[0].id;
    const metadata = { name, mimeType: 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder', parents: [parentId] };
    const createRes = await fetch('https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files', { method: 'POST', headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${account.accessToken}`, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(metadata) });
    const newFolder = await createRes.json();
    return newFolder.id;
  }
  async function uploadFile(folderId: string, fileName: string, blob: Blob) {
    const metadata = { name: fileName, parents: [folderId] };
    const form = new FormData();
    form.append('metadata', new Blob([JSON.stringify(metadata)], { type: 'application/json' }));
    form.append('file', blob);
    await fetch('https://www.googleapis.com/upload/drive/v3/files?uploadType=multipart', { method: 'POST', headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${account.accessToken}` }, body: form });
  }
  onProgress?.(10);
  const proMntId = await findOrCreateFolder('root', 'PRO-MNT');
  onProgress?.(20);
  const sessionFolderId = await findOrCreateFolder(proMntId, sessionName);
  onProgress?.(30);
  await uploadFile(sessionFolderId, 'prompt.txt', new Blob([promptText], { type: 'text/plain' }));
  onProgress?.(40);
  await uploadFile(sessionFolderId, 'links.txt', new Blob([linksText], { type: 'text/plain' }));
  let fileProgress = 40;
  for (let i=0; i<files.length; i++) { await uploadFile(sessionFolderId, files[i].name, files[i].content); fileProgress += 50/files.length; onProgress?.(Math.min(fileProgress,90)); }
  await fetch(`https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files/${sessionFolderId}/permissions`, { method: 'POST', headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${account.accessToken}`, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ role: 'reader', type: 'anyone' }) });
  onProgress?.(100);
  return { folderPath: `PRO-MNT/${sessionName}`, shareLink: `https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/${sessionFolderId}` };
}

export async function uploadToGitHub(sessionName: string, promptText: string, linksText: string, files: { name: string; content: Blob }[], username: string, token: string, onProgress?: (p: number) => void): Promise<UploadResult> {
  githubApi.setToken(token);
  const octokit = (githubApi as any).octokit;
  let repoName = 'PRO-MNT';
  try { await octokit.repos.get({ owner: username, repo: repoName }); } catch { await octokit.repos.createForAuthenticatedUser({ name: repoName, private: false }); }
  onProgress?.(10);
  const { data: repo } = await octokit.repos.get({ owner: username, repo: repoName });
  const defaultBranch = repo.default_branch;
  onProgress?.(20);
  const basePath = sessionName;
  const filesToUpload = [{ path: `${basePath}/prompt.txt`, content: promptText }, { path: `${basePath}/links.txt`, content: linksText }, ...files.map(f => ({ path: `${basePath}/${f.name}`, content: f.content })) ];
  let fileProgress = 20;
  for (let i=0; i<filesToUpload.length; i++) {
    const file = filesToUpload[i];
    const contentBase64 = await new Promise<string>((resolve, reject) => { const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onloadend = () => resolve((reader.result as string).split(',')[1]); reader.onerror = reject; reader.readAsDataURL(typeof file.content === 'string' ? new Blob([file.content]) : file.content); });
    let sha: string | undefined;
    try { const { data: existing } = await octokit.repos.getContent({ owner: username, repo: repoName, path: file.path }); sha = (existing as any).sha; } catch {}
    await octokit.repos.createOrUpdateFileContents({ owner: username, repo: repoName, path: file.path, message: `Add ${file.path}`, content: contentBase64, sha, branch: defaultBranch });
    fileProgress += 70 / filesToUpload.length;
    onProgress?.(Math.min(fileProgress,90));
  }
  const shareLink = `https://github.com/${username}/${repoName}/tree/${defaultBranch}/${basePath}`;
  onProgress?.(100);
  return { folderPath: `${repoName}/${basePath}`, shareLink, rawLink: `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/${username}/${repoName}/${defaultBranch}/${basePath}/prompt.txt` };
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/appStore.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { create } from 'zustand';

export type SourceType = 'storage' | 'drive' | 'github' | 'terminal';

interface AppState {
  activeSource: SourceType;
  setActiveSource: (source: SourceType) => void;
}

export const useAppStore = create<AppState>((set) => ({
  activeSource: 'storage',
  setActiveSource: (source) => set({ activeSource: source }),
}));

// Custom selector hooks for better performance
export const useActiveSource = () => useAppStore((state) => state.activeSource);
export const useSetActiveSource = () => useAppStore((state) => state.setActiveSource);
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/authStore.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import CryptoJS from 'crypto-js';
import { User, Session, ActionPassword, TokenExpiry } from '@/types/auth';
import { openDB } from 'idb';

const ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH = '5e884898da28047151d0e56f8dc6292773603d0d6aabbdd62a11ef721d1542d8'; // "password"

interface AuthState {
  currentUser: User | null;
  currentSession: Session | null;
  isAuthenticated: boolean;
  users: User[];
  actionPasswords: ActionPassword[];
  tokenExpiries: TokenExpiry[];
  isAdminRoute: boolean;
}

interface AuthActions {
  // Auth
  login: (username: string, password: string) => Promise<boolean>;
  logout: () => Promise<void>;
  adminLogin: (password: string) => boolean;
  adminLogout: () => void;
  
  // Users
  createUser: (username: string, password: string, role?: 'admin' | 'user') => Promise<void>;
  updateUser: (userId: string, updates: Partial<User>) => Promise<void>;
  deleteUser: (userId: string) => Promise<void>;
  getUsers: () => User[];
  
  // Action passwords
  setActionPassword: (action: string, password: string, required: boolean) => void;
  verifyActionPassword: (action: string, password: string) => boolean;
  
  // Token expiry
  addTokenExpiry: (expiry: TokenExpiry) => void;
  removeTokenExpiry: (accountId: string) => void;
  checkTokenExpiries: () => TokenExpiry[];
  
  // Session
  getSessionLogs: () => LogEntry[];
  exportSession: () => Promise<Blob>;
  
  // Admin check
  checkIsAdmin: () => boolean;
}

const hashPassword = (password: string): string => {
  return CryptoJS.SHA256(password).toString();
};

const DB_NAME = 'auth-db';
const DB_VERSION = 1;

export const useAuthStore = create<AuthState & AuthActions>()(
  immer((set, get) => ({
    // State
    currentUser: null,
    currentSession: null,
    isAuthenticated: false,
    users: [],
    actionPasswords: [],
    tokenExpiries: [],
    isAdminRoute: false,

    // Auth
    login: async (username, password) => {
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      const user = await db.get('users', username);
      
      if (!user || !user.isActive) return false;
      
      const passwordHash = hashPassword(password);
      if (user.passwordHash !== passwordHash) return false;
      
      // Create session
      const session: Session = {
        id: `session-${Date.now()}`,
        userId: user.id,
        username: user.username,
        startTime: new Date(),
        logs: [],
      };
      
      // Update last login
      user.lastLogin = new Date();
      await db.put('users', user);
      
      set((state) => {
        state.currentUser = user;
        state.currentSession = session;
        state.isAuthenticated = true;
      });
      
      return true;
    },

    logout: async () => {
      const { currentSession, currentUser } = get();
      
      if (currentSession && currentUser) {
        // Save session logs
        const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
        currentSession.endTime = new Date();
        await db.add('sessions', currentSession);
      }
      
      set((state) => {
        state.currentUser = null;
        state.currentSession = null;
        state.isAuthenticated = false;
      });
    },

    adminLogin: (password) => {
      const hash = hashPassword(password);
      if (hash === ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH) {
        set((state) => {
          state.isAdminRoute = true;
        });
        return true;
      }
      return false;
    },

    adminLogout: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isAdminRoute = false;
      });
    },

    // Users
    createUser: async (username, password, role = 'user') => {
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      
      const existing = await db.get('users', username);
      if (existing) throw new Error('Username already exists');
      
      const user: User = {
        id: `user-${Date.now()}`,
        username,
        passwordHash: hashPassword(password),
        role,
        createdAt: new Date(),
        isActive: true,
      };
      
      await db.put('users', user);
      
      set((state) => {
        state.users.push(user);
      });
    },

    updateUser: async (userId, updates) => {
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      const tx = db.transaction('users', 'readwrite');
      const store = tx.objectStore('users');
      
      const users = await store.getAll();
      const user = users.find(u => u.id === userId);
      if (!user) throw new Error('User not found');
      
      Object.assign(user, updates);
      if (updates.password) {
        user.passwordHash = hashPassword(updates.password);
      }
      
      await store.put(user);
      await tx.done;
    },

    deleteUser: async (userId) => {
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      const tx = db.transaction('users', 'readwrite');
      const store = tx.objectStore('users');
      
      const users = await store.getAll();
      const user = users.find(u => u.id === userId);
      if (user) {
        user.isActive = false;
        await store.put(user);
      }
      
      await tx.done;
    },

    getUsers: () => {
      return get().users;
    },

    // Action passwords
    setActionPassword: (action, password, required) => {
      set((state) => {
        const existing = state.actionPasswords.find(p => p.action === action);
        if (existing) {
          existing.passwordHash = hashPassword(password);
          existing.required = required;
        } else {
          state.actionPasswords.push({
            action: action as any,
            passwordHash: hashPassword(password),
            required,
          });
        }
      });
    },

    verifyActionPassword: (action, password) => {
      const { actionPasswords } = get();
      const config = actionPasswords.find(p => p.action === action);
      
      if (!config || !config.required) return true;
      
      return config.passwordHash === hashPassword(password);
    },

    // Token expiry
    addTokenExpiry: (expiry) => {
      set((state) => {
        const existing = state.tokenExpiries.find(e => e.accountId === expiry.accountId);
        if (existing) {
          Object.assign(existing, expiry);
        } else {
          state.tokenExpiries.push(expiry);
        }
      });
    },

    removeTokenExpiry: (accountId) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.tokenExpiries = state.tokenExpiries.filter(e => e.accountId !== accountId);
      });
    },

    checkTokenExpiries: () => {
      const now = new Date();
      const tenDaysFromNow = new Date(now.getTime() + 10 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
      
      return get().tokenExpiries.filter(e => {
        return e.expiresAt <= tenDaysFromNow && !e.warned;
      });
    },

    // Session
    getSessionLogs: () => {
      return get().currentSession?.logs || [];
    },

    exportSession: async () => {
      const { currentSession, currentUser } = get();
      if (!currentSession || !currentUser) throw new Error('No active session');
      
      const exportData = {
        session: currentSession,
        user: {
          id: currentUser.id,
          username: currentUser.username,
          role: currentUser.role,
        },
        exportedAt: new Date(),
      };
      
      return new Blob([JSON.stringify(exportData, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
    },

    checkIsAdmin: () => {
      const { currentUser, isAdminRoute } = get();
      return isAdminRoute || currentUser?.role === 'admin';
    },
  }))
);

// Initialize DB
const initAuthDB = async () => {
  const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION, {
    upgrade(db) {
      db.createObjectStore('users', { keyPath: 'username' });
      db.createObjectStore('sessions', { keyPath: 'id' });
      db.createObjectStore('logs', { keyPath: 'id' });
    },
  });
  
  // Create default admin if none exists
  const users = await db.getAll('users');
  if (users.length === 0) {
    await db.put('users', {
      id: 'admin-1',
      username: 'admin',
      passwordHash: ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH,
      role: 'admin',
      createdAt: new Date(),
      isActive: true,
    });
  }
  
  return db;
};

initAuthDB();
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/dfolStore.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import { DFOLState, DFOLItem, DFOLMode, DFOLProfile, DFOLOperation, DFOLNotification, DEFAULT_PROFILES } from '@/types/dfol';

interface DFOLStore extends DFOLState {
  // Actions
  enterDFOLMode: () => void;
  exitDFOLMode: () => void;
  toggleItemSelection: (item: DFOLItem) => void;
  selectItem: (item: DFOLItem, operations: DFOLMode[]) => void;
  deselectItem: (itemId: string) => void;
  clearSelection: () => void;
  setItemOperations: (itemId: string, operations: DFOLMode[]) => void;
  setItemProfile: (itemId: string, profileId: string) => void;
  setActiveProfile: (profileId: string) => void;
  addCustomProfile: (profile: DFOLProfile) => void;
  removeCustomProfile: (profileId: string) => void;
  openProfilePanel: () => void;
  closeProfilePanel: () => void;
  openExecutePanel: () => void;
  closeExecutePanel: () => void;
  executeOperations: () => Promise<void>;
  updateOperationStatus: (operationId: string, status: DFOLOperation['status'], progress?: number, message?: string) => void;
  completeOperation: (operationId: string, result: DFOLOperation['result']) => void;
  failOperation: (operationId: string, error: string) => void;
  addNotification: (notification: Omit<DFOLNotification, 'id' | 'timestamp'>) => void;
  dismissNotification: (id: string) => void;
  clearNotifications: () => void;

  // Getters
  getPendingOperations: () => DFOLOperation[];
  getOperationStats: () => { total: number; pending: number; running: number; completed: number; failed: number };
}

const generateTimestamp = () => {
  const now = new Date();
  return now.toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, '-').slice(0, 19);
};

export const useDFOLStore = create<DFOLStore>()(
  immer((set, get) => ({
    isDFOLMode: false,
    selectedItems: [],
    operations: [],
    activeProfile: DEFAULT_PROFILES[0].id,
    customProfiles: [],
    outputDirectory: `/DFOL/${generateTimestamp()}`,
    isExecuting: false,
    isProfilePanelOpen: false,
    isExecutePanelOpen: false,
    globalProgress: 0,
    notifications: [],

    enterDFOLMode: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isDFOLMode = true;
        state.selectedItems = [];
        state.operations = [];
        state.outputDirectory = `/DFOL/${generateTimestamp()}`;
      });
    },

    exitDFOLMode: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isDFOLMode = false;
        state.selectedItems = [];
        state.isProfilePanelOpen = false;
        state.isExecutePanelOpen = false;
        if (!state.isExecuting) {
          state.operations = [];
        }
      });
    },

    toggleItemSelection: (item) => {
      set((state) => {
        const existingIndex = state.selectedItems.findIndex(i => i.id === item.id);
        if (existingIndex >= 0) {
          state.selectedItems.splice(existingIndex, 1);
        } else {
          state.selectedItems.push({ ...item, operations: ['folder'] });
        }
      });
    },

    selectItem: (item, operations) => {
      set((state) => {
        const existingIndex = state.selectedItems.findIndex(i => i.id === item.id);
        if (existingIndex >= 0) {
          state.selectedItems[existingIndex].operations = operations;
        } else {
          state.selectedItems.push({ ...item, operations });
        }
      });
    },

    deselectItem: (itemId) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.selectedItems = state.selectedItems.filter(i => i.id !== itemId);
      });
    },

    clearSelection: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.selectedItems = [];
      });
    },

    setItemOperations: (itemId, operations) => {
      set((state) => {
        const item = state.selectedItems.find(i => i.id === itemId);
        if (item) {
          item.operations = operations;
        }
      });
    },

    setItemProfile: (itemId, profileId) => {
      set((state) => {
        const item = state.selectedItems.find(i => i.id === itemId);
        if (item) {
          item.selectedProfile = profileId;
        }
      });
    },

    setActiveProfile: (profileId) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.activeProfile = profileId;
      });
    },

    addCustomProfile: (profile) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.customProfiles.push(profile);
      });
    },

    removeCustomProfile: (profileId) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.customProfiles = state.customProfiles.filter(p => p.id !== profileId);
      });
    },

    openProfilePanel: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isProfilePanelOpen = true;
      });
    },

    closeProfilePanel: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isProfilePanelOpen = false;
      });
    },

    openExecutePanel: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isExecutePanelOpen = true;
      });
    },

    closeExecutePanel: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isExecutePanelOpen = false;
      });
    },

    executeOperations: async () => {
      const { selectedItems, outputDirectory, activeProfile } = get();

      const operations: DFOLOperation[] = [];
      selectedItems.forEach(item => {
        item.operations.forEach(mode => {
          operations.push({
            id: `${item.id}-${mode}-${Date.now()}`,
            itemId: item.id,
            mode,
            status: 'pending',
            progress: 0,
            message: 'Waiting...',
          });
        });
      });

      set((state) => {
        state.operations = operations;
        state.isExecuting = true;
        state.isExecutePanelOpen = true;
      });

      for (const operation of operations) {
        const item = selectedItems.find(i => i.id === operation.itemId);
        if (!item) continue;

        set((state) => {
          const op = state.operations.find(o => o.id === operation.id);
          if (op) {
            op.status = 'running';
            op.message = 'Starting...';
          }
        });

        try {
          await executeSingleOperation(operation, item, outputDirectory, activeProfile);
        } catch (error) {
          get().failOperation(operation.id, (error as Error).message);
        }
      }

      set((state) => {
        state.isExecuting = false;
        state.globalProgress = 100;
      });

      get().addNotification({
        type: 'success',
        message: `DFOL operations completed. Output: ${outputDirectory}`,
        autoDismiss: true,
      });
    },

    updateOperationStatus: (operationId, status, progress, message) => {
      set((state) => {
        const op = state.operations.find(o => o.id === operationId);
        if (op) {
          op.status = status;
          if (progress !== undefined) op.progress = progress;
          if (message !== undefined) op.message = message;
        }

        const totalOps = state.operations.length;
        const completedOps = state.operations.filter(o => o.status === 'completed').length;
        const runningOps = state.operations.filter(o => o.status === 'running');
        const runningProgress = runningOps.reduce((sum, o) => sum + o.progress, 0) / (runningOps.length || 1);
        state.globalProgress = ((completedOps + runningProgress / 100) / totalOps) * 100;
      });
    },

    completeOperation: (operationId, result) => {
      set((state) => {
        const op = state.operations.find(o => o.id === operationId);
        if (op) {
          op.status = 'completed';
          op.progress = 100;
          op.message = 'Completed';
          op.result = result;
        }
      });
    },

    failOperation: (operationId, error) => {
      set((state) => {
        const op = state.operations.find(o => o.id === operationId);
        if (op) {
          op.status = 'failed';
          op.message = 'Failed';
          op.error = error;
        }
      });

      get().addNotification({
        type: 'error',
        message: `Operation failed: ${error}`,
        operationId,
      });
    },

    addNotification: (notification) => {
      const id = `notif-${Date.now()}`;
      set((state) => {
        state.notifications.push({
          ...notification,
          id,
          timestamp: Date.now(),
        });
      });

      if (notification.autoDismiss) {
        setTimeout(() => {
          get().dismissNotification(id);
        }, 5000);
      }
    },

    dismissNotification: (id) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.notifications = state.notifications.filter(n => n.id !== id);
      });
    },

    clearNotifications: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.notifications = [];
      });
    },

    getPendingOperations: () => {
      return get().operations.filter(o => o.status === 'pending' || o.status === 'running');
    },

    getOperationStats: () => {
      const ops = get().operations;
      return {
        total: ops.length,
        pending: ops.filter(o => o.status === 'pending').length,
        running: ops.filter(o => o.status === 'running').length,
        completed: ops.filter(o => o.status === 'completed').length,
        failed: ops.filter(o => o.status === 'failed').length,
      };
    },
  }))
);

// ----------------------
// EXECUTION HELPERS
// ----------------------
async function executeSingleOperation(
  operation: DFOLOperation,
  item: DFOLItem,
  outputDirectory: string,
  defaultProfile: string
): Promise<void> {
  const store = useDFOLStore.getState();

  switch (operation.mode) {
    case 'folder':
      await executeFolderDump(operation, item, outputDirectory, store);
      break;
    case 'txt':
      await executeTXTDump(operation, item, outputDirectory, store);
      break;
    case 'pdf':
      await executePDFDump(operation, item, outputDirectory, store);
      break;
    case 'compress':
      await executeCompress(operation, item, outputDirectory, item.selectedProfile || defaultProfile, store);
      break;
  }
}

async function executeFolderDump(
  operation: DFOLOperation,
  item: DFOLItem,
  outputDir: string,
  store: any
): Promise<void> {
  store.updateOperationStatus(operation.id, 'running', 0, 'Copying folder structure...');
  for (let i = 0; i <= 100; i += 10) {
    await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 100));
    store.updateOperationStatus(operation.id, 'running', i, `Copying... ${i}%`);
  }
  store.completeOperation(operation.id, {
    outputPath: `${outputDir}/${item.name}_dump/`,
    size: item.size,
  });
}

async function executeTXTDump(
  operation: DFOLOperation,
  item: DFOLItem,
  outputDir: string,
  store: any
): Promise<void> {
  store.updateOperationStatus(operation.id, 'running', 0, 'Generating text dump...');
  let content = `DFOL TEXT DUMP\n==============\n\n`;
  content += `Source: ${item.name}\n`;
  content += `Type: ${item.type}\n`;
  content += `Date: ${new Date().toISOString()}\n\n`;
  content += `\n\nEND OF DUMP`;
  const blob = new Blob([content], { type: 'text/plain' });
  const outputPath = `${outputDir}/${item.name}.txt`;
  store.completeOperation(operation.id, {
    outputPath,
    size: blob.size,
  });
}

async function executePDFDump(
  operation: DFOLOperation,
  item: DFOLItem,
  outputDir: string,
  store: any
): Promise<void> {
  store.updateOperationStatus(operation.id, 'running', 0, 'Generating PDF dump...');
  const { jsPDF } = await import('jspdf');
  const doc = new jsPDF();
  doc.setFontSize(20);
  doc.text('DFOL PDF DUMP', 14, 20);
  doc.setFontSize(10);
  doc.text(`Source: ${item.name}`, 14, 30);
  doc.text(`Date: ${new Date().toLocaleString()}`, 14, 36);
  const pdfBlob = doc.output('blob');
  const outputPath = `${outputDir}/${item.name}.pdf`;
  store.completeOperation(operation.id, {
    outputPath,
    size: pdfBlob.size,
  });
}

async function executeCompress(
  operation: DFOLOperation,
  item: DFOLItem,
  outputDir: string,
  profileId: string,
  store: any
): Promise<void> {
  const profile = [...DEFAULT_PROFILES, ...useDFOLStore.getState().customProfiles]
    .find(p => p.id === profileId);
  if (!profile) throw new Error('Profile not found');

  store.updateOperationStatus(operation.id, 'running', 0, `Compressing with ${profile.name}...`);
  // Simulate compression
  for (let i = 0; i <= 100; i += 20) {
    await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 200));
    store.updateOperationStatus(operation.id, 'running', i, `Compressing... ${i}%`);
  }
  store.completeOperation(operation.id, {
    outputPath: `${outputDir}/${item.name}.${profile.format}`,
    size: item.size,
  });
}

// ----------------------
// SELECTORS (EXPORTS)
// ----------------------
export const useIsDFOLMode = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.isDFOLMode);
export const useDFOLSelectedItems = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.selectedItems);
export const useDFOLProfiles = () => useDFOLStore((s) => [...DEFAULT_PROFILES, ...s.customProfiles]);
export const useDFOLActiveProfile = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.activeProfile);
export const useDFOLOperations = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.operations);
export const useDFOLGlobalProgress = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.globalProgress);
export const useDFOLIsExecuting = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.isExecuting);
export const useDFOLNotifications = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.notifications);
export const useDFOLCustomProfiles = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.customProfiles);
export const useDFOLIsProfilePanelOpen = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.isProfilePanelOpen);
export const useDFOLIsExecutePanelOpen = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.isExecutePanelOpen);
export const useDFOLOutputDirectory = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.outputDirectory);
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/dragDropStore.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import { DragDropState, DragDropActions, SelectedItem } from '@/types/dragDrop';

interface DragDropStore extends DragDropState, DragDropActions {}

export const useDragDropStore = create<DragDropStore>()(
  immer((set, get) => ({
    // State
    isDragging: false,
    isDragMode: false,
    selectedItems: [],
    dragSourcePanel: null,
    dragImagePosition: null,
    pendingOperation: null,
    targetPanel: null,
    showConfirmDialog: false,

    // Actions
    enterDragMode: (panelId) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isDragMode = true;
        state.dragSourcePanel = panelId;
        state.selectedItems = [];
      });
    },

    exitDragMode: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isDragMode = false;
        state.isDragging = false;
        state.selectedItems = [];
        state.dragSourcePanel = null;
        state.dragImagePosition = null;
        state.pendingOperation = null;
        state.targetPanel = null;
        state.showConfirmDialog = false;
      });
    },

    toggleSelection: (item) => {
      set((state) => {
        const existingIndex = state.selectedItems.findIndex(
          (i) => i.id === item.id && i.panelId === item.panelId
        );
        
        if (existingIndex >= 0) {
          state.selectedItems.splice(existingIndex, 1);
        } else {
          state.selectedItems.push(item);
        }
      });
    },

    clearSelection: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.selectedItems = [];
      });
    },

    selectAll: (items) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.selectedItems = items;
      });
    },

    startDrag: (panelId, position) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isDragging = true;
        state.dragSourcePanel = panelId;
        state.dragImagePosition = position;
      });
    },

    endDrag: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isDragging = false;
        state.dragImagePosition = null;
      });
    },

    setDragImagePosition: (position) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.dragImagePosition = position;
      });
    },

    setTargetPanel: (panelId) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.targetPanel = panelId;
      });
    },

    showConfirm: (operation) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.pendingOperation = operation;
        state.showConfirmDialog = true;
      });
    },

    hideConfirm: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.showConfirmDialog = false;
        state.pendingOperation = null;
      });
    },

    confirmOperation: () => {
      // This will be handled by the panel that receives the drop
      set((state) => {
        state.showConfirmDialog = false;
      });
    },

    cancelOperation: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isDragging = false;
        state.pendingOperation = null;
        state.targetPanel = null;
        state.showConfirmDialog = false;
        state.dragImagePosition = null;
      });
    },
  }))
);

// Selectors
export const useIsDragMode = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.isDragMode);
export const useIsDragging = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.isDragging);
export const useSelectedItems = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.selectedItems);
export const useDragSourcePanel = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.dragSourcePanel);
export const useDragImagePosition = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.dragImagePosition);
export const usePendingOperation = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.pendingOperation);
export const useTargetPanel = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.targetPanel);
export const useShowConfirmDialog = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.showConfirmDialog);
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/driveStore.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import { 
  GoogleAccount, 
  DriveFile, 
  DriveFolder,
  DriveViewMode,
  DriveSortBy,
  DrivePanelState 
} from '@/types/drive';
import { driveApi } from '@/lib/googleDriveApi';

interface DriveStore extends DrivePanelState {
  // Actions
  addAccount: (account: GoogleAccount) => void;
  removeAccount: (id: string) => void;
  setActiveAccount: (id: string | null) => void;
  setCurrentFolder: (folderId: string, folderName?: string) => Promise<void>;
  navigateToFolder: (file: DriveFile) => Promise<void>;
  navigateBack: () => Promise<void>;
  navigateToRoot: () => void;
  setViewMode: (mode: DriveViewMode) => void;
  setSortBy: (sort: DriveSortBy) => void;
  refreshCurrent: () => Promise<void>;
  logout: () => void;
  
  // Getters
  getActiveAccount: () => GoogleAccount | undefined;
  getSortedFiles: () => DriveFile[];
  getCurrentFolderName: () => string;
}

const createInitialState = (): DrivePanelState => ({
  accounts: [],
  activeAccountId: null,
  currentFolderId: 'root',
  currentPath: [],
  files: [],
  viewMode: 'list',
  sortBy: 'name-asc',
  isLoading: false,
  error: null,
});

export const useDriveStore = create<DriveStore>()(
  immer((set, get) => ({
    ...createInitialState(),

    addAccount: (account) => {
      set((state) => {
        // Check if account already exists
        const existingIndex = state.accounts.findIndex(a => a.id === account.id);
        if (existingIndex >= 0) {
          // Update existing account with new token
          state.accounts[existingIndex] = account;
        } else {
          state.accounts.push(account);
        }
        // Set as active if no active account
        if (!state.activeAccountId) {
          state.activeAccountId = account.id;
        }
      });
      // Load root files for new account
      get().setCurrentFolder('root', 'My Drive');
    },

    removeAccount: (id) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.accounts = state.accounts.filter(a => a.id !== id);
        if (state.activeAccountId === id) {
          state.activeAccountId = state.accounts[0]?.id || null;
        }
      });
    },

    setActiveAccount: (id) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.activeAccountId = id;
        state.currentFolderId = 'root';
        state.currentPath = [];
        state.files = [];
      });
      if (id) {
        get().setCurrentFolder('root', 'My Drive');
      }
    },

    setCurrentFolder: async (folderId, folderName) => {
      const { activeAccountId, accounts } = get();
      if (!activeAccountId) return;

      const account = accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId);
      if (!account) return;

      set((state) => {
        state.isLoading = true;
        state.error = null;
      });

      try {
        const files = await driveApi.listFiles(account, folderId);
        set((state) => {
          state.currentFolderId = folderId;
          state.files = files;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      } catch (err) {
        set((state) => {
          state.error = (err as Error).message;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      }
    },

    navigateToFolder: async (file) => {
      if (!driveApi.isFolder(file)) return;
      
      const { currentPath } = get();
      
      set((state) => {
        state.currentPath.push({ id: state.currentFolderId, name: state.currentPath.length === 0 ? 'My Drive' : file.name });
      });
      
      await get().setCurrentFolder(file.id, file.name);
    },

    navigateBack: async () => {
      const { currentPath } = get();
      if (currentPath.length === 0) return;

      const parent = currentPath[currentPath.length - 1];
      set((state) => {
        state.currentPath.pop();
      });
      
      await get().setCurrentFolder(parent.id, parent.name);
    },

    navigateToRoot: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.currentFolderId = 'root';
        state.currentPath = [];
      });
      get().setCurrentFolder('root', 'My Drive');
    },

    setViewMode: (mode) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.viewMode = mode;
      });
    },

    setSortBy: (sort) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.sortBy = sort;
      });
    },

    refreshCurrent: async () => {
      const { currentFolderId } = get();
      await get().setCurrentFolder(currentFolderId);
    },

    logout: () => {
      set(createInitialState());
    },

    getActiveAccount: () => {
      const { accounts, activeAccountId } = get();
      return accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId);
    },

    getSortedFiles: () => {
      const { files, sortBy } = get();
      const sorted = [...files];
      
      switch (sortBy) {
        case 'name-asc':
          return sorted.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
        case 'name-desc':
          return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));
        case 'modifiedTime':
          return sorted.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.modifiedTime).getTime() - new Date(a.modifiedTime).getTime());
        case 'size':
          return sorted.sort((a, b) => {
            const sizeA = parseInt(a.size || '0', 10);
            const sizeB = parseInt(b.size || '0', 10);
            return sizeB - sizeA;
          });
        default:
          return sorted;
      }
    },

    getCurrentFolderName: () => {
      const { currentPath, currentFolderId } = get();
      if (currentFolderId === 'root') return 'My Drive';
      const current = currentPath[currentPath.length - 1];
      return current?.name || 'My Drive';
    },
  }))
);

// Selectors
export const useDriveAccounts = () => useDriveStore((s) => s.accounts);
export const useDriveActiveAccount = () => useDriveStore((s) => s.getActiveAccount());
export const useDriveFiles = () => useDriveStore((s) => s.getSortedFiles());
export const useDriveViewMode = () => useDriveStore((s) => s.viewMode);
export const useDriveSortBy = () => useDriveStore((s) => s.sortBy);
export const useDriveCurrentPath = () => useDriveStore((s) => s.currentPath);
export const useDriveIsLoading = () => useDriveStore((s) => s.isLoading);
export const useDriveError = () => useDriveStore((s) => s.error);
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/githubStore.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import { 
  GitHubAccount, 
  GitHubRepository, 
  GitHubContent,
  GitHubViewMode,
  GitHubSortBy,
  GitHubPanelState,
  GitHubPermission 
} from '@/types/github';
import { githubApi } from '@/lib/githubApi';
import { githubStorage } from '@/lib/githubStorage';

interface GitHubStore extends GitHubPanelState {
  // Actions
  loadAccounts: () => Promise<void>;
  addAccount: (username: string, token: string) => Promise<void>;
  removeAccount: (id: string) => Promise<void>;
  setActiveAccount: (id: string | null) => void;
  loadRepositories: () => Promise<void>;
  selectRepository: (repo: GitHubRepository) => Promise<void>;
  navigateToPath: (path: string) => Promise<void>;
  navigateBack: () => Promise<void>;
  navigateToRoot: () => void;
  openFile: (file: GitHubContent) => Promise<void>;
  closeFile: () => void;
  setViewMode: (mode: GitHubViewMode) => void;
  setSortBy: (sort: GitHubSortBy) => void;
  refreshCurrent: () => Promise<void>;
  logout: () => void;
  
  // Getters
  getActiveAccount: () => GitHubAccount | undefined;
  getSortedRepositories: () => GitHubRepository[];
  getSortedContents: () => GitHubContent[];
  getCurrentBreadcrumb: () => string[];
  canGoBack: () => boolean;
}

const createInitialState = (): GitHubPanelState => ({
  accounts: [],
  activeAccountId: null,
  currentRepository: null,
  currentPath: '',
  pathHistory: [],
  repositories: [],
  contents: [],
  viewMode: 'list',
  sortBy: 'updated',
  isLoading: false,
  error: null,
  fileContent: null,
  fileName: null,
});

export const useGitHubStore = create<GitHubStore>()(
  immer((set, get) => ({
    ...createInitialState(),

    loadAccounts: async () => {
      const accounts = await githubStorage.getAllAccounts();
      set((state) => {
        state.accounts = accounts;
      });
    },

    addAccount: async (username, token) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isLoading = true;
        state.error = null;
      });

      try {
        // Validate token and get user info
        const userInfo = await githubApi.authenticate(token);
        
        // Check if account already exists
        const existing = get().accounts.find(a => a.id === userInfo.username);
        if (existing) {
          throw new Error('Account already exists');
        }

        const account: GitHubAccount = {
          id: userInfo.username,
          token,
          avatarUrl: userInfo.avatarUrl,
          permissions: 'read', // Will be updated based on token scopes
          addedAt: Date.now(),
        };

        // Save to encrypted storage
        await githubStorage.saveAccount(account);

        set((state) => {
          state.accounts.push(account);
          state.activeAccountId = account.id;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });

        // Load repositories for new account
        await get().loadRepositories();
      } catch (err) {
        set((state) => {
          state.error = (err as Error).message;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
        throw err;
      }
    },

    removeAccount: async (id) => {
      await githubStorage.deleteAccount(id);
      set((state) => {
        state.accounts = state.accounts.filter(a => a.id !== id);
        if (state.activeAccountId === id) {
          state.activeAccountId = null;
          state.currentRepository = null;
          state.currentPath = '';
          state.pathHistory = [];
          state.repositories = [];
          state.contents = [];
        }
      });
    },

    setActiveAccount: (id) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.activeAccountId = id;
        state.currentRepository = null;
        state.currentPath = '';
        state.pathHistory = [];
        state.contents = [];
        state.fileContent = null;
        state.fileName = null;
      });
      
      if (id) {
        get().loadRepositories();
      }
    },

    loadRepositories: async () => {
      const { activeAccountId, accounts } = get();
      if (!activeAccountId) return;

      const account = accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId);
      if (!account) return;

      set((state) => {
        state.isLoading = true;
        state.error = null;
      });

      try {
        githubApi.setToken(account.token);
        const repos = await githubApi.listRepositories(account.id);
        set((state) => {
          state.repositories = repos;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      } catch (err) {
        set((state) => {
          state.error = (err as Error).message;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      }
    },

    selectRepository: async (repo) => {
      const { activeAccountId, accounts } = get();
      if (!activeAccountId) return;

      const account = accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId);
      if (!account) return;

      set((state) => {
        state.isLoading = true;
        state.error = null;
        state.currentRepository = repo.name;
        state.currentPath = '';
        state.pathHistory = [];
        state.fileContent = null;
        state.fileName = null;
      });

      try {
        githubApi.setToken(account.token);
        const contents = await githubApi.getRepositoryContents(account.id, repo.name, '');
        set((state) => {
          state.contents = contents;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      } catch (err) {
        set((state) => {
          state.error = (err as Error).message;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      }
    },

    navigateToPath: async (path) => {
      const { activeAccountId, accounts, currentRepository, currentPath } = get();
      if (!activeAccountId || !currentRepository) return;

      const account = accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId);
      if (!account) return;

      set((state) => {
        state.isLoading = true;
        state.error = null;
        state.pathHistory.push(currentPath);
        state.currentPath = path;
        state.fileContent = null;
        state.fileName = null;
      });

      try {
        githubApi.setToken(account.token);
        const contents = await githubApi.getRepositoryContents(account.id, currentRepository, path);
        set((state) => {
          state.contents = contents;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      } catch (err) {
        set((state) => {
          state.error = (err as Error).message;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      }
    },

    navigateBack: async () => {
      const { pathHistory, activeAccountId, accounts, currentRepository } = get();
      if (pathHistory.length === 0 || !activeAccountId || !currentRepository) {
        // Go back to repository root
        set((state) => {
          state.currentPath = '';
          state.pathHistory = [];
          state.fileContent = null;
          state.fileName = null;
        });
        await get().refreshCurrent();
        return;
      }

      const account = accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId);
      if (!account) return;

      const previousPath = pathHistory[pathHistory.length - 1];

      set((state) => {
        state.isLoading = true;
        state.error = null;
        state.pathHistory.pop();
        state.currentPath = previousPath;
        state.fileContent = null;
        state.fileName = null;
      });

      try {
        githubApi.setToken(account.token);
        const contents = await githubApi.getRepositoryContents(account.id, currentRepository, previousPath);
        set((state) => {
          state.contents = contents;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      } catch (err) {
        set((state) => {
          state.error = (err as Error).message;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      }
    },

    navigateToRoot: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.currentRepository = null;
        state.currentPath = '';
        state.pathHistory = [];
        state.contents = [];
        state.fileContent = null;
        state.fileName = null;
      });
    },

    openFile: async (file) => {
      const { activeAccountId, accounts, currentRepository } = get();
      if (!activeAccountId || !currentRepository || file.type !== 'file') return;

      const account = accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId);
      if (!account) return;

      set((state) => {
        state.isLoading = true;
        state.error = null;
      });

      try {
        githubApi.setToken(account.token);
        const fileData = await githubApi.getFileContent(account.id, currentRepository, file.path);
        set((state) => {
          state.fileContent = fileData.content;
          state.fileName = fileData.name;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      } catch (err) {
        set((state) => {
          state.error = (err as Error).message;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      }
    },

    closeFile: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.fileContent = null;
        state.fileName = null;
      });
    },

    setViewMode: (mode) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.viewMode = mode;
      });
    },

    setSortBy: (sort) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.sortBy = sort;
      });
    },

    refreshCurrent: async () => {
      const { currentRepository, currentPath, activeAccountId, accounts } = get();
      if (!activeAccountId || !currentRepository) {
        await get().loadRepositories();
        return;
      }

      const account = accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId);
      if (!account) return;

      set((state) => {
        state.isLoading = true;
        state.error = null;
      });

      try {
        githubApi.setToken(account.token);
        const contents = await githubApi.getRepositoryContents(account.id, currentRepository, currentPath);
        set((state) => {
          state.contents = contents;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      } catch (err) {
        set((state) => {
          state.error = (err as Error).message;
          state.isLoading = false;
        });
      }
    },

    logout: () => {
      set(createInitialState());
    },

    getActiveAccount: () => {
      const { accounts, activeAccountId } = get();
      return accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId);
    },

    getSortedRepositories: () => {
      const { repositories, sortBy } = get();
      const sorted = [...repositories];
      
      switch (sortBy) {
        case 'name-asc':
          return sorted.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
        case 'name-desc':
          return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));
        case 'updated':
          return sorted.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.pushed_at).getTime() - new Date(a.pushed_at).getTime());
        case 'stars':
          return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.stargazers_count - a.stargazers_count);
        default:
          return sorted;
      }
    },

    getSortedContents: () => {
      const { contents, sortBy } = get();
      const sorted = [...contents];
      
      // Always show folders first, then files
      const folders = sorted.filter(c => c.type === 'dir');
      const files = sorted.filter(c => c.type === 'file');
      
      const sortFn = (a: GitHubContent, b: GitHubContent) => {
        switch (sortBy) {
          case 'name-asc':
            return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
          case 'name-desc':
            return b.name.localeCompare(a.name);
          case 'size':
            return (b.size || 0) - (a.size || 0);
          default:
            return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
        }
      };
      
      return [...folders.sort(sortFn), ...files.sort(sortFn)];
    },

    getCurrentBreadcrumb: () => {
      const { currentPath } = get();
      if (!currentPath) return [];
      return currentPath.split('/').filter(Boolean);
    },

    canGoBack: () => {
      const { currentRepository, currentPath } = get();
      return !!currentRepository && (currentPath !== '' || true); // Can always go back to repo list
    },
  }))
);

// Selectors
export const useGitHubAccounts = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.accounts);
export const useGitHubActiveAccount = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.getActiveAccount());
export const useGitHubRepositories = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.getSortedRepositories());
export const useGitHubContents = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.getSortedContents());
export const useGitHubViewMode = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.viewMode);
export const useGitHubSortBy = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.sortBy);
export const useGitHubCurrentRepo = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.currentRepository);
export const useGitHubFileContent = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.fileContent);
export const useGitHubFileName = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.fileName);
export const useGitHubIsLoading = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.isLoading);
export const useGitHubError = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.error);
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/fileSystemStore.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { 
  FileSystemEntry, 
  FileSystemDirectoryEntry,
  ViewMode, 
  SortBy,
  MountPoint 
} from '@/types/filesystem';
import { fileSystemBackend } from '@/lib/fileSystemBackend';

interface NavigationHistory {
  handle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle;
  name: string;
}

interface FileSystemState {
  // Current state
  currentPath: string;
  currentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle | null;
  entries: FileSystemEntry[];
  viewMode: ViewMode;
  sortBy: SortBy;
  isLoading: boolean;
  error: string | null;
  
  // History for back navigation
  history: NavigationHistory[];
  
  // Mount points (fake root)
  mountPoints: MountPoint[];
  
  // Actions
  setViewMode: (mode: ViewMode) => void;
  setSortBy: (sort: SortBy) => void;
  pickDirectory: () => Promise<void>;
  navigateTo: (entry: FileSystemDirectoryEntry) => Promise<void>;
  navigateBack: () => Promise<void>;
  navigateToRoot: () => void;
  refreshCurrent: () => Promise<void>;
  createFolder: (name: string) => Promise<void>;
  initMountPoints: () => void;
  selectMountPoint: (mountId: string) => Promise<void>;
  
  // Computed
  getSortedEntries: () => FileSystemEntry[];
}

const createFakeMountPoints = (): MountPoint[] => [
  {
    id: 'internal',
    name: 'Internal Storage',
    icon: 'hard-drive',
    handle: null,
    isFake: true,
  },
  {
    id: 'sd-card',
    name: 'SD Card',
    icon: 'sd-card',
    handle: null,
    isFake: true,
  },
];

export const useFileSystemStore = create<FileSystemState>((set, get) => ({
  currentPath: '/',
  currentHandle: null,
  entries: [],
  viewMode: 'list',
  sortBy: 'name-asc',
  isLoading: false,
  error: null,
  history: [],
  mountPoints: createFakeMountPoints(),

  setViewMode: (mode) => set({ viewMode: mode }),
  
  setSortBy: (sort) => set({ sortBy: sort }),

  pickDirectory: async () => {
    set({ isLoading: true, error: null });
    try {
      const handle = await fileSystemBackend.pickDirectory();
      if (handle) {
        const entries = await fileSystemBackend.readDirectory(handle);
        set({ 
          currentHandle: handle,
          currentPath: `/${handle.name}`,
          entries,
          history: [],
          isLoading: false 
        });
      } else {
        set({ isLoading: false });
      }
    } catch (err) {
      set({ error: (err as Error).message, isLoading: false });
    }
  },

  navigateTo: async (entry) => {
    const { currentHandle, history, currentPath } = get();
    if (!currentHandle || entry.kind !== 'directory') return;

    set({ isLoading: true, error: null });
    try {
      const newEntries = await fileSystemBackend.readDirectory(entry.handle as FileSystemDirectoryHandle);
      set({
        currentHandle: entry.handle as FileSystemDirectoryHandle,
        currentPath: `${currentPath}/${entry.name}`,
        entries: newEntries,
        history: [...history, { handle: currentHandle, name: currentPath.split('/').pop() || 'root' }],
        isLoading: false,
      });
    } catch (err) {
      set({ error: (err as Error).message, isLoading: false });
    }
  },

  navigateBack: async () => {
    const { history } = get();
    if (history.length === 0) {
      get().navigateToRoot();
      return;
    }

    const previous = history[history.length - 1];
    set({ isLoading: true, error: null });
    
    try {
      const entries = await fileSystemBackend.readDirectory(previous.handle);
      set({
        currentHandle: previous.handle,
        currentPath: history.length === 1 ? '/' : `/${previous.name}`,
        entries,
        history: history.slice(0, -1),
        isLoading: false,
      });
    } catch (err) {
      set({ error: (err as Error).message, isLoading: false });
    }
  },

  navigateToRoot: () => {
    set({
      currentPath: '/',
      currentHandle: null,
      entries: [],
      history: [],
    });
  },

  refreshCurrent: async () => {
    const { currentHandle } = get();
    if (!currentHandle) return;

    set({ isLoading: true, error: null });
    try {
      const entries = await fileSystemBackend.readDirectory(currentHandle);
      set({ entries, isLoading: false });
    } catch (err) {
      set({ error: (err as Error).message, isLoading: false });
    }
  },

  createFolder: async (name) => {
    const { currentHandle } = get();
    if (!currentHandle) return;

    set({ isLoading: true, error: null });
    try {
      await fileSystemBackend.createDirectory(currentHandle, name);
      await get().refreshCurrent();
    } catch (err) {
      set({ error: (err as Error).message, isLoading: false });
    }
  },

  initMountPoints: () => {
    set({ mountPoints: createFakeMountPoints() });
  },

  selectMountPoint: async (mountId) => {
    const { mountPoints } = get();
    const mount = mountPoints.find(m => m.id === mountId);
    
    if (!mount) return;
    
    // If mount has no handle yet, open picker
    if (!mount.handle) {
      const handle = await fileSystemBackend.pickDirectory();
      if (handle) {
        // Update mount point with handle
        const updatedMounts = mountPoints.map(m => 
          m.id === mountId ? { ...m, handle, isFake: false } : m
        );
        const entries = await fileSystemBackend.readDirectory(handle);
        set({
          mountPoints: updatedMounts,
          currentHandle: handle,
          currentPath: `/${mount.name}`,
          entries,
          history: [],
        });
      }
    } else {
      // Use existing handle
      const entries = await fileSystemBackend.readDirectory(mount.handle);
      set({
        currentHandle: mount.handle,
        currentPath: `/${mount.name}`,
        entries,
        history: [],
      });
    }
  },

  getSortedEntries: () => {
    const { entries, sortBy } = get();
    const sorted = [...entries];
    
    switch (sortBy) {
      case 'name-asc':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
      case 'name-desc':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));
      case 'date':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.lastModified.getTime() - a.lastModified.getTime());
      case 'size':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.size - a.size);
      default:
        return sorted;
    }
  },
}));

// Selectors
export const useCurrentPath = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.currentPath);
export const useCurrentHandle = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.currentHandle);
export const useEntries = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.getSortedEntries());
export const useViewMode = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.viewMode);
export const useSortBy = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.sortBy);
export const useIsLoading = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.isLoading);
export const useHistory = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.history);
export const useMountPoints = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.mountPoints);

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
// DFOL Selectors
export const useIsDFOLMode = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.isDFOLMode);
export const useDFOLSelectedItems = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.selectedItems);
export const useDFOLProfiles = () => useDFOLStore((s) => [...DEFAULT_PROFILES, ...s.customProfiles]);
export const useDFOLActiveProfile = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.activeProfile);
export const useDFOLOperations = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.operations);
export const useDFOLGlobalProgress = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.globalProgress);
export const useDFOLIsExecuting = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.isExecuting);
export const useDFOLNotifications = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.notifications);
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/searchStore.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import Fuse from 'fuse.js';
import MiniSearch from 'minisearch';
import { openDB } from 'idb';
import {
  SearchState,
  SearchFilter,
  SearchResult,
  SearchIndexEntry,
  ExtensionStats,
  BoundPanel,
} from '@/types/search';

interface SearchStore extends SearchState {
  // Search engine instances
  fuse: Fuse<SearchIndexEntry> | null;
  miniSearch: MiniSearch | null;
  
  // Actions
  initializeSearch: () => Promise<void>;
  setQuery: (query: string) => void;
  executeSearch: () => void;
  toggleFilterPanel: () => void;
  setFilters: (filters: Partial<SearchFilter>) => void;
  resetFilters: () => void;
  toggleGlobalMode: () => void;
  setBoundPanels: (panels: BoundPanel[]) => void;
  
  // Index management
  addToIndex: (entries: SearchIndexEntry[]) => Promise<void>;
  removeFromIndex: (ids: string[]) => Promise<void>;
  clearIndex: () => Promise<void>;
  scanSourceForExtensions: (sourceType: string, accountId: string, items: any[]) => Promise<void>;
  updateExtensionStats: (entries: SearchIndexEntry[]) => Promise<void>;
  
  // Recent searches
  addRecentSearch: (query: string) => void;
  clearRecentSearches: () => void;
  
  // Getters
  getFilteredResults: () => SearchResult[];
  getExtensionSuggestions: (query: string) => ExtensionStats[];
  getTopExtensions: (limit?: number) => ExtensionStats[];
}

const DEFAULT_FILTERS: SearchFilter = {
  sources: ['storage', 'drive', 'github', 'terminal'],
  accounts: [],
  extensions: [],
  type: 'all',
  includeHidden: false,
};

const FUSE_CONFIG: Fuse.IFuseOptions<SearchIndexEntry> = {
  keys: [
    { name: 'name', weight: 0.5 },
    { name: 'path', weight: 0.3 },
    { name: 'extension', weight: 0.2 },
  ],
  threshold: 0.3,
  distance: 100,
  includeScore: true,
  includeMatches: true,
  minMatchCharLength: 2,
  useExtendedSearch: true,
};

const MINI_SEARCH_CONFIG = {
  fields: ['name', 'path', 'extension'],
  storeFields: ['id', 'name', 'path', 'sourceType', 'accountId', 'type', 'size', 'lastModified', 'extension'],
  searchOptions: {
    boost: { name: 2, path: 1.5, extension: 1 },
    fuzzy: 0.3,
    prefix: true,
  },
};

// IndexedDB for persistent index
const DB_NAME = 'search-index-db';
const DB_VERSION = 1;

export const useSearchStore = create<SearchStore>()(
  immer((set, get) => ({
    // State
    query: '',
    isSearching: false,
    results: [],
    filters: { ...DEFAULT_FILTERS },
    isFilterPanelOpen: false,
    availableExtensions: [],
    availableAccounts: [],
    recentSearches: [],
    searchHistory: [],
    isGlobalMode: true,
    indexedCount: 0,
    lastIndexUpdate: null,
    boundPanels: [],
    fuse: null,
    miniSearch: null,

    initializeSearch: async () => {
      // Initialize MiniSearch for fast prefix matching
      const miniSearch = new MiniSearch(MINI_SEARCH_CONFIG);
      
      // Load existing index from IndexedDB
      try {
        const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION, {
          upgrade(db) {
            if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains('entries')) {
              db.createObjectStore('entries', { keyPath: 'id' });
            }
            if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains('extensions')) {
              db.createObjectStore('extensions', { keyPath: 'extension' });
            }
            if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains('accounts')) {
              db.createObjectStore('accounts', { keyPath: 'id' });
            }
            if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains('metadata')) {
              db.createObjectStore('metadata', { keyPath: 'key' });
            }
          },
        });

        const entries = await db.getAll('entries');
        if (entries.length > 0) {
          miniSearch.addAll(entries);
          
          const extensions = await db.getAll('extensions');
          const accounts = await db.getAll('accounts');
          
          // Rebuild Fuse index
          const fuse = new Fuse(entries, FUSE_CONFIG);
          
          set((state) => {
            state.fuse = fuse;
            state.miniSearch = miniSearch;
            state.availableExtensions = extensions.map((e: any) => ({
              ...e,
              sources: new Set(e.sources || []),
              accounts: new Set(e.accounts || []),
            }));
            state.availableAccounts = accounts;
            state.indexedCount = entries.length;
            state.lastIndexUpdate = new Date();
          });
        } else {
          set((state) => {
            state.miniSearch = miniSearch;
          });
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Failed to initialize search:', error);
        set((state) => {
          state.miniSearch = miniSearch;
        });
      }
    },

    setQuery: (query) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.query = query;
      });
      
      // Debounced search
      const { executeSearch } = get();
      clearTimeout((window as any).searchTimeout);
      (window as any).searchTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
        executeSearch();
      }, 150);
    },

    executeSearch: () => {
      const { query, fuse, miniSearch, filters, boundPanels } = get();
      
      if (!query.trim() || (!fuse && !miniSearch)) {
        set((state) => {
          state.results = [];
          state.isSearching = false;
        });
        return;
      }

      set((state) => {
        state.isSearching = true;
      });

      let results: SearchResult[] = [];

      // Use MiniSearch for fast prefix/fuzzy matching
      if (miniSearch) {
        const miniResults = miniSearch.search(query, {
          boost: { name: 2, path: 1.5 },
          fuzzy: 0.2,
          prefix: true,
        });

        results = miniResults.map((r: any) => ({
          item: r as SearchIndexEntry,
          score: r.score,
          matches: [],
        }));
      }

      // Use Fuse for advanced fuzzy matching if MiniSearch results are insufficient
      if (fuse && results.length < 20) {
        const fuseResults = fuse.search(query);
        
        // Merge and deduplicate
        const existingIds = new Set(results.map(r => r.item.id));
        const additionalResults = fuseResults
          .filter(r => !existingIds.has(r.item.id))
          .map(r => ({
            item: r.item,
            score: r.score || 0,
            matches: (r.matches || []).map((m: any) => ({
              key: m.key,
              value: m.value,
              indices: m.indices,
            })),
          }));
        
        results = [...results, ...additionalResults];
      }

      // Apply filters
      results = results.filter(r => {
        const item = r.item;
        
        // Source filter
        if (!filters.sources.includes(item.sourceType)) return false;
        
        // Account filter
        if (filters.accounts.length > 0 && !filters.accounts.includes(item.accountId)) return false;
        
        // Extension filter
        if (filters.extensions.length > 0 && !filters.extensions.includes(item.extension)) return false;
        
        // Type filter
        if (filters.type !== 'all' && item.type !== filters.type) return false;
        
        // Size filter
        if (filters.minSize !== undefined && item.size < filters.minSize) return false;
        if (filters.maxSize !== undefined && item.size > filters.maxSize) return false;
        
        // Date filter
        if (filters.dateFrom && item.lastModified < filters.dateFrom) return false;
        if (filters.dateTo && item.lastModified > filters.dateTo) return false;
        
        // Hidden filter
        if (!filters.includeHidden && item.metadata?.isHidden) return false;
        
        return true;
      });

      // Apply boundPanels filter
      if (boundPanels.length > 0) {
        results = results.filter(r => {
          return boundPanels.some(bp => 
            bp.source === r.item.sourceType &&
            (bp.accountId === null || bp.accountId === r.item.accountId)
          );
        });
      }

      // Sort by score
      results.sort((a, b) => a.score - b.score);

      set((state) => {
        state.results = results.slice(0, 100); // Limit to top 100
        state.isSearching = false;
      });
    },

    toggleFilterPanel: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isFilterPanelOpen = !state.isFilterPanelOpen;
      });
    },

    setFilters: (newFilters) => {
      set((state) => {
        Object.assign(state.filters, newFilters);
      });
      get().executeSearch();
    },

    resetFilters: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.filters = { ...DEFAULT_FILTERS };
      });
      get().executeSearch();
    },

    toggleGlobalMode: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isGlobalMode = !state.isGlobalMode;
        if (state.isGlobalMode) {
          state.filters.sources = ['storage', 'drive', 'github', 'terminal'];
          state.filters.accounts = [];
        }
      });
      get().executeSearch();
    },

    setBoundPanels: (panels) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.boundPanels = panels;
      });
      get().executeSearch();
    },

    addToIndex: async (entries) => {
      const { miniSearch } = get();
      
      // Add to search engines
      miniSearch?.addAll(entries);
      
      // Get all documents from MiniSearch for Fuse rebuild
      const allDocs = miniSearch 
        ? Array.from((miniSearch as any)._documentStore?.docs?.values() || [])
        : entries;
      
      // Rebuild Fuse index
      const newFuse = new Fuse(allDocs, FUSE_CONFIG);

      // Persist to IndexedDB
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      const tx = db.transaction('entries', 'readwrite');
      const store = tx.objectStore('entries');
      
      for (const entry of entries) {
        await store.put(entry);
      }
      
      await tx.done;

      // Update extension stats
      await get().updateExtensionStats(entries);

      set((state) => {
        state.fuse = newFuse;
        state.indexedCount = (state.indexedCount || 0) + entries.length;
        state.lastIndexUpdate = new Date();
      });
    },

    removeFromIndex: async (ids) => {
      const { miniSearch } = get();
      
      ids.forEach(id => miniSearch?.remove({ id }));
      
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      const tx = db.transaction('entries', 'readwrite');
      const store = tx.objectStore('entries');
      
      for (const id of ids) {
        await store.delete(id);
      }
      
      await tx.done;

      set((state) => {
        state.indexedCount = Math.max(0, (state.indexedCount || 0) - ids.length);
      });
    },

    clearIndex: async () => {
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      
      await db.clear('entries');
      await db.clear('extensions');
      await db.clear('accounts');
      
      set((state) => {
        state.fuse = null;
        state.miniSearch = null;
        state.availableExtensions = [];
        state.availableAccounts = [];
        state.indexedCount = 0;
        state.results = [];
      });
    },

    scanSourceForExtensions: async (sourceType, accountId, items) => {
      const extensionMap = new Map<string, ExtensionStats>();
      const accountSet = new Set<string>();

      const processItem = (item: any, path: string = '') => {
        const ext = item.name?.includes('.') 
          ? item.name.slice(item.name.lastIndexOf('.')).toLowerCase()
          : '';
        
        if (ext) {
          const existing = extensionMap.get(ext);
          if (existing) {
            existing.count++;
            existing.totalSize += item.size || 0;
            existing.sources.add(sourceType);
            existing.accounts.add(accountId);
          } else {
            extensionMap.set(ext, {
              extension: ext,
              count: 1,
              totalSize: item.size || 0,
              sources: new Set([sourceType]),
              accounts: new Set([accountId]),
            });
          }
        }

        accountSet.add(accountId);

        // Process children
        if (item.children) {
          item.children.forEach((child: any) => 
            processItem(child, `${path}/${item.name}`)
          );
        }
      };

      items.forEach((item: any) => processItem(item));

      // Update store
      const extensions = Array.from(extensionMap.values());
      
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      const tx = db.transaction(['extensions', 'accounts'], 'readwrite');
      
      for (const ext of extensions) {
        const existing = await tx.objectStore('extensions').get(ext.extension);
        if (existing) {
          existing.count += ext.count;
          existing.totalSize += ext.totalSize;
          ext.sources.forEach(s => existing.sources.add(s));
          ext.accounts.forEach(a => existing.accounts.add(a));
          await tx.objectStore('extensions').put({
            ...existing,
            sources: Array.from(existing.sources),
            accounts: Array.from(existing.accounts),
          });
        } else {
          await tx.objectStore('extensions').put({
            ...ext,
            sources: Array.from(ext.sources),
            accounts: Array.from(ext.accounts),
          });
        }
      }

      // Add account
      await tx.objectStore('accounts').put({
        id: accountId,
        sourceType,
        name: accountId,
      });

      await tx.done;

      // Reload from DB
      const allExtensions = await db.getAll('extensions');
      const allAccounts = await db.getAll('accounts');

      set((state) => {
        state.availableExtensions = allExtensions.map((e: any) => ({
          ...e,
          sources: new Set(e.sources || []),
          accounts: new Set(e.accounts || []),
        }));
        state.availableAccounts = allAccounts;
      });
    },

    updateExtensionStats: async (entries: SearchIndexEntry[]) => {
      const extensionMap = new Map<string, ExtensionStats>();

      entries.forEach(entry => {
        if (entry.extension) {
          const existing = extensionMap.get(entry.extension);
          if (existing) {
            existing.count++;
            existing.totalSize += entry.size || 0;
            existing.sources.add(entry.sourceType);
            existing.accounts.add(entry.accountId);
          } else {
            extensionMap.set(entry.extension, {
              extension: entry.extension,
              count: 1,
              totalSize: entry.size || 0,
              sources: new Set([entry.sourceType]),
              accounts: new Set([entry.accountId]),
            });
          }
        }
      });

      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      const tx = db.transaction('extensions', 'readwrite');

      for (const [ext, stats] of extensionMap) {
        const existing = await tx.store.get(ext);
        if (existing) {
          existing.count += stats.count;
          existing.totalSize += stats.totalSize;
          stats.sources.forEach(s => existing.sources.add(s));
          stats.accounts.forEach(a => existing.accounts.add(a));
          await tx.store.put({
            ...existing,
            sources: Array.from(existing.sources),
            accounts: Array.from(existing.accounts),
          });
        } else {
          await tx.store.put({
            ...stats,
            sources: Array.from(stats.sources),
            accounts: Array.from(stats.accounts),
          });
        }
      }

      await tx.done;
    },

    addRecentSearch: (query) => {
      if (!query.trim()) return;
      
      set((state) => {
        state.recentSearches = [
          query,
          ...state.recentSearches.filter(s => s !== query),
        ].slice(0, 10);
      });
    },

    clearRecentSearches: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.recentSearches = [];
      });
    },

    getFilteredResults: () => {
      return get().results;
    },

    getExtensionSuggestions: (query) => {
      const { availableExtensions } = get();
      if (!query) return [];
      
      return availableExtensions.filter(e => 
        e.extension.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase())
      ).sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count);
    },

    getTopExtensions: (limit = 20) => {
      return get().availableExtensions
        .sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count)
        .slice(0, limit);
    },
  }))
);

// Selectors
export const useSearchQuery = () => useSearchStore((s) => s.query);
export const useSearchResults = () => useSearchStore((s) => s.results);
export const useIsSearching = () => useSearchStore((s) => s.isSearching);
export const useSearchFilters = () => useSearchStore((s) => s.filters);
export const useIsFilterPanelOpen = () => useSearchStore((s) => s.isFilterPanelOpen);
export const useAvailableExtensions = () => useSearchStore((s) => s.availableExtensions);
export const useAvailableAccounts = () => useSearchStore((s) => s.availableAccounts);
export const useIsGlobalMode = () => useSearchStore((s) => s.isGlobalMode);
export const useRecentSearches = () => useSearchStore((s) => s.recentSearches);
export const useIndexedCount = () => useSearchStore((s) => s.indexedCount);
export const useBoundPanels = () => useSearchStore((s) => s.boundPanels);

export const useLogStore = create((set) => ({
  logs: [],
  isLiveLogOpen: false,
  notifications: [],
  unreadCount: 0,

  // optional helpers
  addLog: (log) =>
    set((state) => ({
      logs: [...state.logs, log],
