FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/workers/compression.worker.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { expose } from 'comlink';
import { ZipWriter, BlobWriter, BlobReader } from '@zip.js/zip.js';
import * as fflate from 'fflate';

interface CompressionTask {
  item: any;
  profile: {
    format: string;
    compressionLevel: string;
    password?: string;
  };
  outputDir: string;
}

async function compress(task: CompressionTask, onProgress: (progress: number) => void): Promise<{ size: number; checksum: string }> {
  const { item, profile } = task;
  
  // Initialize based on format
  switch (profile.format) {
    case 'zip':
      return await compressZip(item, profile, onProgress);
    case 'tar.gz':
    case 'tar.bz2':
      return await compressTar(item, profile, onProgress);
    default:
      throw new Error(`Format ${profile.format} not yet supported`);
  }
}

async function compressZip(
  item: any, 
  profile: any, 
  onProgress: (p: number) => void
): Promise<{ size: number; checksum: string }> {
  const zipWriter = new ZipWriter(new BlobWriter('application/zip'), {
    level: getCompressionLevel(profile.compressionLevel),
    password: profile.password,
  });

  // Add files to zip
  // This is a simplified version - actual implementation would traverse and add all files
  
  const blob = await zipWriter.close();
  const arrayBuffer = await blob.arrayBuffer();
  
  // Calculate checksum
  const checksum = await calculateChecksum(arrayBuffer);
  
  onProgress(100);
  
  return {
    size: blob.size,
    checksum,
  };
}

async function compressTar(
  item: any,
  profile: any,
  onProgress: (p: number) => void
): Promise<{ size: number; checksum: string }> {
  // Use fflate for gzip/bzip2 compression
  const compression = profile.format === 'tar.gz' ? fflate.gzipSync : fflate.strToU8;
  const level = getCompressionLevel(profile.compressionLevel);
  
  // Build tar archive then compress
  // Simplified implementation
  
  onProgress(100);
  
  return {
    size: 0,
    checksum: '',
  };
}

function getCompressionLevel(level: string): number {
  switch (level) {
    case 'store': return 0;
    case 'fast': return 3;
    case 'normal': return 6;
    case 'maximum': return 9;
    default: return 6;
  }
}

async function calculateChecksum(data: ArrayBuffer): Promise<string> {
  const hashBuffer = await crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256', data);
  const hashArray = Array.from(new Uint8Array(hashBuffer));
  return hashArray.map(b => b.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')).join('');
}

// Web Worker message handler
self.onmessage = async (e) => {
  const { item, profile, outputDir } = e.data as CompressionTask;
  
  try {
    const result = await compress(
      { item, profile, outputDir },
      (progress) => {
        self.postMessage({ type: 'progress', progress });
      }
    );
    
    self.postMessage({ type: 'complete', result });
  } catch (error) {
    self.postMessage({ type: 'error', error: (error as Error).message });
  }
};

export {};
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/workers/extensionScanner.worker.ts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { expose } from 'comlink';

interface ScanResult {
  extensions: Map<string, { count: number; totalSize: number }>;
  totalFiles: number;
  totalSize: number;
}

class ExtensionScanner {
  async scan(items: any[]): Promise<ScanResult> {
    const extensions = new Map<string, { count: number; totalSize: number }>();
    let totalFiles = 0;
    let totalSize = 0;

    const processItem = (item: any) => {
      const ext = this.getExtension(item.name);
      
      if (item.type === 'file' || item.kind === 'file') {
        totalFiles++;
        totalSize += item.size || 0;

        if (ext) {
          const existing = extensions.get(ext);
          if (existing) {
            existing.count++;
            existing.totalSize += item.size || 0;
          } else {
            extensions.set(ext, {
              count: 1,
              totalSize: item.size || 0,
            });
          }
        }
      }

      // Recursively process children
      if (item.children) {
        item.children.forEach(processItem);
      }
    };

    items.forEach(processItem);

    return {
      extensions,
      totalFiles,
      totalSize,
    };
  }

  private getExtension(filename: string): string | null {
    if (!filename || !filename.includes('.')) return null;
    const ext = filename.slice(filename.lastIndexOf('.')).toLowerCase();
    return ext.length > 1 ? ext : null;
  }

  async incrementalScan(
    existingExtensions: Map<string, { count: number; totalSize: number }>,
    newItems: any[]
  ): Promise<ScanResult> {
    const result = await this.scan(newItems);
    
    // Merge with existing
    for (const [ext, stats] of result.extensions) {
      const existing = existingExtensions.get(ext);
      if (existing) {
        existing.count += stats.count;
        existing.totalSize += stats.totalSize;
      } else {
        existingExtensions.set(ext, stats);
      }
    }

    return {
      extensions: existingExtensions,
      totalFiles: result.totalFiles,
      totalSize: result.totalSize,
    };
  }
}

expose(ExtensionScanner);
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/App.tsx
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { BrowserRouter, Routes, Route, Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useEffect } from 'react';
import { MainApp } from './MainApp';
import { AdminPanel } from './components/Admin/AdminPanel';
import { NotificationBell } from './components/Notification/NotificationBell';
import { LiveLogPanel } from './components/Log/LiveLogPanel';
import { useLogStore } from './stores/logStore';

function App() {
  // Initialize logging
  useEffect(() => {
    const { logAction } = useLogStore.getState();
    
    // Log app start
    logAction('app_start', {
      userAgent: navigator.userAgent,
      platform: navigator.platform,
    }, 'system');

    // Setup global error handler
    window.onerror = (message, source, lineno, colno, error) => {
      logAction('uncaught_error', {
        message,
        source,
        lineno,
        colno,
        stack: error?.stack,
      }, 'system');
      return false;
    };

    // Setup unhandled promise rejection handler
    window.onunhandledrejection = (event) => {
      logAction('unhandled_rejection', {
        reason: event.reason?.toString(),
      }, 'system');
    };
  }, []);

  return (
    <BrowserRouter>
      <Routes>
        <Route path="/" element={<MainApp />} />
        <Route path="/admin" element={<AdminPanel />} />
        <Route path="*" element={<Navigate to="/" replace />} />
      </Routes>
      
      {/* Global overlays */}
      <NotificationBell />
      <LiveLogPanel />
    </BrowserRouter>
  );
}

export default App;

import { useState } from 'react';
import { LeftPanel } from '@/components/LeftPanel';
import { PanelContainer } from '@/components/PanelContainer';

import { DragModeIndicator } from '@/components/DragDrop/DragModeIndicator';
import { KeepReplaceDialog } from '@/components/Rename/KeepReplaceDialog';
import { TreeViewModal } from '@/components/Tree/TreeViewModal';
import { DFOLModeIndicator } from '@/components/DFOL/DFOLModeIndicator';
import { ProfilePanel } from '@/components/DFOL/ProfilePanel';
import { ExecutePanel } from '@/components/DFOL/ExecutePanel';
import { NotificationPanel } from '@/components/DFOL/NotificationPanel';
import { GlobalSearchOverlay } from '@/components/Search/GlobalSearchOverlay';
import { NotificationCenter } from '@/components/Notification/NotificationCenter';
import { SettingsPanel } from '@/components/Settings/SettingsPanel';
import { LanguageSettings } from '@/components/Settings/LanguageSettings';
import { PromptManagerPage } from '@/components/PromptManager/PromptManagerPage';

import { Settings, LogOut, Languages, Bell, FileText } from 'lucide-react';
import { useLogStore } from '@/stores/logStore';
import { useAuthStore } from '@/stores/authStore';
import { useLiveLogout } from '@/hooks/useLiveLogout';
import { usePromptStore } from '@/stores/promptStore';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';

export function MainApp() {
  const toggleLiveLog = useLogStore((s) => s.toggleLiveLog);
  const { currentUser } = useAuthStore();
  const { forceLogout } = useLiveLogout();
  const openPromptManager = usePromptStore((s) => s.openPromptManager);
  const [showSettings, setShowSettings] = useState(false);
  const [showLanguageSettings, setShowLanguageSettings] = useState(false);

  return (
    <DragDropProvider>
      <div className="h-screen w-screen bg-background flex overflow-hidden">
        <LeftPanel />
        <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2 border-b border-border bg-card">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              {currentUser && (
                <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                  Logged in as <span className="font-medium">{currentUser.username}</span>
                </span>
              )}
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={openPromptManager}>
                <FileText className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Prompt Manager
              </Button>
              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => setShowLanguageSettings(true)}>
                <Languages className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Language
              </Button>
              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => setShowSettings(true)}>
                <Settings className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Settings
              </Button>
              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={toggleLiveLog}>
                <Bell className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Live Log
              </Button>
              <Link to="/admin">
                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm">
                  <Settings className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                  Admin
                </Button>
              </Link>
              {currentUser && (
                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={forceLogout}>
                  <LogOut className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                  Logout
                </Button>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
          <PanelContainer />
        </div>
      </div>
      <DragModeIndicator />
      <DFOLModeIndicator />
      <NotificationPanel />
      <GlobalSearchOverlay />
      <NotificationCenter />
      <KeepReplaceDialog />
      <TreeViewModal isOpen={false} onClose={() => {}} rootNode={null} />
      <ProfilePanel />
      <ExecutePanel />
      <SettingsPanel isOpen={showSettings} onClose={() => setShowSettings(false)} />
      <LanguageSettings isOpen={showLanguageSettings} onClose={() => setShowLanguageSettings(false)} onLanguageChange={() => {}} />
      <PromptManagerPage />
    </DragDropProvider>
  );
}

FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/MainApp.tsx.bak
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
import { useState } from 'react';
import { LeftPanel } from '@/components/LeftPanel';
import { PanelContainer } from '@/components/PanelContainer';
import { DragDropProvider } from '@/components/DragDrop/DragDropProvider';
import { DragModeIndicator } from '@/components/DragDrop/DragModeIndicator';
import { KeepReplaceDialog } from '@/components/Rename/KeepReplaceDialog';
import { TreeViewModal } from '@/components/Tree/TreeViewModal';
import { DFOLModeIndicator } from '@/components/DFOL/DFOLModeIndicator';
import { ProfilePanel } from '@/components/DFOL/ProfilePanel';
import { ExecutePanel } from '@/components/DFOL/ExecutePanel';
import { NotificationPanel } from '@/components/DFOL/NotificationPanel';
import { GlobalSearchOverlay } from '@/components/Search/GlobalSearchOverlay';
import { NotificationCenter } from '@/components/Notification/NotificationCenter';
import { SettingsPanel } from '@/components/Settings/SettingsPanel';
import { LanguageSettings } from '@/components/Settings/LanguageSettings';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Settings, LogOut, Languages, Bell } from 'lucide-react';
import { useLogStore } from '@/stores/logStore';
import { useAuthStore } from '@/stores/authStore';
import { useLiveLogout } from '@/hooks/useLiveLogout';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';

export function MainApp() {
  const toggleLiveLog = useLogStore((s) => s.toggleLiveLog);
  const { currentUser } = useAuthStore();
  const { forceLogout } = useLiveLogout();
  const [showSettings, setShowSettings] = useState(false);
  const [showLanguageSettings, setShowLanguageSettings] = useState(false);

  return (
    <DragDropProvider>
      <div className="h-screen w-screen bg-background flex overflow-hidden">
        <LeftPanel />
        <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2 border-b border-border bg-card">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              {currentUser && (
                <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                  Logged in as <span className="font-medium">{currentUser.username}</span>
                </span>
              )}
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => setShowLanguageSettings(true)}>
                <Languages className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Language
              </Button>
              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => setShowSettings(true)}>
                <Settings className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Settings
              </Button>
              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={toggleLiveLog}>
                <Bell className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Live Log
              </Button>
              <Link to="/admin">
                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm">
                  <Settings className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                  Admin
                </Button>
              </Link>
              {currentUser && (
                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={forceLogout}>
                  <LogOut className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                  Logout
                </Button>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
          <PanelContainer />
        </div>
      </div>
      <DragModeIndicator />
      <DFOLModeIndicator />
      <NotificationPanel />
      <GlobalSearchOverlay />
      <NotificationCenter />
      <KeepReplaceDialog />
      <TreeViewModal isOpen={false} onClose={() => {}} rootNode={null} />
      <ProfilePanel />
      <ExecutePanel />
      <SettingsPanel isOpen={showSettings} onClose={() => setShowSettings(false)} />
      <LanguageSettings isOpen={showLanguageSettings} onClose={() => setShowLanguageSettings(false)} onLanguageChange={() => {}} />
    </DragDropProvider>
  );
}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/auto-setup.js
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
// auto-setup.js
import { execSync, spawn } from 'child_process';
import fs from 'fs';
import path from 'path';
import { fileURLToPath } from 'url';

const __dirname = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));
const packageJsonPath = path.join(__dirname, 'package.json');
const nodeModulesPath = path.join(__dirname, 'node_modules');

// Read package.json
const packageJson = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(packageJsonPath, 'utf8'));
const requiredDeps = {
  ...packageJson.dependencies,
  ...packageJson.devDependencies,
};

// Check which dependencies are missing
const missing = [];
for (const dep in requiredDeps) {
  const depPath = path.join(nodeModulesPath, dep);
  if (!fs.existsSync(depPath)) {
    missing.push(`${dep}@${requiredDeps[dep]}`);
  }
}

if (missing.length > 0) {
  console.log('\x1b[33m%s\x1b[0m', '⚠️  Missing dependencies detected. Installing...');
  console.log('Missing:', missing.map(m => m.split('@')[0]).join(', '));
  try {
    execSync(`npm install ${missing.join(' ')} --legacy-peer-deps`, { stdio: 'inherit' });
    console.log('\x1b[32m%s\x1b[0m', '✅ All dependencies installed successfully.');
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('\x1b[31m%s\x1b[0m', '❌ Failed to install dependencies:', error.message);
    process.exit(1);
  }
} else {
  console.log('\x1b[32m%s\x1b[0m', '✅ All dependencies are already installed.');
}

// Start Vite directly (NOT npm run dev again)
console.log('\x1b[36m%s\x1b[0m', '🚀 Starting development server...');
const vite = spawn('npx', ['vite', '--host', '0.0.0.0'], { 
  stdio: 'inherit', 
  shell: true 
});

vite.on('close', (code) => {
  process.exit(code);
});

  plugins: [react(), tailwindcss()],
  resolve: {
    alias: {
      "@": path.resolve(__dirname, "./src"),
    },
  },
  server: {
    headers: {
      // Required for WebContainer cross-origin isolation
      'Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy': 'require-corp',
      'Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy': 'same-origin',
    },
  },
  optimizeDeps: {
    exclude: ['@webcontainer/api'],
  },
});

    </div>

<script>
    let users = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('authority_users') || '[{"id":"1","username":"admin","role":"admin","deletePassword":"admin123","formatPassword":"admin123","dfolPassword":"admin123"}]');
    let sessions = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('authority_sessions') || '[]');
    let logs = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('authority_logs') || '[]');
    function saveAll() { localStorage.setItem('authority_users', JSON.stringify(users)); localStorage.setItem('authority_sessions', JSON.stringify(sessions)); localStorage.setItem('authority_logs', JSON.stringify(logs)); }
    function renderUsers() {
        document.getElementById('usersTable').innerHTML = users.map(u => `<tr><td>${u.username}</td><td>${u.role}</td><td>${u.deletePassword ? '●●●●' : 'Not set'}</td><td>${u.formatPassword ? '●●●●' : 'Not set'}</td><td>${u.dfolPassword ? '●●●●' : 'Not set'}</td><td class="action-buttons"><button class="secondary" onclick="editUser('${u.id}')">Edit</button><button class="danger" onclick="deleteUser('${u.id}')">Delete</button></td></tr>`).join('');
        document.getElementById('totalUsers').innerText = users.length;
    }
    function renderSessions() {
        document.getElementById('sessionsTable').innerHTML = sessions.map(s => `<tr><td>${s.username}</td><td>${s.sessionId.substring(0,8)}...</td><td>${new Date(s.startTime).toLocaleString()}</td><td>${s.logs?.length || 0}</td><td><button class="secondary" onclick="viewSessionLogs('${s.sessionId}')">View Logs</button></td></tr>`).join('');
        document.getElementById('activeSessions').innerText = sessions.length;
    }
    function renderLogs(filterUser='', filterLevel='') {
        let filtered = logs;
        if(filterUser) filtered = filtered.filter(l => l.username === filterUser);
        if(filterLevel) filtered = filtered.filter(l => l.level === filterLevel);
        const viewer = document.getElementById('logViewer');
        if(filtered.length === 0) { viewer.innerText = 'No logs to display.'; return; }
        viewer.innerText = filtered.map(l => `[${new Date(l.timestamp).toISOString()}] [${l.level.toUpperCase()}] [${l.username}] ${l.action} - ${JSON.stringify(l.details)}`).join('\n');
        document.getElementById('totalLogs').innerText = logs.length;
    }
    function populateUserFilter() {
        const select = document.getElementById('logUserFilter');
        const uniqueUsers = [...new Set(logs.map(l => l.username).filter(Boolean))];
        select.innerHTML = '<option value="">All Users</option>' + uniqueUsers.map(u => `<option value="${u}">${u}</option>`).join('');
    }
    window.receiveSessionLog = (sessionData) => {
        sessions = sessions.filter(s => s.sessionId !== sessionData.sessionId);
        sessions.push(sessionData);
        logs.push(...sessionData.logs);
        saveAll();
        renderSessions();
        populateUserFilter();
        renderLogs();
    };
    window.editUser = (id) => {
        const user = users.find(u => u.id === id);
        if(!user) return;
        const newDelete = prompt('New delete password (leave empty to keep)', user.deletePassword);
        const newFormat = prompt('New format password', user.formatPassword);
        const newDfol = prompt('New DFOL password', user.dfolPassword);
        if(newDelete !== null) user.deletePassword = newDelete || '';
        if(newFormat !== null) user.formatPassword = newFormat || '';
        if(newDfol !== null) user.dfolPassword = newDfol || '';
        saveAll();
        renderUsers();
    };
    window.deleteUser = (id) => {
        if(confirm('Delete user? This will also delete all sessions and logs for this user.')) {
            users = users.filter(u => u.id !== id);
            sessions = sessions.filter(s => s.userId !== id);
            logs = logs.filter(l => l.userId !== id);
            saveAll();
            renderUsers();
            renderSessions();
            populateUserFilter();
            renderLogs();
        }
    };
    window.viewSessionLogs = (sessionId) => {
        const session = sessions.find(s => s.sessionId === sessionId);
        if(session && session.logs) {
            document.getElementById('logViewer').innerText = session.logs.map(l => `[${new Date(l.timestamp).toISOString()}] ${l.action} - ${JSON.stringify(l.details)}`).join('\n');
            document.querySelector('.tab-btn[data-tab="logs"]').click();
        }
    };
    document.getElementById('addUserBtn').onclick = () => document.getElementById('addUserModal').classList.remove('hidden');
    document.getElementById('cancelAddUser').onclick = () => document.getElementById('addUserModal').classList.add('hidden');
    document.getElementById('confirmAddUser').onclick = () => {
        const username = document.getElementById('newUsername').value.trim();
        const loginPass = document.getElementById('newLoginPassword').value;
        if(!username || !loginPass) { alert('Username and login password required'); return; }
        users.push({ id: Date.now().toString(), username, role: 'user', deletePassword: document.getElementById('newDeletePassword').value, formatPassword: document.getElementById('newFormatPassword').value, dfolPassword: document.getElementById('newDfolPassword').value });
        saveAll();
        renderUsers();
        document.getElementById('addUserModal').classList.add('hidden');
        document.getElementById('newUsername').value = '';
        document.getElementById('newLoginPassword').value = '';
        document.getElementById('newDeletePassword').value = '';
        document.getElementById('newFormatPassword').value = '';
        document.getElementById('newDfolPassword').value = '';
    };
    document.getElementById('saveSecuritySettings').onclick = () => {
        localStorage.setItem('authority_global_delete', document.getElementById('globalDeletePassword').value);
        localStorage.setItem('authority_global_format', document.getElementById('globalFormatPassword').value);
        localStorage.setItem('authority_global_dfol', document.getElementById('globalDfolPassword').value);
        localStorage.setItem('authority_log_retention', document.getElementById('logRetention').value);
        alert('Security settings saved');
    };
    document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(btn => {
        btn.onclick = () => {
            document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
            btn.classList.add('active');
            document.querySelectorAll('.tab-content').forEach(tc => tc.classList.remove('active'));
            document.getElementById(`tab-${btn.dataset.tab}`).classList.add('active');
            if(btn.dataset.tab === 'logs') renderLogs();
            if(btn.dataset.tab === 'sessions') renderSessions();
        };
    });
    document.getElementById('refreshLogsBtn').onclick = () => renderLogs(document.getElementById('logUserFilter').value, document.getElementById('logLevelFilter').value);
    document.getElementById('exportLogsBtn').onclick = () => {
        const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(logs, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
        const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        const a = document.createElement('a');
        a.href = url;
        a.download = `authority_logs_${Date.now()}.json`;
        a.click();
        URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    };
    document.getElementById('logUserFilter').onchange = () => renderLogs(document.getElementById('logUserFilter').value, document.getElementById('logLevelFilter').value);
    document.getElementById('logLevelFilter').onchange = () => renderLogs(document.getElementById('logUserFilter').value, document.getElementById('logLevelFilter').value);
    renderUsers();
    renderSessions();
    populateUserFilter();
    renderLogs();
    console.log('Authority Panel ready. Listen on port 3001');
</script>
</body>
</html>
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
